title: 9 Cups Coffee
name: Arya Twirl
text:
Probably the most homey coffee shop I've been in, with very nice and friendly owner and Barista. They are even willing to go through all the hassle of finding the right grind size for my silly Flair.

And most importantly, probably the best iced latte I've ever had.

title: 9 Cups Coffee
name: Jane Wirawan
text: Good coffee, small cozy cafe. There are two floors, but the place could only probably fit 15 guests. The pricing is decent and they also sell self roasted beans 100grams and 200grams packagings. I also ordered a pancake, it was okay and the ice cream was too icy.

title: 9 Cups Coffee
name: Rio Rinaldo
text: A really satisfactory find in the neighborhood lacking of good coffee shop. Another plus, it's also a roastery so buy some beans if you like. I came on a hot day so my first choice is a caramel latte. Too milky for otherwise pretty flavorful of coffee and caramel. My second drink, a piccolo latte, is another case of milk overpowering the taste of the coffee. The place is a small two story joint with long benches, a bar, and a couch.

title: 9 Cups Coffee
name: Hokiewan Thezeus
text: The place to go if you are looking for a good cup of specialty coffee in Jakarta. They have a wide variety of local beans and the owner is very willing to advise you on beans selection and brewing technique based on your preference. I got their Sunda Arumanis and Enrekang Karangan during my last visit and now I know that I should have bought more.

text: A very small cafe with top-class V60 and choice selection of beans. I wish the opening hours were longer especially during workdays

title: 9 Cups Coffee
name: Ade William
text: They serve quality, specialty coffee which you can choose-- you can choose which coffee beans will be in your drink, and how your drink will be made (they offer various method, such as V60, aeropress, tubruk/cupping brew, espresso, etc.) Their food is relatively inexpensive. The vibe offered is very calming and cozy, with enough quietness, warm lighting, and local indie music playing. They also sell coffee beans, which might be quite expensive compared to other roasters, but you'll see that if you brew it, the signature tastes of each coffee is more pronounced, a sign of quality beans and care.

The environment here itself is quite nice and I love their walls. It's so artistic! And they have an area called "area pelepas stress" there's a book and some toys for you to play and read.
The barista is really nice and friendly too!

title: 9 Cups Coffee
name: Saepul Hidayat
text:
Ngopi di sebelah Kampus Untar. Lokasinya ada di Jalan Taman S. Parman persis di sebelah Kampus Untar 1. Dari kampus Untar masuk ke jalan kecil dan tempatnya ada di sebelah kanan.

9 Cups Coffee ini punya tempat yang kecil. Begitu masuk ada tangga ke bagian atas dimana ada coffee bar-nya dan tempat untuk memesan coffee dan makanannya. Dan tangga yang turun dari pintu masuk itu tempat kita bisa duduk sambil menikmati kopinya. Di bagian atas, coffee bar-nya bisa terlihat banyak beans yang dipajang. Di bagian bawahnya terdapat beberapa meja dan kursi dan ada juga mesin roasting coffee. Karena memang 9 cups coffee ini selain jual coffeenya juga jual beans coffeenya.

Menu yang ada di 9 cups coffee ini selain coffee juga ada makanannya seperti toast bread, pasta dan pancake. Untuk beansnya mereka juga jual local beans dan imported beans.

Saya pesan hot cappucinno yang harganya Rp. 30.000. Saya suka cappucinnonya. Rasanya kopinya enak dan milk foamnya lembut. Selain itu saya pesan cheese toast bread yang harganya Rp. 22.000. Dua helai roti yang diisi dengan keju dan dipanggang. Dan dipotong menjadi empat bagian. Cheese toast bread ini sangat cocok untuk sarapan.

Saya datang ke sana sekitar jam 9.30. Jadi tidak terlalu ramai dan bahkan sepi. Mungkin untuk kalian yang mau berkunjung ke sini bisa sekitar jam 9 an saat 9 cups coffee baru buka.

Instagram : @saepulhdyt

title: 9 Cups Coffee
name: Jeff Widovan
text:
Ini coffee shop bisa dibilang bener-bener hidden gem. Tempatnya tersembunyi dan homey banget, gak kalah juga kopinya enak banget.

Owner coffee shop ini sudah langganan jadi juri di IBC, jadi secara taste sudah tidak perlu diragukan. Beans di 9cups ini juga diroasting langsung sama beliau.

Banyak pilihan beans untuk filter dari lokal maupun luar negeri, dan harganya sangat terjangkau jadi cocok banget untuk nongkrong habis ngampus.

text:
rated:
- lychee iced tea 80/100
- green tea latte
- ambience 70/100
- interior 60/100
- owner -10000000000/1000
- barista 50/100
Overall, this cafe i will rate 2/100.
Mgkin kalo bisa kasih bintang 0 bakal saya kasih. Ga ngerti banget sama konsep cafe ini, ada di tengah kompleks dan pusat kost pendidkan perguruan tinggi. Tapi sangat tidak recommed untuk didatangi, minumannya enak dan saya ke sana untuk meeting bersama kawan saya dengan suara yang tidak berisik, selayaknya orang ngobrol saja. Tapi ownernya sangat bad attitude, tdak tau tata krama, cara ia menegus sangat tidak beretika dan bilang bahwa ada bayi di atas. Haduh, ini caffe bukan tempat penitipan bayi, tidak akan datang lagi dan benar-benar mengecewakan. Padahal saya sering kali ingin datang, baru mencobanya sudah muak, semoga bisa menjadi perbaikan bagi ownernya untuk bisa lebih baik lagi dalam mengelola caffenya.

Karena sudah sering saya datang ke banyak caffe, baru kali ini rasanya tidak seperti di caffe. Padahal saat itu, tidak ada orang yang datang kecuali saya.

Begitupun baristanya, sy menanyakan ttg kopinya, tp di balas tdk enak dan suruh liat sendiri aja. Wdym?

title: O'Good Coffee & Eatery
name: Gilbert Devlin Julian
text:
This place offers a spacious setting with both indoor and outdoor seating, making it suitable for meetings or working comfortably. The coffee is good, and the food options are quite enjoyable — the fried noodle tek-tek and Hong Kong fried rice are both satisfying choices. Prices lean toward the standard-to-pricey range, but still fair considering the overall experience.

The only downsides during my visit were the indoor fan on the left side of the indoor room, which made a loud squeaking noise, and the Wi-Fi connection that felt a bit slow at times. Hopefully, these can be improved soon, because aside from that, everything else here is excellent and makes it a great spot to return to.

title: +62 Coffee & Space - Tanjung Duren
name: adam rifky
text:
Came here for a work-from-cafe day. Food was good, coffee was fine. The space is well-decorated, outlets aplenty.

Review written with my hotspot because the wifi here is quite bad, at least at the time of this writing. The space is also quite small and tightly-packed together, so it can get very noisy. Despite how tightly-packed the space is, seating is still fairly limited. The staff moved me around while I was in the middle of something, which was understandable, but ultimately still made the experience disruptive. I knocked off a star mostly for the bad wifi, but I will not be returning because the experience was annoying.

title: +62 Coffee & Space - Tanjung Duren
name: Erwin
text:
One of the most spacious and well-designed cafés in the Tanjung Duren area.
The café features both indoor and outdoor seating, catering to various preferences and offering a pleasant ambiance throughout.

What truly sets this place apart is the absence of background music—often an overlooked detail—which allows guests to enjoy their conversations or simply relax without unnecessary noise.

The food is quite enjoyable, with prices that remain reasonable given the comfortable environment. The air conditioning is pleasantly cool, adding to the overall comfort of the space.

Cleanliness is well-maintained, and the selection of chairs and sofas provides a cozy and inviting atmosphere that encourages guests to linger.

A refined spot worth visiting, whether for casual meetings, quiet work sessions, or simply a relaxing break.

title: Amalgam Coffee Brewery
name: Salman Alfarisi
text:
Amalgam Coffee Brewery is an absolute gem! This place is perfect for so many occasions—whether you need to **focus on work**, have a **productive meeting**, or simply **catch up with friends**.

One of its biggest advantages is the **large parking lot**, which is a huge relief in this area. Once inside, you’ll find it’s not just one crowded room. They have **plenty of space and different rooms** to choose from, so you can always find a spot that suits your mood, from quiet corners to more social areas.

The **staff are wonderful—kind, attentive, and very informative** about their brew methods. The entire place is always **neat and tidy**, with a **classy, well-thought-out layout** that feels both stylish and comfortable. It’s clear that a lot of care goes into the details here. Highly recommend for a top-tier coffee experience!

title: Amalgam Coffee Brewery
name: Wening Samudrawati
text: Food was ok, but their coffee is the best I’ve ever tasted. Creamy and Bold. They have several private rooms.

title: Amalgam Coffee Brewery
name: Pete Silva
text:
The parking is far back, behind the building.
There are 3 parking spots in front, but they are for "valet" and directors... (mostly empty)

There is an outdoor sitting area.
Inside couches and chairs.
There is good pastry like croissants.

The coffee was good but a bit small (café latte)

It is a nice place.

title: Amalgam Coffee Brewery
name: Dan Kelly
text: Quality western coffee shop with Indonesian influences. Prices are about 60% of Australian prices. Quality as good.

title: Amalgam Coffee Brewery
name: Suting Zhou
text:
American retro style, music and design match.

The design is outstanding. The smoking area, non-smoking area, outdoor courtyard and indoor area are well separated, which is very suitable for team meetings on weekdays.

But this is also its disadvantage. Its main customer group is business people from nearby governments and enterprises, so the price is a bit high compared to the price of coffee and ramen.

Take ramen for example, I think it is a combination of instant noodles in bags with two vegetables and frozen seafood. Its WiFi speed is very fast and there is a charging port.

In summary: If you need to work, it is a suitable choice. If you want to relax and vacation, I may advise you to consider it.

In addition, when they make up for it, they will omit the rupiah in hundreds.

The lychee lemonade was one of the best drinks I’ve had in Jakarta. Super refreshing and nicely presented. Definitely worth a try.

title: Amalgam Coffee Brewery
name: Della Mayang
text: I had such a great experience! The place is super clean and wonderfully quiet, which I really appreciated. The vibe was fantastic, and the price is just right for being in the heart of the city. The food was delicious, and the wifi worked perfectly. I can’t wait to come back next time! 👍

title: Amalgam Coffee Brewery
name: Raka Pamungkas
text: Been twice having meetings here. First, they forgot our orders of fried rice. We waited for more than an hour (and after complaining). Second, it was their plates dirty. I think the owner needs to train the staffs better. They always looked in rush. I even had no appetite to take pictures here.

title: Amalgam Coffee Brewery
name: Adinda Shafira
text:
Was scrolling through IG and found them, decided to give them a try.
They have 2 separate indoor area, non smoking and smoking. They also have outdoor area.
I tried their Ice cappuccino and chocolate cake. Their cappuccino is pretty standard nothing special, it's not too acidic so it doesn't trigger my sensitive stomach. I like their chocolate cake, it's not too sweet but I don't like the popcorn on top of it.
The service is good, the staffs are very helpful and nice.
What I didn't like is their non smoking indoor area is very limited and small, a group of buffoons decided to be the loudest fools and they really bother my time here. So keep that in mind if you want to enjoy some time alone to relax

title: Amalgam Coffee Brewery
name: Vanilla Girl
text: Came here to work from cafe. Overall the ambience and music was nice, however the connectivity was a real issue. The wifi kept disconnecting every 5 minutes and additionally there was no signal for my mobile data. Ended up leaving after a short period of time. The food was also mediocre for that price range (on average above 100k). Would not revisit.

title: Amalgam Coffee Brewery
name: Theodore Nataniel
text:
Located near Tugu Tani, accessible by bus and lots of car and bike parking. Lots of indoor & outdoor seatings with a private room. Wifi is bad, electric plug is generally available, interior is homey, and staffs are quick to serve.

They serve Indonesian, Western, and Japanese cuisine & snacks along with coffee and non-coffee (except juice) at a med-high price. I had their chicken katsu curry rice, mocha, caffe latte, and pisang goreng. All are great taste, decent portion, and not too strong in flavor.

Will go here for casual drink but not for work due to its wifi.

title: Amalgam Coffee Brewery
name: Prasetyo S. Aji
text:
Located inside BMP Bldg in Kebon Sirih, it's a nice cozy place to relax a bit after a long hectic busy day with your work, activities, deadlines and any others. Taking a small terraces area, there are non smoking and smoking areas with AC, and outdoor smoking area.
A bit pricey and a bit so so for the taste and flavor. Overall it was nice 👍🏻

title: Amalgam Coffee Brewery
name: Kerissa Ward
text: The shop is overpriced. Also, the staff was quite rude. I had purchased a tea and was working on my laptop. They insisted I purchase something else if I stayed there, even though I had only been there 1.5 hours or so and was just finishing my tea. I told them I had already bought tea, but they were insistent. Quite rude and very unimpressed. Do better, Jakarta.

title: Amalgam Coffee Brewery
name: Fre Tob
text: Love the vibes of this cafe. A simple elegant theme with dark green color combined with the wood hint at the interior. The nice thing about this place is they separate the smoking and non-smoking area into a different rooms.

title: Amalgam Coffee Brewery
name: Dyni Hayami
text:
A nice hidden cafe in Kebon Sirih area. They separate the place between smoking and non smoking area. In Sunday evening, this place was bit crowded. I think this place is good for meeting point since the parking area is large enough.

I ordered hot cocoa with oatmilk and mini croissant. Hot cocoa is sweet actually, so its better to reduce the cocoa powder portion. Pisang goreng is good to try. I recommend it for snack.

Amalgam is located inside Gedung GMP and it is on the right side, so you have to be careful when you reach there, since the road is only for one way traffic.

title: Amalgam Coffee Brewery
name: Hesti Diyahanita Diyahanita
text:
We order sop buntut, nasi bebek crispi, omelette, and nasi dori.
All was good, just perfect.

The ambience was good, have a large space, not noisy that we could chitchat comfortably.

The parking space also large.

The location is near my office. Surely we will comeback soon.

title: Amalgam Coffee Brewery
name: Christoffer Hæger
text:
Very nice interior of this café. It is a lot larger than you think so do not shy away if the seats right inside are full, there are plenty more in the back!

Had an iced latte and a banana pain au chocolates. Coffee was very good but the pastry was heated making it crispy and crumbly. Had a long list of pastries to choose from but all but two were sold out. As was all the lemonades.. Service was polite albeit a bit slow. Nice to have call buttons on each table for waitors and bill!

title: Amalgam Coffee Brewery
name: Nya' Zata Amani
text: I love the wooden ambience, gives you warmth feeling (though the room is quite cold). The food was acceptable, but 5 stars for the oxtail soup. The service was somewhat slower, probably because we were in the meeting room, at the back of the store, so they missed my order twice, that I have to walk to find the server and reorder my drinks again. Overall, great experience!

title: Amalgam Coffee Brewery
name: Ayya
text: My 2nd visit, the ambience is so homey and always love to comeback again! I ordered udon katsu curry, tahu cabe garam and popcorn latte. Tahu cabe garam favorite sih fix! 🫶🫶🫶

title: Amalgam Coffee Brewery
name: Ria Tumimomor
text:
I have been here twice with different friends, and l... THE ADDRESS STILL STATED INCORRECTLY.
First of all, it's located GMP building instead of BMP building.
Second: It's located at the right side of the road, instead of on the left. If you use online transportation better stated that you wish to go to BNI Kebun Sirih. From this BNI Bank, you will have to walk a bit, probably around 3-5 minutes before finding this place.

Other than misleading map location, this coffee shop is actually comfortable for people to hang out. They have various pastries and also various other menu as well, if you wish to have lunch or probably dinner. They have one indoor area for smokers and also outdoor area. And of course non smoking area as well. And their coffee is okay, is a bit creamy but I like that way.

title: Amalgam Coffee Brewery

amalgam coffee

Tapi kalo lupa no komen, kenapa juga kita gak minta tolong lagi, udah badmood aja di cuekin gitu, maaf ya kalau kasih rating kurang bagus. Semoga lebih bisa ditingkatin ya pelayanannya. title: Copper Club Specialty Coffee
name: Jordan J
text:
First visit to this cafe

Ordered a piccolo and the bean they used was bold yet fruity with the right balance. The woku chicken rice was also on point: delicious, spicy, and creamy.

The interior design and overall atmosphere genuinely make you feel like you're home, feels really welcoming.

The place is clean and well arranged, making it perfect for some alone time or catching up with friends.

Definitely worth revisiting :)

title: Copper Club Specialty Coffee
name: Brahmastyo Puji
text: Nice coffee shop. I got a long black, taste great. It's pretty quite here, perfect place to start your day with a cup of good coffee. I love the ambience, lots of plants feels refreshing. Good job 👍👍

title: Copper Club Specialty Coffee
name: Chrysan Lim
text:
First coffee shop to try in Kelapa Gading, it's been 7yrs since the last time we stroll around here. Good ambience, nice sitting area & good coffee for sure. That's already cover all the summary about this place. Must visit!

*price doesn't include govt & service taxes.
**Disclaimer: the review is based on my personal taste & experience at that time. So it might be differ from others opinion.

title: Copper Club Specialty Coffee
name: olivia rinaldi
text: Love the ambience here. My favorite is salt bread and mushroom soup. Must try ✨

title: Copper Club Specialty Coffee
name: Erwin
text:
This café easily feels like one of the most homely spots I’ve ever visited. The interior design makes you feel as if you’re sitting in your own living room—warm, cozy, and very welcoming. It’s not just about the look, but also the atmosphere. The place is kept clean and well-arranged, which makes it perfect whether you come to hang out with friends, have a chat, or simply enjoy some quiet time alone.

I ordered my go-to drink, an iced Americano, and as usual it didn’t disappoint. Simple, refreshing, and just the right balance to brighten up my day. Sometimes the simplest coffee is the best, and here it’s made just right.

Overall, this café gives both comfort and quality—a combination that’s not easy to find. Definitely a place worth revisiting, and one I can see myself coming back to again and again.

title: Copper Club Specialty Coffee
name: Chelsa Debora
text: Interesting Canggu-spirited coffee shop I even thought of one café I used to go to when in Bali. They did great at capturing the cozy, tropical coffee while serving their beverage at their best. My copper coffee (signature brown sugar milk coffee) gets perfectly fine even when it gradually becomes watery.

title: Copper Club Specialty Coffee
name: David Gunawan
text:
Good place, super homie and quite to chills.
They have several tea and coffee option.

I'm trying the tea brew with roast walnut 5/5 taste really nice.

For the food we ordered club breakfast and salted egg rice. The portion quite generous, taste quite well. Really recommended to visit here again, and i suggest to visit in the morning.

title: Copper Club Specialty Coffee
name: Theodore Nataniel
text:
Went here Friday 4pm for work, not too crowded and lots of seat available. One of the best coffee spots in Kelapa Gading based on other reviews so had to try it out. Place has quite limited parking space, has 2 floors of mostly indoor seating but outdoor available too. Most of the tables here are a bit small and not much of electric plugs available, so do take note if you’re here for work.

They serve brunch, snacks, and array of coffee at an upmarket price. I had their latte which tastes just fine. The servers are helpful, convenient payment method, and quick serve time. Place is clean and neat, nice natural interior, and wifi is strong.

Overall will return when around Gading.

title: Copper Club Specialty Coffee
name: Hans Jonathan
text:
I must say this is one of the best places in Kelapa Gading to enjoy coffee. Cozy interior and the staff really know their coffee.

We ordered:
- Honey Latte
- Spiced Chai Latte
- Kofie Tropicola
- Bewitched
- Manual Brew Friedhats Peru Gesha 🌟
- Churros 🌟
- Mini Canele 🌟

Chai Latte was really good. The Peru Gesha has a really prominent honey note! Their snacks churros and canele were really good too, the right amount of sweet and savory. Their specialty coffees were also good but mostly fruity / sweet.

Parking was limited though, there's only roadside parking.

title: Copper Club Specialty Coffee
name: Glen Lucius
text: Its a great cafe both for drinking and doing work. The ambient is really comfy and instagramable too. Coffee is good, give it a try on their signature coffee. Price wise its normal to a bit expensive. Service is really good, very polite and helpful

title: Copper Club Specialty Coffee
name: xatrios
text:
Nice little coffee shop located in the middle of Kelapa Gading's neighborhood. This 2-story coffee shop offers a warm and homy atmosphere, with attentive servers.

My coffee turned out amazing and the side dish was also very nice. It was a pleasant experience for me even though the parking space was pretty limited.

title: Copper Club Specialty Coffee
name: Aurelius Evan
text:
great cafe for hang outs, meets, or just doing some work. place is really clean and cozy. many decorations makes the room feel homey. menus are pretty pricey for what they offer, expect to spend 50-100k for one visit here.

coffee is good, pastry is decent, but not too special. service however is one of the strong points here. staffs are very friendly, and knowledgable about their products and to match our needs at the time, wether you like strong caffeine, a little sour, sweetness of every coffee menu, and what kind of pastry is best to match.

title: Copper Club Specialty Coffee
name: Celine Lim
text: Their coffee is pretty good, but food was meh.

title: Copper Club Specialty Coffee
name: Lulu Pearla Dewinta
text: Knew this coffee shop since 2019, and still getting here until now bcs the coffee is really good, the food taste good, and the place is really comfortable, less noise, & good place for working. Good luck for more years for copper club

title: Copper Club Specialty Coffee
name: Eric
text:
Nice place to have a good cup of coffee and coffee mocktail. They also have a few variety of food from Indonesian to Western. Truffle fries was nice and crispy but lacking a bit of the truffle flavour. Lamb quesadilla was delicious, a bit on the gamey side but thats how I like it.

Place was also quiet, suitable for work when i went there for lunch

Ample parking on the street for cars.

Overall recommended, will come back if I happen to be in the area

title: Copper Club Specialty Coffee
name: Riana Sri Hastuti
text: Found a hidden gem place in Kelapa Gading and I really recommend!! A quite comfortable coffee shop to me time or have a chat with your friends. I love the ambience and decor, it's cozy and beautiful. Unfortunately, I didn't order their coffee but "Biscoff Latte" is really good.

title: Copper Club Specialty Coffee
name: Stella A
text: This coffee shop applied COVID-19 health protocol. Every customer should check their temperature before order any beverage/food. The place is NICE, I love the vibe. There are indoor and outdoor seating. Some gluten-free cake is available and the coffee options are various. I recommend this place for anyone who seeks short escape from home during this strange time, but careful the space is limited (concern on  social distancing).

title: Copper Club Specialty Coffee
name: Ellie
text:
Coffee Gem of Kelapa Gading! The place is very unique & homey. Could sit in this place for hours. Their coffee quality is top notch. They offer you with two types of coffee blend (fruity/chocolaty).

Food is also sooo good.
Also very friendly staff.

Will definitely visit this place regularly.

title: Copper Club Specialty Coffee
name: Yunia Pratiwi
text:
Best time visit : Morning or evening

Order their signature coffee mocktails : Bewitched (reminds me of Butterbeer 😋), Dubai brownies & my kiddos really love Bolabi

The ambience super cozy here. All indoor area at 1st and 2nd floor for non-smoking.

Smoking area only available at the front terrace

title: Copper Club Specialty Coffee
name: Darien T.
text: Nicely small decorated cafe with two story to explore. Ordered filter coffee and red velvet chocolate drink. Filter coffee was good and I liked it (they served cold water ahead, commended), but the chocolate drink was a bit watery and tasted like melted ice cream (not recommended for 40k price, it's overrated, I hope they improve on this). Nevertheless, the place is real nice and cool, suited to spend time with ppl. Will do visit again.

title: Copper Club Specialty Coffee
name: Hubert Jonathan
text: They serve a good variety of coffee and non-coffee based drinks. Don't hesitate to have a chat with the friendly baristas. The Lala Lamb burger is highly recommended. Good place to chill and have a small chat with friends and/or business partners. Love the ambience of the room and easy enough to find photogenic spots inside the cafe.

title: Copper Club Specialty Coffee

Food quality has improved over the years since my first review.

text: Accidentally stopped by when visiting Kelapa Gading. One of specialty coffee shop in the area. Vibe was great at night, cozy, and friendly staffs. As expected they had wide range of origins here. Nice experience and would stop by again of course.

title: Copper Club Specialty Coffee
name: Lintang Wisesa
text: Tue, Oct 27 2020. Comfort place to have a meeting or just grab a delicious coffee on a weekend. So I've just tried its Choco chips drink (IDR 45k), beef fried rice (IDR 50k) & korean garlic bread (IDR 50k), it has standard taste, not perfect but not too bad, the price is also in the med-high range. Overall: good food, instagrammable place & nice service.

title: Copper Club Specialty Coffee
name: Amelia
text: One of the comforting place to visit in Kelapa Gading area. It has various menu of coffees and comfort food. The latte is great! I always prefer to sit on the second floor, because it has an ambiance like a living room.

title: Copper Club Specialty Coffee
name: Mafiani Kusuma Dewi
text: This cafe is located a little bit far from the main road and does not have a big name sign in front of the cafe. The ambience of the  place is pretty good which is also completed by unique room decoration. If you are an instagram person, you will enjoy every detail of room decoration and take bunch of photos. However, if your main purpose is to enjoy coffee and food, this cafe is not recommended for you. I ordered avo coffee and there's nothing special with the taste. Moreover, the avocado juice is too liquid. As for the food, the portion is okay with an okay taste too.

title: Copper Club Specialty Coffee
name: Ruth Novelia Yurike
text: A small but yet cozy coffee shop. Unique decoration. Good coffee, got choices of snacks and food too. Lots of pretty corners. If you are unfamiliar with the area, you might miss this place. Overall would like to come back to try their other menu.

title: Copper Club Specialty Coffee
name: Polevy Ezekiel
text: Really comfy place to hang out or work from café, lots of indoor and semi-outdoor seating areas with calming and homey ambience. Serves great coffee and foods too, and the baristas were really friendly.

title: Copper Club Specialty Coffee
name: Thomas Aquinas Rhys
text:
Copper Club has always been my favorite coffee shop for hanging out. They offer not only coffee but also expierence to ensure customers taste the best coffee. The baristas professionally know to handle customers such as Lukman. He passionately bring customers to appreciate the coffee bean as maximum as possible.

Keep up the good work and wish more experiences you can share through cups of coffee.

Very good coffee. Next time will come for the food.

Update:
I tried their lamb pasta. It was so good. Would love to have it again and tried other food next time.

title: Copper Club Specialty Coffee
name: Sir Eats-a-Lot
text: Picturesque little coffee shop located inside an old school housing complex, perfect for WFC, cold AC (2PK wow times 3 or 4 units), offers single origins from Geishas to Columbias, or as basic as cold brew served with square ice, decorated with ratan furnitures, feels like in Jepara shops, would comeback if in area!

text: A Great experience working here. A chill and cozy place. For those who like 60% cocoa really recommend the Korte 60% chocolate with oatmilk is a little bitter but sweet. Good to work from cafe and to have a chill conversation because it is quite. With loads of plugs.

text: Niat mau buka puasa krna kata suami disini enak piscok nya pas dia gofood, tapi pas dine in kaki gue di hinggapi kecoa jalan sampe lutut, udh teriak ga ada yg notice karyawannya, udh badmood bgt, ga lama kecoa terbang mau hinggap ke makanan gua, disitu posisi masih nunggu mie tapi gua udh bner bner gasselera, udh en'ek bgt, piscok yg udh dtng blm kita sentuh akhirnya gua take away. Staff gue tegur disitu ada banyak kecoa tpi mereka ga minta maaf malah kyk "hah kecoa? Itu kali tempat sampah depanL padahal ada tempat sampah di resto itu yg super kotor dkt meja makan yg gua yakin ga pernh di bersihin krna sampe berkerak. Tempat dine in yg hrsnya buat pelanggan aja kotor apalagi dapurnya?? We never know, hanya staff disana yg tau kondisi dalemnya. Sumpah trauma gue ga lagi lagi makan disitu. Cukup first and the last time gua dtng kesitu

name: Felicia Sharren
text:
Went on Sunday.

The location is in between houses, you can easily spot it. Parking space is not much, but i guess you can just park in front of the houses.

It was not crowded. Especially 2nd floor. If you’re a smoker, you have to smoke outside and it was pretty hot. But the ambience was decent. A lot of plants hanging here and there.

As for taste, coffee was nice, can really taste the brown sugar. For hojicha? I’d pass it. Not that worth it.

And with that price? Quiet pricey for coffee.

Service was polite and informative.

title: Copper Club Specialty Coffee
name: Aileen P. Wijaya
text:
A cozy and homey place to sip a cup of coffee or more! The great coffee and comfy ambience make a visit to Copper Club a short retreat from the hustle and bustle of kelapa gading area.

A must try is their ‘Super Copper Coffee’ which is their take on Indo’s beloved sweet milk coffee,  add an additional espresso shot if you like stronger coffee taste. Also try their Iced Mocha if you want a chocolatey twist to your regular coffee drink. The matcha latte is also there for you to try if you’re more into tea than coffee.

Overall, truly a new hidden gem and definitely a must visit for your caffeine fix.

title: Copper Club Specialty Coffee
name: Blessdy Clementine
text:
Went here twice. Great coffee with several choices of espresso beans. Most of all, this place has a super friendly barista!

Flat white is awesome, manual brew beans line up is very interesting.

The place is homy, the 2nd floor is more spacious tho. The food is amazing (I tried the truffle pasta).

It's kinda pricey, but I'd say the overall experience is worth the price.

Every time I visit Kelapa Gading area, I always had this place is mind.

title: Copper Club Specialty Coffee
name: Tommy Fanggidae
text:
The good are:
Awesome Cozy place, nice interior, it has lots of sitting benches and chairs according to your liking, have smoking rooms and also lots of power stations. Nice place for hang out with your friends.good selections of coffees and other drinks too.
The bad:
wifi is not good when there's lots of people, plus the lamb burger was not a good experience.(i only tried once but from what I get the patty was not cooked enough and the lamb raw taste is quite overpowering, maybe needed more herbs or spices to make it better, plus the buns was not soft and juicy, it was dry and crumbling.) I am quite dissatisfied with the burger when the waiter ask for my response I  don't want to be rude but then I thought maybe I should just write it here.
This is just my first impression of the place. Who knows maybe someday I'll go here again and try other menus.

title: Copper Club Specialty Coffee

text: High price comes with good coffee. Good place for coffee even work on cafe.

title: Copper Club Specialty Coffee
name: Shafa Adinindya
text: Hands down one of the best cafes I've ever went to. The ambiance is great, the staff is friendly, the service is good, the food and beverages as well! The aesthetics of this place is to die for—I love how prettily minimalistic the design/layout of the cafe is. I also like how they use metal utensils. Great place to hang out, take photos, have meetings, a little gathering—it's just a really nice place.

title: Copper Club Specialty Coffee
name: alfredo gueli
text: Great place to hang out and chill to taste dufferent types of coffee. Barista takes his job very seriously and watched him do his work professionally as I was very impressed. We had the burgers which were way above standard . No place is absolutely perfect but definitely better than your average Starbucks experience.  Thank you for allowing me to sample your different types of coffee. As an Italian I really appreciated it.

title: Copper Club Specialty Coffee
name: DSU
text: Nice coffee with average price. Small place with unique decorations. Average hospitality.

title: Loffee Coffee & Eatery
name: Martiana Sipahutar
text:
This place is actually cozy and the service is efficient when it's not packed with guests. When it's lunch time during weekene, you need to remind them several times about your order.

I visited this place on a Sunday afternoon. The food was surprisingly tasty. When you put aside the waiting time in its service, it's definitely delicious. I tried fish and chips, the fish came in small bites but it tasted delicious so I didn't mind the appearance.

The Indonesian snack was also recommended but the serving too forever. The waiter said because they needed time to provide 4 variants of snack: dried cassava, potato chips, fried tofu, and cireng (fried tapioca starch). Forget the rujak seasoning if you're locals but the condiment was still nice.

Hot cappuccino was way too sweet though the coffee is creamy and smells good. My bad, I should have ordered the one without sugar instead of a less sugar.

Parking is limited but that is not a busy street so you may park along the road I guess.

title: Loffee Coffee & Eatery
name: Anna Safa
text:
the chicken was very delicious! it had four different flavors, especially the additional burnt cheese that tied all the flavors together created a perfect cheesy-balance. the pasta was mid & bland, the drink was refreshing. definitely recommend their UFO chicken.

service was okay, the waitress was very nice and friendly, they greeted and opened our doors. though when we called the waitress, she saw us but continued talking to her friend. for the future please don’t do that, and immediately come to the customer ok?

the ambience was nice, looks clean, but missing that cozy-homey feeling. there were lots of different kinds of lighting, the center lighting was bright white, the seating was warm yellow and the LED decor was colorful. please select a theme of what you’re trying to display this restaurant as to be more aesthetically pleasing.

eating for two (with my boyfriend) the bill came out to 277k for bubble gum drink, pasta, chicken, cheese, rice, ice tea. definitely on the higher end, but still worth the try. perfect for lunch!

title: Loffee Coffee & Eatery
name: dian h
text: We came on Saturday night with very busy business but despite busy, their service was good and fast. The waiter and waitress were very kind and helpful. The food was amazing. We strongly recommend to order this Korean Snack Platter because the sweet potatoes fries was so good crispy and tasty. The beef bowl is okay but can be improved. We were assisted by Mas Aji and Mbak Putri and both of them was very great at what they’re doing. Will definitely return for our next hangout!

title: Loffee Coffee & Eatery
name: Merry
text:
Their Nasi Goreng Kampong was good, the coffee with rum also nice. Not recommended for wfc, unfortunately. 😊
Their services well spent on us.

title: Loffee Coffee & Eatery
name: Shams Rahman
text:
I'll start with the positives. The Korean fried chicken was delicious.

Apart from that, the rest of the food was meh. Hardly any flavour. Staff communication was really poor. Not sure if it's just the English barrier.

Service was very slow.

Even just waiting for something simple like ice cream took 10mins. The workers were not even busy.

Ice cream at the end was poor apart from the Dubai chocolate ice cream which I recommend.

Hopefully I don't sound too negative. Just trying to be honest. If you do come, just get the fried chicken. Buldak is not worth it.

title: Loffee Coffee & Eatery
name: Sahara S
text: The menu has a wide variety of options, and I really enjoyed the kwetiau—it's definitely a highlight! The atmosphere is cozy, clean, and comfortable. The food arrived fairly quickly, and while everything was tasty, it wasn't mind-blowing. A bit pricey, but the service was good. Overall, a solid dining experience!

title: Loffee Coffee & Eatery
name: Khansa Liberdo
text: The place smells good, clean, very aesthetic as well-perfect for taking pictures especially to post in Instagram and social media. The food is as well very equivalent to the place itself, delicious food with price ranging through 60 - 150 ribu rupiah. The atmosphere is calm, chill, perfect for doing work and wanting to eat peacefully. The service is very nice as well as the waiter knows what to reccommend to the customers making it very easy to order and eat for first time customers.

title: Loffee Coffee & Eatery
name: Kathy Chan
text:
Calm atmosphere, delicious food, and reasonably affordable price! I personally take great delight in the gelato and coffee.
An excellent place to hang out and chill with friends and family.
Customer service is super friendly and are always ready to tend to our needs.

title: Loffee Coffee & Eatery
name: kadangjalan kadangjajan
text:
If you're going to come during Ramadan, please do reserve first. And ASK OFTEN about your order until you're tired if you want your order come in a decent time. (Tip: Sort the review by the lowest first)

Will i come again?, probably if someone is paying my meals and during normal weekdays. Not on the weekend, not during Ramadan ever again.

I walk in at 4pm and being told that the order could come at 18.30 max. We're okay about it.

We're about to order the Ramadan package and they said it's closed for order. Again, we're okay about it.

We ordered buldak chicken, ramyun, sundubu jjigae & ice tea in one pitcher.

And we asked SEVERAL times if sundubu jjigae came with rice or not, they said yes & no need to order add ons.

The tea came at 17.53, totally fine about it.

But, 18.30 we asked, and asked, and asked about our food, they said, wait a minute and repeat. We're no longer hungry but in a survival mode because we do have gerd. But luckily one of us bring chocolates and saved our life. Tho it's chocolate & not good in an empty stomach.

The food came in 19.02 exact. An hour after adzan. Meanwhile the food for everybody that already reserved came at 17.30. It's probably cold already when they ate that.

And nobody is saying sorry. Just one person, probably it's only because we're kinda mad (crazy) and joking by saying "oh kirain datengnya buat saur"

Until this, i want to give 2 stars for the service and 3 for the food.

But when no rice come with sundubu, i asked again, and it came. And i just found out that he didn't even ask me if i wanted to pay more or if it's additional menu or not, he just gave me to shut me off and added that in the bills i paid. Thanks for not asking. I was okay eating without rice, we didn't finish the food anyway because we're way more uncomfortable & kinda crazy & laughed at what has happened to us lol.

And they asked for a review on paper, we literally  wrote what our thoughts. They're saying sorry AFTER read it.

Now for me, the service is 1 star. I'm sorry, i hope when you read the bad reviews on google, you didn't only apologize with template because i don't need that but REALLY please improve your service. If you sortir the reviewed based on the star, you should really really start doing things to improve your. service.

title: Loffee Coffee & Eatery
name: Anindita Budiutami
text: I went here with friends for lunch break. The service is great! The foods were served quickly and it taste quite good! We absolutely love the dessert (hotplate cookies with ice cream) we ordered!

title: Loffee Coffee & Eatery
name: Eddie Campbell
text:
Came by on a Friday afternoon and was not disappointed!  Enjoyed the savory marinated chicken soup (Nasi Ayam Garang Asam), a delicious berry smoothy (great even with less sugar) and the latte float with vanilla ice cream.

Looking forward to returning again to try the signature beverages (red velvet and soya pandan look great), bitterballen, cheese buldak and Ufo chicken.

title: Loffee Coffee & Eatery
name: Albert Xan
text:
- Parking and the seating area is quite limited.
- One of the things that really stands out here is the service. When I order something, they initiatively tell us about the expected waiting time AND even though the food came at roughly the expected time, we were given a free ice cream as a compensation for waiting.
- The food tastes really nice, even though the portion is too large for us.
- The atmosphere was a little bit noisy due to the music and there were quite a lot of people in here.
- Overall, it was a really pleasant experience

title: Loffee Coffee & Eatery
name: Faqih R
text:
I and my friend went here for work. We bought a lot from french fries, croffle, gelato, latte, carbonara. All the taste is phenomenal!

The only downside are that the place is just too small, and the wi-fi are just so bad. I had to give up using wi-fi although there was only very few customer (I visit this place in the morning).

The place is great to hang out with friends, but not really for working.

title: Loffee Coffee & Eatery
name: Harista Sriwahyuni
text: Came on Saturday night, the place was quite full, and I enjoyed the dessert. I ordered a tahu cabe garam, but it didn't quite look like the cabe garam I know, but it was okay. The layout is a bit small, and it feels crowded and not really comfy as the seating (layout) is pretty close. However, the staff is nice.

title: Loffee Coffee & Eatery
name: Nabila Ananda
text: Good food, good ambience, has sharing portion so it's convenient for hanging out with friends and want to try korean food👍🏻

title: Loffee Coffee & Eatery
name: Shishi Paris
text:
★★★★★ | Great Food & Cozy Atmosphere!

I had a great experience at Loffee! I ordered the Nasi Ayam Kecombrang and the Platter, and both were delicious. The ayam kecombrang was fragrant and flavorful, with just the right balance of spices, while the platter had a nice variety and was perfect for sharing. The ambiance was cozy, and the service was friendly and attentive. Definitely a place worth visiting again. Highly recommended!

title: Loffee Coffee & Eatery
name: Henny K
text: Had a great experience here! Tried the aglio e olio and yangnyeom chicken and both were delicious. The service was even better, the waitress was super friendly, attentive, and made us feel really welcome. Prices were affordable and made sense for the portion and quality. Overall recommend this place!

title: Loffee Coffee & Eatery
name: Wahyu Nanda
text:
This place offers a cozy, clean, and comfortable atmosphere with a wide-ranging menu that caters to various tastes. Highlights include the flavorful kwetiau and the savory Nasi Ayam Garang Asam, complemented by refreshing drinks like the berry smoothie (still great even with less sugar) and the unique latte float with vanilla ice cream. This time i just want to taste the coffee only

While the place is so small and the prices lean a bit high, the service is solid and the food arrives promptly. It's a great spot for a relaxed meal, and with tempting options like red velvet and soya pandan drinks, bitterballen, cheese buldak, and UFO chicken, there's plenty of reason to come back and explore more.

title: Loffee Coffee & Eatery

Waktu saya pesan seperti nya dilayani oleh anak magang (baju hitam putih) dia lupa kasih saya struk pembelian. Overall dari segi makanan dan minuman ya biasa saja, tapi tempatnya sangat nyaman dan tidak ramai. Kekurangan nya disini adalah tempat parkir nya kurang, kalau bawa mobil bingung parkir dimana.

title: Loffee Coffee & Eatery
name: Zeni Lestari
text:
Korean-themed coffee shop in Tebet area. They have 2nd floor for the smoking area. Toilet are clean and comfy. Parking are limited but just enough and its pretty near from KRL station if you are a commuters.

They offer various menu from western, Indonesian, and Korean signature such as Ufo Chickin, which is suitable for group mukbang with dipping cheese sauce. Ramyeon signature is a must--try for its comforting soup and fresh vegetables.

They also offer a birthday surprise service with very affordable Korean cake and a cute design.

title: Loffee Coffee & Eatery
name: Ayu Riwandasari
text: The food was very good and tasty, also the hospitality was very great! Awesome!

title: Loffee Coffee & Eatery
name: Ada Lim
text:
A perfect place to hang out with friends! It is a beautiful cafe with equally beautiful food. The food is very tasty and meticulously thought-out by the creators to excite your taste buds! 😋

Even the modest noodle-soup had such a rich and tasty broth. And i was pleasantly surprised to find sliced mushrooms in the egg in the soup. 🍜

It was my first time eating "Kroffles" (Croffle), which was a hybrid between a croissant and a waffle. There was a cheese dip which added to the flavours.

Oh, the cheesy spicy chicken was an interesting dish. A service-staff scattered shredded cheese on top of the dish and used a blow-torch to melt the cheese just before we ate. So yummy!!

The gelatos were out of this world! I sampled a few and loved the yoghurt-blended flavor and salted-caramel.

The drink, Beauty Lady, scores with its looks and taste. The boba (pearls) were so refreshing, with two layers of 'juice'. Most others I've had before were just flour-balls. 😂 I would have had another glass if I wasn't so full!

Best of all, the prices were so affordable!! I will definitely come again on my next trip to Jakarta. ❤️

PS: For every 5-star review, you'll get a scoop of ice cream (see pic). So yeah, this is an incentive-based kinda review :)

name: hanjani
text: Suprisingly the nasi goreng kampoeng is delicious!🤤 Very recommended and cozy place to eat🫶🏻

title: Loffee Coffee & Eatery
name: Kiyomi
text:
I recently visited Loffee Coffee on the weekend. The service truly excellent —the host warmly welcomed every visitor, and the waitresses were incredibly helpful despite the busyness of the place.

However, the place was quite crowded and noisy, which made it less comfortable for relaxing or working. The Wi-Fi could also be faster, i think is place is more suited for dining rather than working.

I tried their Korean meal series, which didn’t quite meet my expectations, but the Nasi Goreng was very tasty. The coffee, while decent, could benefit from a richer and thicker flavor.

Overall, while the environment may not be ideal for working, the excellent service and tasty Nasi Goreng made my visit enjoyable. I look forward to seeing how Loffee Coffee evolves and improves in the future, XOXO :)

title: Loffee Coffee & Eatery
name: Dendy Alvian
text: The place was great for work, even though the parking space for cars was quite limited. Haven't tried out the food, but the drinks are great, especially the popcorn milk float and their signature coffee. Definitely a go to place if you are looking for a place to eat around Tebet Eco Park.

title: Ollisgud
name: Albertus Wisnu
text:

Untuk light bitesnya, saya cobain Beef Taco. Rotinya lumayan enak dan dagingnya juicy, rasa asam dari bumbu taconya bikin menu ini kerasa fresh.

Iced long blacknya enak dan cukup bold espressonya, rasa asam dari arabicanya keluar sekali.

title: Ollisgud
name: Caesarino Daneswara
text:
Daerah rawamangun emang gk bisa diem dan meresahkan, selalu aja ada cafe2 baru yang keren2👍. Salah satunya ini nih @ollisgud.
.
Seperti yang gue bilang tadi, kalau cafe ini tempatnya cukup keren. Memiliki vibes ala modern tropical plus sentuhan elemen tropical pada area outdoor membuat cafe ini terasa aesthetic. Dan cafe ini makin bagus kalau saat2 menjelang magrib, karena lampu2 di cafe ini bakal dinyalain pas mau magrib dan keliatan bagus banget pas di foto mode malem.
.
Cafe ini tempatnya gak terlalu luas tetapi cukup nyaman buat nongkrong. Dengan tanaman yang dipasang di sekeliling cafe membuat tempat ini cukup sejuk, walaupun pas siang bolong. Mungkin space antara meja dengan meja lain sedikit terlalu dempet. Dari segi kapasitas, cafe ini bisa menampung sekitar 50an customer.
.
Fasilitas cafe ini cukup lengkap, ada area parkir untuk motor✅
musholah✅
toilet bersih✅
Smoking area✅
Ruang indoor berAC✅
Wifi✅
Stop kontak✅
.
Bicara soal menu, cafe ini menyediakan aneka kopi sebagai minuman speciality mereka. Menu kopinya di sini kurang lebih sama seperti menu2 kopi di tempat lain. Selain kopi di sini ada mocktail, rootbeer, dll.
.
Untuk makanan ringan di sini ada aneka fries, pastel, bakso goreng, dll. Untuk main coursenya ada hot dog, burger, aneka pasta, quesadillas, dll.
.
Range harga makanan dan minuman di sini berkisar antara 10 ribu hingga 45 ribu rupiah. Cukup terjangkau yaa.
.
Dimsum Mentai (IDR 25k)

Menu ini terdiri dari 4 porsi dimsum mentai yang berisi ayam. Dari segi rasa sih cukup enak, isian ayamnya cukup gurih dengan texture yang soft. Kulit dimsumnya juga lembut, lalu saos mentainya juga enak, manis2 pedas dan ada asemnya sedikit. Overall untuk menu ini, GOOD!

Spaghetti Carbonara (IDR 33k)

Menu ini terdiri dari seporsi spaghetti dengan saus carbonara, dan disajikan dengan smoke beef. Dari segi rasa untuk carbonaranya sendiri cukup enak, creamy dan lumayan gurih. Kematangan pastanya juga bagus dan al dente. Smoke beefnya sedikit menambah rasa dan texture pada menu ini. Overall untuk menu ini, GOOD!

Philly Cheese Steak Hotdog (IDR 45k)

Menu ini berupa toasted bun yang disajikan dengan beef, cheese, onion dan mayonaise. Menurut gue sih seharusnya nama menu ini philly cheese steak sandwich aja, karena kalau pakai hot dog tentu harus ada sausagenya. Tetapi dari segi rasa cukup enak, beefnya sendiri cukup tasty dan gurih, kematengannya juga pas. Untuk mayonaisenya lumer banget dan dicampur dengan keju membuat menu ini jadi sangat tasty. Rotinya sendiri di toast dengan cukup baik. Overall untuk menu ini, NOT BAD!

Ice coffee Ollisgud (IDR 23k)

Klo coffee shop sore2, kayaknya gak afdol klo gak pesen es kopi susu gula arennya. Dari segi rasa es kopsus ini cukup enak dengan rasa dan aroma kopi yang masih dominan. Kemanisan dari gula arennya juga cukup pas, plus ada kental2 sedikit dari susu. Overall untuk menu ini, GOOD!

Ice coffee Alpenlibe (IDR 23k)

Menu ini juga menu es kopi susu signature di sini. Kurang lebih hampir sama dengan es kopsus tadi, hanya saja rasanya mirip kayak tiramisu. Cukup enak tapi dan manisnya juga pas. Overall untuk menu ini, GOOD.

Overall gue cukup puas dengan cafe ini. Dari segi rasa dan kualitas cukup bagus. Dari segi service juga cukup bagus, ramah dan cekatan. Next time gue pasti akan ke sini lagi.

title: Ollisgud
name: Febrianty Arum
text:

Outdoor space nya ga terlalu luas tp cantik, banyak tanaman pisang calathea, bikin tambah asri. Depan bar juga udah tersedia seating area, dan semi outdoor di sebelah nya. Varian kopi & menu disini cukup lengkap dan enak. Hanya satu yg disayangkan, area parkir nya terbatas. Tapi yg bikin gw seneng, disini tersedia musholla. Wifi nya oke lah.

title: Ollisgud
name: Della Ayu
text:
Ada lagi nih coffee shop baru di daerah Pulo Asem Rawamangun, namanya @ollisgud. Coffee shop ini masih terbilang baru karena baru beberapa bulan buka.

Letaknya ada di pinggir jalan, ini area perumahan jadi jalanannya ga begitu bising. Dari depan kelihatannya kecil, tapi lumayan spacious juga dalamnya. Ada beberapa area, outdoor depan, indoor dan semi outdoor di belakang. Konsepnya tropical, aku suka konsep apapun yang banyak tanamannya🤣

Untuk menu juga beragam, ada makanan berat juga. Aku kesini cuma sebentar aja, jadi cuma pesan mocktailnya rasanya oke kok.

Buat wfc juga enak, banyak colokan dan ada kamar mandinya juga.

title: Ollisgud
name: Ali Aulia Rahman
text:
Kopi hidden gem di daerah Pulo Gadung!

Lokasinya berada di area perumahan namun masih dekat dengan jalan raya, tidak jauh dari Stadium Velodrome

Cantik dan kekinian adalah kata yang pas untuk menggambarkan Ollisgud. Dari luar kita akan disambut area duduk nan hijau dengan alas kerikil kecil yang berpadu apik dengan tanaman di sekitarnya. Ngopi sambil kerja disini boleh juga nih!

Didalamnya juga ada area duduk yang berhadapan dengan meja barista dan kasir. Tidak terlalu lapang memang, tapi semua orang dijamin bisa duduk dengan nyaman. Say no untuk ngopi aja harus antri dan kebingungan nyari tempat duduk

Tersedia banyak pilihan makanan dan minuman dengan harga yang juga affordable! Yang di daerah Jaktim kalo udah gak ada ide mau kemana, Ollisgud recommended loh untuk dicoba

Burger 👍

title: Ollisgud
name: Hieronimus Adiyoga
text:
Satu hal yang langsung terbersit ketika ke sini, parkirannya gak oke banget. Apalagi kalau bawa mobil. Saran saya, naik motor saja kalau ke sini.

Ketika masuk ke dalam, ada 3 kompartemen berbeda utk pengunjung: outdoor luar, indoor, dan outdoor dalam yang sepertinya tertutup kanopi. Kelihatannya di bagian outdoor luar didesain utk menampung jauh lebih banyak orang dibandingkan kompartemen lainnya, jadi kalau rame most likely tempat yang kosong cuma di outdoor luar. Tapi jangan khawatir, karena atmosfer, kerindangan, ketersediaan outdoor luar sudah cukup baik. Setidaknya buat menikmati kopi di sore hari.

Tadi mencoba americano dingin, agak bingung kenapa kopinya gak diisi sampai full gelas. Secara rasa agak kurang terasa kopinya, sedikit encer gitu sensasinya. Kebetulan karena buru-buru hanya coba 1 menu di sini. Semoga lain kali bisa mampir dan mencoba menu signaturenya.

text:

title: Lekker Dan Kopi By Lekker Story Rawamangun
name: Ary Putra
text:
Datang di sabtu pagi jam 8an. Untuk makanan berat belum ready, baru ready jam 9an. Untuk lekkernya memang enak dan toppingnya nggak pelit. Setelah makanan berat ready, order mie goreng ayam, rasanya juga cukup enak. Rasanya dominan manis ke gurih. Yang agak bikin ngga sreg adalah sendok garpunya berminyak saat saya pegang.

Untuk area diningnya, saya di area ber AC. Ukurannya ga terlalu besar,  ga ada colokan samsek dan agak bau makanan karena seruangan dengan tempat bikin lekker. Untuk area non AC ukurannya lebih besar dan ada colokan. Yang agak heran adalah, datang pagi2 dan masih sepi (saya pengunjung ke 2) tapi di lantai ada sampah tissue, struck invoice, bahkan ada uang 2ribuan.. meja ada bekas air dan remah2 lekker.

Definitely kebersihannya perlu ditingkatkan. Untuk parkir mobil agak sulit, di pinggir jalan. Masih berminat balik untuk take away lekkernya, not for dine in.

title: Lekker Dan Kopi By Lekker Story Rawamangun
name: Andres Sondang
text:
Sangat tidak worth it!
Saya datang sekitar jam 20.50 dan memesan lekker 5 pcs, 2 minuman, dan nasi goreng bakso sosis. Setelah pesan, saya langsung mencari tempat duduk sambil menunggu. Hampir setengah jam menunggu, pesanan belum juga datang.

Sekitar jam 21.20, salah satu crew datang memberi tahu bahwa nasi goreng bakso sosis habis, hanya tersisa nasi goreng biasa. Oke, saya terima. Tidak lama kemudian, lekker dan minuman datang, tapi makanan utama belum juga muncul.

Setelah menunggu lagi sekitar 15 menit, barulah jam 21.47 makanan datang padahal minuman sudah hampir habis. Lebih parahnya lagi, nasi gorengnya dingin, tidak hangat sama sekali, dan tidak ada sayuran seperti sawi. Rasanya seperti makanan yang sudah lama dimasak.

Yang paling mengecewakan, saat kami baru makan sekitar 5 suap, crew sudah memberi tahu bahwa mereka akan tutup jam 22.00.
Dari segi rasa dan pelayanan, saya kasih nilai 4,5/10.

Sangat disayangkan, padahal ekspektasi saya cukup tinggi.

The croffle are good, just a nice balance of buttery and crispiness of the pastry. I came here thinking the croffle on the money are a bit tired since so many put it on the menu, but Loffee make a good croffle.
The service are excellent, the cleanliness are worth a praise. Will come here again for sure.

text: Dari pertama dateng, sama tukang parkir langsung di tolak karna pake mobil. katanya ga ada buat parkiran mobil tp dengan nada yg ngeselin. boleh terserah ibu parkir dimana asal jangan depan pintu rumah orang. oke kita coba parkir agak jauh karna emg penasaran udah 2 x kesana tp ga jadi. akhirnya tetep coba. pas masuk, tidak ada sambutan dr staff disana. padahal di pintu ada staffnya, dikasir pun ada. sampe ke meja pun ga ada yg samperin. please orang baru itu perlu tau juga ordernya langsung ke kasir kah, apa disamper ke meja dikasih menu, atau lewat barcode di meja. akhirnya kita ke kasir buat order. padahal untuk harga yang murah dan lumayan enak untuk minumannya, tp kalo udah bad service jadi kureeeeeng. sangat disayangkan. harus di perbaiki lagi untuk service nya, dan juga tukang parkirnya minimal ada kata mohon maaf disini parkir mobil tidak ada.

title: Lekker Dan Kopi By Lekker Story Rawamangun
name: George Alvino Putra Saddam
text:
Gak sengaja lewat sini, coba melipir untuk nyoba. Untuk tempat sih lumayan asyik ya. Ada space indoor AC dan outdoor non AC. Space outdoor lebih luas. Indoornya ada 4-5 meja yg cukup untuk belasan orang, sedangkan outdoor bisa 2x lipat lebih daya tampungnya.

Untuk produk lekkernya enak, topping lumayan tebal dan tekstur crunchy-nya juga oke. Sayangnya untuk kopi susu arennya, saya kurang suka. Tekstur arennya sangat kental, sehingga susah diaduk atau dishake, jadi ga ngblend sempurna. Kopinya juga kurang bold dan tekstur keseluruhan kurang creamy. Untuk nasi goreng standard, tapi masih okay. Teh manis disini rasanya khas teh solo, enak. Porsi juga jumbo.

Pelayanan sih cukup ramah. Crew enak diajak ngobrol. Sayangnya, penyajiannya saya rasa cukup lama. Untuk orderan saya tsb, rasa2nya lebih dr 20menit.

Oh ya, tempatnya sepertinya nyaman untuk wfa. Ada WiFi, colokan dan tempat yg adem. Tambahan lagi, disini pet allowed, makanya cukup kaget pas masuk ada anjing. Tapi ada syarat2nya, semisal harus dipopokin untuk pet-nya, jd insyaAllah ga gtu ganggu.

lekker keju susu & lekker blueberry : 5k & 4k (maaf td lekker nya ga ke foto)

Untuk kopi susu aren nya standard lah dengan harga 19k yang paling enak memang di lekker nya keju susu walaupun 5k keju nya emang berasa di tenggorokan bukan keju yg murahan dan skm nya juga bukan yg murahan ga buat gatel tenggorokan sama yg rasa blueberry pun selainya bukan yang buat tenggorokan gatel. Ambience nya ramai banyak mahasiswa ataupun pelajar yang nongkrong jadi kalo untuk kerja online atau study online si menurut saya kurang pas dengan banyaknya customers jadi ya kalo sekedar nongkrong bareng sih masih okeeehh kokk…

title: Loffee Coffee & Eatery
name: Yulissani Hakima
text: I have visited Loffee Coffee & Eatery Tebet many times since its first opening. For me personally, their dishes are mostly top-notch. They have three types of dishes: Korean, Western, and Indonesian, but their specialities are Korean and Indonesian dishes. I have tried most of their pastas such as penne bolognese, Fettuccine Carbonara, and Spaghetti Aglio e Olio, and I personally felt that they are pretty much close to the authentic flavours, and their pasta is perfect al dente! Their Korean dishes, such as the Sundubu Jigae and Kimchi Bokkeum-bap flavours, are just on point, pretty much close to the authentic flavours as well. What amazes me more is the authentic flavour of their Indonesian dishes, are absolutely on point as well! Especially the Chicken Garang Asam, OMG, such a major comfort food for me. Chicken Garang Asam is a bit similar to Korean Chicken Samgyetang but more sour and tangy, which comes from the green tomato, billimbi and lime leaves. Their gelato is not that sweet, so it's totally fine for me. To me personally, they really set the bar for their dish quality pretty high, and overall totally worth the price. Would definitely come back as a regular!

Disini ada pembagian ruangan smoking dan non smoking, dan semuanya indoor. Ukurannya  pas aja sih, ngga terlalu kecil dan ngga juga luas.

title: DeLoRet Cafe & Resto
name: septiano pratama
text: The new cafe & bar at south jakarta. They just did the soft opening march. The place was so big with the outdoor concept and implementing the social distance protocol. For the food, the taste just standard, i tried their snacks (tofu salted egg) was nice but the main course (beef teriyaki) and burger (beef slider) were below expectation. I didn't like their bread. Their strength was they had a friendly and good staff. They were so polite.

title: DeLoRet Cafe & Resto
name: Rendra Bhatara
text:
When I visited, there were no other guests besides those at my table. I only ordered snacks such as Pisang Goreng, Crispy Fried Enoki, and Nachos. The taste? Not bad. The service is also very standard. Nothing special.
From the atmosphere, I think this place will feel more "alive" at night.

I couldn't take any photos because it was raining quiet heavily.

title: DeLoRet Cafe & Resto
name: Eto Young
text:
Open space cafe and have so many wastafel for customer to wash hand.

Has bicycle parking

Area is green and the capacity may be maximum 80 person
You could held a party as well in here.

Tried the breakfast menu
For beef and cheese sandwich with dragon fruit juice ..

At the first i thought the taste will be mediocre
But when i tried the sandwich, oh its perfectly fit with the salad dressing..

So i think its has its quality and good taste.

Next time will come in the noon or afternoon to enjoy the other menu.

title: DeLoRet Cafe & Resto
name: nadhilah shabrina (dila)
text:
i was having iftar with d day reservation and turned out got a space for 11 people and i was shock haha.

recommend u to book a place d-3 i think the best. the space for 11 people was not the best one cause they were like force us in a small space I can say, I think there were 4/5 rounded tables back then and too tight for each other.

the foods were so-so and a bit pricey. the best one i could say beef pesto and fettucini carbonara w truffle oil.

total for 11 people with only 4beverages = 1,2mio~

name: JL
text: Hygiene is a big problem here. The table was not cleaned properly. The cup they served me had lipstick stain on it... They changed it without questions which was good. The food was half good, half bad. The carbonara spaghetti was tasty. The chicken Caesar salad had way too much sauce on it. The mocktail had a nice look but bad taste. Note that the outdoor place opens at 4PM. Without the view, I think this will be the first and last visit of this place

title: DeLoRet Cafe & Resto
name: cipput
text:
I forget to take any picture but I went there for lunch at the weekend to meet my best friends.
The Indoor area are still under construction. So the only choice we had is just outdoor. Our table is right under the tree with no roof.
Well, it's not a sunny day, soon the weather start little bit gloomy.. After we finish our meal, the rain start pouring. (Yeay)
So the staff (they are very helpful. Thank God) helping us to moved to the place with roof. And we choose the lowest place in area, the tent like, because all the table fully occupied. It's still hot, though the rain drizzling outside.
About the food, me and my friends choose mix grill. Our steaks were dry, but the seasoning is fine. I must say the veg are the real star here, so delicious. My mashed potato looks and taste just perfect. The size were great, let's just say my tummy are very happy when we checked out.

Ah! This might helpful, from the bills i notice that they didn't charge the ice cube we ask.

text: The place is ok  but apologize the food is non satisfying..I had the dori colo colo..kind of fried batteres fish served with dabu dabu sambal. The fish was not cooked properly, it was undercooked. Its golden brown but the inside was still raw..needs to pay more attention for the food..

title: DeLoRet Cafe & Resto
name: Eve
text: We went here today, 1 of June 2021 (holiday) . The place was fully booked/reserved, although their instagram account said it is not possible to reserve on public holiday. The waitress couldn't explain why it could happen. There was an empty spot that nobody wants because super cold (right in front of the standing AC) and another spot right in front of the toilet (disgusting, how you put a table in front of the toilet where you can see inside the toilet). We asked the waiter and waitress to move the table to an empty ground, they couldn't decide to do it. No manager on duty and the waiter/waitresses don't seem to have their brains. So decided to leave and eat at our favorite restaurant c*t&gr*ll where the service is excellent. This was my first time and last time here. You just lost a customer with your terrible service. Next..

title: DeLoRet Cafe & Resto
name: The Life of Nomads
text:
The food at Deloret is actually okay and the menu offers a variety of dishes. The place is actually huge with a hidden outdoor area far from the main road. However, with the outdoors comes the smokers as most places in Indonesia does. Deloret is decorated in such a way to maximize the use of space, not design.
During the day it gets very hot and theres not really any shady areas.

title: DeLoRet Cafe & Resto
name: Fatih Alaydrus
text: Such a great place to hang out. The FnBs are great. On my last visit, I had to wait a long time for my orders (it could be because of the high occupancy). Too bad the outdoor and garden area had lots of mosquitos that we had to move to the balcony (it looked like a VIP area with sofas). Must visit for everyone living or visiting the Cipete area.

title: DeLoRet Cafe & Resto
name: Jimmy Kosikin
text:
If you go here, sit outdoors ok !
Indoor is just ok, outdoor is great..and more seats in outdoor.  Because it's hot in the day, so best time to go here is after 3 pm.
It has lots of parking space for cars.  The musholla is clean and spacious (good for 7 people).
The food & drinks are just ok..and a bit expensive.

title: DeLoRet Cafe & Resto
name: Evi Hari W
text: The Resto is spacious and very open (open air area), however the cost of the food is expensive. We ordered ice americano, kopi susu gula Aren and ice chocolate. All the drinks are very standard, even compared with other 'kopi susu kekinian', the taste is very bad. I can have better ice americano at home 😅.

name: Johanes Jenito
text: A nice place to meeting up with the disability persons in Depok Area. First time when I was her, I was surprised. Most of the officers are disable persons. Fortunately I met the owner. He explained many things about this place. Then I was very comfortable around them & happily well understand on their willingness to communicate with the "normal" persons, like me. I'm very pleased to see this cafe. I'll be back someday!

text: Great coffee cafe. Good coffee,cozy place,and unique,but they don't serve food for temporary. Even though the barista,waitress and staff are deaf like it's name,Kopi Tuli, They serve customers the best and understand what you order.

title: Kopi Tuli (KOPTUL)
name: Anggel Liza Kusmia
text:
Calming vibe, because you won't be disturbed by noises people makes, the customers are somehow 'understand' that you are not supposed to be noisy nor laughing nor chatting loudly like what you normally do in a common coffee shop.
It's so calming there, they don't play any music, you can enjoy your quality time comfortably.
It's highly recommended for people who want to be alone, or enjoying leisure time calmly without any disturbances.
The coffees and the danishes are good👍👍

title: Kopi Tuli (KOPTUL)
name: Hana Fadhilah
text:
Coffee was good! It's really quite place.
Also in this place you can see "another world". As its named, Kopi Tuli (deaf), employee and most of visitor are coming from their community. You can see how they can enjoy their saturday night, laugh on the same thing, and also provide the best coffee. Sometime the barista also teach you their languange and they are very kind person💕

Untuk menu cukup lengkap, saya pesam hot Cappuccino dengan beans houseblends Toraja - Gayo dengan taste light, creamy and nutty.
Overall, coffeeshop cakep di area Jak Pus yang bisa jadi referensi tempat nongkrong.

Mulai dari membaca gerak tangan berdasarkan abjad hingga merangkainya dalam suatu kata hingga kalimat.  KoptuL menjadi saLah satu contoh keciL yang mematahkan stigma negatif di kalangan masyarakat terhadap penyandang disabilitas. Kafe ini juga membuktikan kaum disabilitas memiliki semangat dan daya saing kompetensi yang tinggi di dunia kerja.

title: Kopi Tuli (KOPTUL)
name: Sephy noerfahmy
text: Tenang, beda, simpel. Tiga kata tadi bisa wakilin suasana di tempat ini waktu pertama kali dateng. KOPTUL (Kopi Tuli), Iya, Tuli atau difabel rungu... Pelayannya Tuli tapi penikmat minumannya bervariasi. Suasana tenang yang teresonansi waktu masuk, kebetulan baru kami berdua dan 4 orang difabel rungu, termasuk pelayannya, tapi suasananya sama aja kayak warung kopi biasa kok. Pas masuk pintu warung ini kepala langsung kepikiran, gimana pesennya ya? Ternyata sama aja seperti kita pesen biasa, cuma temen-temen difabel rungu yang ngelayanin, mereka langsung nunjukin menu, kita tinggal tunjuk, dan langsung dibuatin. Mereka juga sudah terbiasa membaca bibir jadi gampang kalo pesen. Minumannya cuma 9 macam dan ada gambarnya, rasa kopinya ga kalah sama yang biasa, dan harganya bersahabat. Mereka ada juga bisa dipesan lewat aplikasi ojek online ya. Tapi untuk bisa memaknai 3 kata pembuka saya, lebih baik datang langsung.

title: Kopi Tuli (KOPTUL)
name: Muhammad Fajrussalaam
text: Cafe yang dibangun oleh 3 orang teman tuli akibat ditolak bekerja lebih dari ratusan perusahaan. Kopi tuli menjadi tempat nongkrong yg nyaman karena menjembatani komunikasi teman dengar dan teman tuli. Tanpa adanya wifi, tempat ini menjadi gadhet detox juga mengutamakan interaksi. Pelayanan yg ramah serta kopi yg nikmat menjadi hal yg utama. Kita dapat memesan kopi dengan beragam varian rasa yg unik, jika tidak bisa berbahasa isyaray bisa menulis atau menunjuk langsung pada menu. Bahkan jika berkeinginan untuk belajar bahasa isyaray dasar, dengan senang hati tim dari.kopi tuli akan mengajarkan. Harga disini bersahabat, nyaman dan nikmat. Selamat berkunjung :)

title: Kopi Tuli (KOPTUL)

Dan disana kita bisa suasana berbeda karena kita bisa belajar bahasa isyarat dengan teman-teman tuli.

title: Padu Padan Coffee & Eatery
name: Muhammad Rahim Wasesa
text: Honestly, I never expected to experience this delicious Magic (so far), as I'm a fan of exotic flavors, able to taste the sweet yet strong aromas of fruit. It's no wonder the combination of West Java and Aceh complement each other perfectly. I'm not discouraged from visiting this coffee shop, and I'm sure there's still much to enjoy and explore.

title: Padu Padan Coffee & Eatery
name: Desi Daily
text:
Padu Padan Coffee in East Jakarta is such a cozy spot! I ordered a latte, matcha, and their burnt cheesecake—all three were excellent. The latte was smooth and well-balanced, the matcha had just the right earthiness, and the burnt cheesecake was creamy and delicious, perfect to pair with the drinks. The place has a warm, welcoming vibe, great for hanging out or just relaxing.
The only downside was the service; I had to wait almost 30 minutes just for a latte and cake. Still, once everything arrived, it was enjoyable, and the atmosphere made it worth the visit.

title: Padu Padan Coffee & Eatery
name: Gak Punya Email
text:
I LOVE THIS PLACE!!!
Mostly because the barista and server are soooo nice. I ordered Chicken Aglio e Olio and when i asked them (bcs it took so long), they gave me a complementary chips!!!
And the barista? He's so nice. He gave me a lot of coffee recommendation but still let me choose what kind of coffee that i want.
The food is good (just a little bit berminyak aja sih) tapi overall okelah.
Minusnya? Parkir mobil yg agak susah (ada kang parkir but still i end up parking on the side of the road)
But still i recommend this place to you who love coffee and good service

title: Padu Padan Coffee & Eatery
name: Nadrah Nizom
text:
I came here with a friend to wfc. I recommend this place for wfc. It was quite spacious, they have several tables inside. Although the parking lot was limited.

I was kinda excited when i see they have a variety of matcha menu. I tried matcha berry and it was good. The owner said that they used ceremonial grade matcha which is awesome. But i wish they could make it a little bit larger, compared to the price and the size, it was a lil bit pricy.

My friend tried coffee latte and she liked it. We also ordered fries and we loved it, although it was too thin. We even reordered the fries.

The service was nice, the barista was friendly and polite. Consider to go back again.

title: Padu Padan Coffee & Eatery
name: Oliver
text:
Quite possibly the friendliest and most welcoming café I’ve visited in Jakarta.
Stepping inside, you’re instantly transported to the friendly laid-back charm of Jogja — a mix of good coffee, cozy atmosphere, welcoming staff and ‘civilized’ guests — something hard to find elsewhere in Jakarta. What truly sets this little cafe apart though are the incredibly kind and engaging baristas, who genuinely enjoy connecting with guests! A true hidden gem in Jaktim!

title: Padu Padan Coffee & Eatery
name: Narsika R
text:
They don't have a parking area for cars but  for bikes. The place is not that big but comfy, clean & bright enough. Went here on Satnite and it was not too crowded.

The table : pls make it more spacious with the table arrangements bcs when it comes with seating for dine in, it feels so tight from one table to another.

The food: we tried spaghetti mushroom carbonara, custard toast, choco & cheese toast, chicken butter milk rice, french fries.
Those were wonderful, ngl all of them were delicious! But the portion is small compared with the price.

The beverages: we tried cappucino (the cup is not big as in usual cafes, it's in the piccolo portion cup), caramel macchiato (delish! Rather similar taste with s*ux), hot chocolate & paduan milky (shake milk)
The caramel macchiato is not too sweet which I like.

The service : great & friendly enough! I think using "kak" is a common saying rather than "om" or " bu". I hope you guys don't mind saying "kak" to all the customers despite they bring their kids, cz we still want to be young 🤭

The experience: there's a coffee sniffing on the counter. My kids definitely love that experience.

Def will come back again!

text:
Padu Padan is truly a great hangout spot! Its location near ITBU makes it a favorite among students. The atmosphere is cozy, perfect for hanging out with friends or just some me-time. The modern and aesthetic interior makes you want to stay longer while enjoying coffee or working on assignments.

They offer a wide variety of menu options, from specialty coffee to tasty snacks, all with satisfying flavors and affordable prices. The service is friendly and quick, so you feel welcomed from the moment you arrive. There are both indoor and outdoor seating options, so you can choose the spot that matches your mood.

Padu Padan is highly recommended for anyone looking for a chill spot around campus. Definitely a place you’ll keep coming back to!

title: Eidos Coffee & Eatery
name: nurman amirudin
text:
Eidos Coffee & Eatery is a delightful find tucked away on Jl. Manggarai Selatan 1 No.25, not far from Pasar Bulit Duri. This cozy café, which recently moved from Jl. Tebet Raya, is super easy to spot and offers a peaceful escape from the hustle and bustle of the city.

As soon as you step inside, you’re enveloped by a warm and inviting atmosphere that feels like home. The place is filled with lush plants that create a refreshing vibe, reminiscent of spending time at your grandmother’s house. It’s the kind of spot where you can easily settle in, lose track of time, and indulge in some nostalgia while enjoying a good cup of coffee.

The café features a stylish design with a striking mix of white and black, complemented by fun graffiti art on the walls that adds a quirky touch. Every corner has its own charm, making it a great place for both quiet reflection and lively chats with friends.

The menu is impressively varied, offering a nice selection of coffee and light snacks, mainly focusing on potato-based treats. I was thrilled to discover that the coffee is just as good as it was before the move. My cup was rich and flavorful, perfectly paired with the cozy ambiance.

One thing to keep in mind is that the parking space is a bit limited, so it might be a challenge if you’re driving. There’s only room for a few cars and motorcycles, but honestly, the inviting atmosphere and quality of the food and drinks make it worth the visit.

Overall, Eidos Coffee & Eatery is a hidden gem that combines comfort, great coffee, and a touch of nostalgia. Whether you’re looking for a quiet place to read, catch up with friends, or just enjoy a delicious cup of coffee, Eidos is definitely worth checking out. You’ll find yourself wanting to linger a little longer, soaking in the cozy vibes and tasty treats.
