title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Dito Tunjung
text:
Absolutely hidden gem

The atmosphere is very calm, comfortable, and green for a location in the middle of the city that is very easily accessible. It provides an opportunity for a short escape from the busy city atmosphere. It is full of decorations and plants that give it a village-like ambiance.

There is an indoor room and a semi-outdoor room (no smoking).

The food and drinks are quite okay, with a decent matcha. The price is still reasonable for such a mid-city location.

Highly recommended

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: lutfia februarisa
text:
visiting this place for the third time and im always amazed by their services and beverages! the waiters were very friendly and helpful and the beverages were legit! i really love the vibes, so calming and smoke-free too. definitely i’ll be back!

(ps. there’s non-matcha menus too)

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Aptu Dika
text: Almost too comfortable to do some work, some rooms have very dim lighting, very well decorated. For those who are unfamiliar with matcha, the ordering process is not intimidating. Anyway, nice drink.

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Elisabeth Mirna
text:
Really enjoyed my time here. The matcha was great, and I loved the ambience!

Lots of greenery, which instantly made the place feel calming and cozy (I’m a plant person, so that was a big plus)

The space is uniquely aesthetic but still comfortable. Would come back for a date night!!

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Aurel
text:
For the overall experience, it’s a very nice place to hangout or wfc
But be prepared to come early before lunch hour if you want to get a seat (after lunch hours it’s usually full seat and only accept take away)

The ceremonial matcha is very creamy, umami.
If you want sth refreshing, try their matcha lychee, it’s also good.
Ordered the chicken miso rice bowl as well, the portion and taste didn’t disappoint.

Price wise, is standard for cafe in jaksel with such atmosphere and service.

Very recommended if you want to try a good ceremonial matcha and a cafe with such green garden view in the mid of jkt.

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: WA -
text: The café was super cute (Instagram-worthy for sure ✨), but the Matcha No. 75 didn’t really impress me—just okay. Pro tip: don’t go on weekends or during peak hours unless you enjoy traffic jams, zero parking, and starring in the “long waiting list” saga. 😅 Also, the humidity? Brutal 🫣🫣. It was basically a free sauna session—sweaty armpits and sweaty seat included. 💦

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: wiwi
text: The place is beautiful and comfortable. The first smoke-free cafe in Jakarta, the food is delicious, and the staff is friendly. Thank you Hakkon Cafe for the fast-breaking event😍

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: nina fajariyah
text: Very beautiful place, Not only served delicious food and drinks, but the work of the maestro ceramic artist f. Widiyanto.  is in an art gallery, even the floor is made very artistic

title: Gincha Matcha House
name: Christine xtienz
text:
- Matcha roll cake nya enak, rasanya pas. Tidak terlalu manis.
- Matcha chizu cake nya jg enak, agak manis sih. Tp enak kok.

Matcha latte (meiko) oke.
Hojicha latte (less sweet), best sih ini. Pas bgt sih rasanya.

title: Gincha Matcha House
name: Megan Prime
text: Matcha nya enak, harga affordable and easy access dari metro park apartment, banyak pilihan menu minuman and different matcha types. Cobain aja, owner nya ramah banget 🥳

title: Gincha Matcha House
name: Shitoch. Armandho
text: Lumayan enak, matcha rollnya suka ga terlalu manis. Suasana juga cukup cozy

title: Gincha Matcha House
name: Larissa Yuanita
text: Nice place for work from cafe. Tempatnya tenang, chill, super pewe. Colokan juga amaan. Disini mnurutku matchanya juga enak. Slalu klasik sih pesan matcha latte, tapi kali ini cobain yang pake yuzuuu. Trnyata combinationnya enak juga ada a bit sour jadi seger

title: Gincha Matcha House
name: Ijmalistiqlaliah Rahim
text: Kafe khas Jepang dengan spesialisasi Matcha. Sempat nyobain strawberry short cake dan rasanya enak, ada rasa kayak cake klasik (?). Matchanya juga enak. Boleh banget kesini kalau pengen nyobain kafe dengan nuansa jejepangan

title: Gincha Matcha House
name: Widi Widia
text:
Nemu tempat nongkrong baruuuu~
Baru opening banget sih kalau diliat dari banyak buket ucapan yang nangkring depan pintunya.

Untuk harga standar lah kek rata2 coffee shop, bedanya ini matcha. Sebenarnya aku bukan pecinta matcha, tapi mencoba suka aja karena lagi explore buat menu kue baru yang mau kujual wkwkwk

Aku bingung kan mau beli apa, akhirnya beli yang direkomen mbaknya aja, si matchanya ada yang tipe meiko (lebih ke ringan gurih) dan yang haru (lebih pahit). Dan ketololan pertama aku adalah meminta less sugar seperti aku biasanya pesan minum, sebelum diaduk emang gurih, setelah diaduk sjrhisnsusnaisdveueywjab pahit njirrrr. Ya emang basicnya aku ga doyan matcha :"") terus nyoba yang haru, ya sama pahit cuma kek ada aroma gosong(?) ga ngerti lah aku mah. Abis tu aku pesen matcha chizu, etdah ya manis bener, butuh usaha ekstra buat ngabisinnya.

Disini banyak varian minuman matcha yang lucu2, ya kalau nanti sempet kesini lagi deh.

title: Gincha Matcha House
name: Gabriella Daviena
text:
Love the ambience! Cocon buat ngobrol sama teman2. Makanannya juga enak, buat pecinta matcha wajib banget kesini!
Ada 2 pilihan matcha, duaduanya enak tergantung lebih suka yang dominan gurih atau bitter. Dessertnya banyak, ada yang basenya matcha dan yang non-matcha🍰
Wajib cobain matchamisu, enak banget💞

title: Gincha Matcha House
name: Nadya Abigail
text:
One of my favorite cafes di Jakarta⭐️⭐️⭐️
As matcha lovers, gincha juara sihh baik dari minuman dan juga dessert2 nya🍵🍵

Secara harga cukup pricey, tapi sesuai dengan kualitas yang ditawarkan utk makanan dan minumannya👍🏻

Tempatnya juga nyaman sekali utk WFC: wifi cepat, colokan banyak, dan lagunya tdk berisik (ini personal preference sih😅)

Overall, gincha pokoknya my go to place kalau lg craving some good matcha dan kalau lg ingin WFC juga sih🙌🏻💯

title: Gincha Matcha House
name: Aura Ginta
text: love the ambience in here! tempatnya memang tidak begitu besar tapi tetap comfy. suka cake nya aku beli matcha roll cake, enak ga begitu manis & eneg. minumannya meiko umami juga enak

title: Gincha Matcha House
name: C K
text:
Tempatnya gak gitu gede tapi nyaman. Suasananya homey dengan alunan lagu dan difusser.

Matchanya ada berbagai level. Buat yang gak suka pahit ada pilihan lain.

Tempatnya bersih dan staffnya baik dan bisa kasih rekomendasi.

Cakenya enak. Gak terlalu manis.

Kalau kamu suka matcha, this place is for you

title: Gincha Matcha House
name: Charlie Sanjaya
text:
Salah satu matcha terbaik yang pernah saya minum. Rasa matchanya serius, bisa stand out di antara susu dan gula. Ada di level berbeda lah dengan matcha latte di kafe pada umumnya.

Mereka punya opsi matcha Haru dan Meiko, Haru yang rasanya pahit dan Meiko yang rasanya 'umami'. Saranku sih buat yang baru mendingan pesan yang Haru, rasa pahit matcha ketemu gula dan susu ga bakal terlalu asing di lidah. Meiko lebih ke acquired taste sih, bakal serasa beda dengan matcha biasanya.

Saya juga sempet coba matcha roll mereka. Bagian kuenya enak, teksturnya saya suka. Tapi krimnya menurut saya kebanyakan, buat saya jatuhnya jadi ga enak. Terlalu heavy.

Pelayanannya selalu bagus sih, ga ada kesalahan sama sekali. Ramah dan cepat.

Atmosfer kafenya enak, vibenya nyantai. Enak untuk dipakai kerja sendiri atau ngobrol sama teman. Overall, a really good place to hang around.

title: Gincha Matcha House
name: Rin Rin
text:
Penasaran bgt mau kesini karna tiap cek g*ab cari matcha, Gincha jd opsi teratas
cek di gmaps ternyata dkt sm klinik sendiri dan liat review nya bagus"
Dadakan kelar shift dtg kesini 6 org, bit crowd si krna ga kebagian tmpt ukuran 6 org dgn opsi yg cantik, dpt di pojokan dkt cermin bulet but it's okay karna tiap sudut vibe nya tetap terasa nyaman (ngincer yg dkt bonsai nya padahal haha 😆)

Order Haru dgn less sugar dan Double matcha mille crepes
surprisingly good, buat penikmat matcha menurut sy ini enak, pahit manis nya tuh uwwiiiii... tiap gigitan mille crepes nya mantulll 🤤
nyicip punya tmn pesen meiko dan matchamisu nya juga enak gurih manis dan soft 💕

bbrp tmn penikmat kopi  pesimis, krna disini spesialis nya olahan matcha, so mereka order yg pasti" aja, kopi matcha (cmiiw, lupa nama di menu nya)
dan menurut mereka juga enak, pdhl ga terlalu berharap gimana"

Will be back for sure tp bakal berdua atau sendiri aja haha
kalo ramean agak kurang nyaman, dan takut ganggu customer lain (本当にごめんなさい 🙇🏻‍♀️)

ps. Cup nya sayang bgt gada logo pas kita kesana
jd pas foto" berasa ada yg kurang huhu 😢

title: Gincha Matcha House
name: Ceacilia Putri
text:
Matcha lattenya lumayan enak, nyaman untuk kerja, lokasi di dalam apartemen.
Suara musik jepangnya sempat kencang sekalii tapi aku minta tolong untuk dikecilkan sedikit suara musiknya dan kakaknya bantu untuk dikecilkan🙏🏻 terima kasih!

title: Gincha Matcha House
name: Bintang Akbar Maulana
text:
Pelayanan yang ramah dan cepat, memberikan rekomendasi pada pilihan menu. Proses pembuatan matchanya juga benar, bukan yang cuma sekedar bubuk diaduk saja.
Ambiencenya bagus dan cocok untuk work from cafe atau sekedar duduk duduk nongkrong saja.
Harga sesuai dengan produk yang ditawarkan, jadi amat sangat worth to buy dan definitely come back again.

title: Gincha Matcha House
name: Hilda alviana
text:
tempt nya ambience tenang bgt
saya bukan pecinta matcha tapi disini minuman matcha dan cake nya rekomend 👍 😻🫶
pelayanan sangat ramah dan wellcome ✨
range harga mulai dari 38k

title: Gincha Matcha House
name: Aletheia Hardiman
text: Cafe Matcha dengan suasana zen. Pilihan minuman dan kuenya banyak dan enak-enak. Staff sangat ramah dan bersemangat. Tempatnya bersih, cozy dan tenang. Suka sama pilihan musiknya yang hiphop lofi, jadi bikin rileks. Lokasi di apartemen Metro Park, sangat terjangkau dari lobi.

title: Gincha Matcha House
name: Nia Killa
text:
Aku suka semuanya,,
Tempatnya, minumannya, cakenya..
Rasa matchannya suka..
Untuk tempat nongkrong, ngemil cantik buat pecinta matcha bisa cobain,,
Tempatnya tidak terlalu besar..

title: Gincha Matcha House
name: heri santo
text: Tempat lumayan luas.. untuk hojicha latte nya enak.. sedangkan cake nya yg double matcha ogura roll kurang enak mnrt lidah saya.. pas saya datang ruangan nya jg panas..

title: Gincha Matcha House
name: Yoberta
text:
Lokasinya di Apartemen Metro Park, langsung kelihatan kok, agak nyerong dikit.
Tempatnya cozy banget, buat temu kangen sama sahabat, duduk bersama pacar/suami/istri/gebetan/ortu/anak/rekan kerja.

Untuk menunya aku pesan Meiku Matcha Latte dan Matcha Swiss Roll, uenaaaak😯👍🏻

Wajib datang ke sini dan nyobain menunya!

Ohya btw sebelumnya namanya Furu dan sekarang berubah jadi Gincha✨️

title: Gincha Matcha House
name: Maefina
text:
Menurut gw taronya kurang manis.
Matcha nya ke arah matcha beneran, bukan yg rasa rasa doang.
Suasananya tenang & nyaman. Cocok utk wfc

title: Gincha Matcha House
name: Hanifah Baihaqi
text: Cocok buat exprience jenis matcha, cocok buat nongkrong bersama teman-teman. Buat WFH di sini juga cocok, tempatnya tidak terlalu rame dan tenang.

title: Gincha Matcha House
name: Theresia
text:
Tidak banyak matcha house yang bagus di Jakarta dan sekitarnya. Yang ada franchisenya di mall2, kualitasnya jelek. Nah, Gincha ini salah satu yang kualitasnya bagus dan memang spesialisasi di matcha, wajib dikunjungi para pencinta matcha di Jakarta.

PS: Saat ini belum pernah ada matcha latte enak di tempat kopi, dijamin kecewa.

title: Gincha Matcha House
name: Isnaini Pratiwiningrum
text: Tempat makan minum matcha yang enak banget 🫶🫶🫶 meiko matcha latte nya enak, mille crepes nya enak, matchamisu juga enak, tempatnya juga nyaman enak buat wfc, tapi gaada fasilitas toilet atau musholla di dalem cafe nya yak...

title: Gincha Matcha House
name: Tiffany Nathalie
text: Enak, harga jg masih termasuk affordable compared to matcha house yg lain2. Minusnya cuma 1, tempatnya terpencil dan agak susah dijangkau 🥹

title: Gincha Matcha House
name: Shin Yue
text:
Aku coba menu akai ichigo, tapi no sugar. Berasa matchanya meski ada manis gurih dari pure stroberi & light dari susunya. Rasanya pas buatku yang gak suka manis. Trus ada matchamisu, krim manis + matcha pahit khas, enak sesuai lidahku yang penggemar matcha. Terakhir ada pinku sakura, rose berasa & taste dari rasa matcha yang khas pahit dengan gula 25%. Rasanya rekomen deh, versiku ya 😁

Onigiri spicy enak deh gurih pedes pas ama aku yang lidah Indo 😆

title: Gincha Matcha House
name: Jessica Setyani
text: Menu pinky sakuranya sugar bombs berat, sudah half sugar tapi level manisnya jauh di atas 100% sugar minuman tempat lain

title: Gincha Matcha House
name: Sulaiman
text:
Pilihan menunya kurang banyak, varian kue pun sedikit & tastenya biasa saja. Kl minumannya sih ok.

Untuk pelayanan staff sangat baik, tempatnya bersih dan nyaman, ada free wifi juga bagi yg memerlukan

title: Gincha Matcha House
name: sookiejanai
text: Cobain matcha entry level which is the cheapest one there. Nama haru latte 50rb . Tastewise matcha ga gitu berasa terlalu light imo.

title: Gincha Matcha House
name: Saila Rezcan
text:
Karena sedang tidak ingin minuman memgandung susu, jadi pesan Yuzucha (Normal Ice, Normal Sugar) dan Matcha Chizu. Yuzucha sangat menyegarkan, tidak terlalu manis, tidak terlalu pahit, meski di takaran gula normal. Matcha Chizu sangat padat dan pekat kejunya, jadi cukup membuat kenyang, bukan jenis yang light. Bagian bawah cake ternyata terbuat dari ogura, bukan biscuit crumbs seperti pada cheesecake biasanya. Sebagai orang yang tidak terlalu suka ogura, rasanya masih bisa diterima, tidak terlalu pekat dan kuat, cebderung light. Perpaduan ogura dan cheesecake matcha-nya ternyata cukup smooth.

Packagingnya minumannya bagus banget, sepertinya kalau di-take away akan aman dan tidak tumpah.

title: Gincha Matcha House
name: Robert Reginald
text: Koffie Mido dgn matcha Meiko-susu low fat-no sugar, rasanya ok sesuai pesanan 👍 paduan matcha dgn kopinya tidak terasa terlalu pahit. Unik dan enak.

title: Gincha Matcha House
name: felix felicis
text: Suasananya kalem, pegawainya juga baik-baik dan informatif. Rekomendasi banget yang Pinku, untuk makanannya Hokkaido Puddingnya enak.

title: Gincha Matcha House
name: Petra
text: Cakenya yummy. Ditambah dark choco nya less sugar jd pait plus cake manis mantap

title: Gincha Matcha House
name: desy haryati
text: Sangat menyenangkan berlama-dalam gincha , suasana yg tenang dan fasilitas yg oke punya . Untuk minuman dan makanan jgn di tanya karena sangat lezat

title: Gincha Matcha House
name: Meyliana Intan
text:
tempat wangi, bersih dan sepii👍🏼

utk rasa matcha tidak seperti harapan, kebanyakan susu. its not for my liking sih..

title: Gincha Matcha House
name: Milagre Magdalena
text: Cake dan matcha dibuat dengan serius. Cocok untuk WFC! Nanti pasti dateng lagi 💃

title: Gincha Matcha House
name: olivia septyanty
text: Rasa OK dan affordable, tempat nyaman.

title: Gincha Matcha House
name: Gabriella Miranda
text: Enak matchanya bitternya pas, umaminya juga berasa

title: Gincha Matcha House
name: Anastasia Marcella
text:
Bener-bener definisi hidden gem sih, tempatnya gak keliatan dari jalan raya dan adanya di bawah apartemen.

Variasi matcha nya lengkap dan selain matcha ada kopi juga. Aku cobain yang yuzu matcha dan rasanya unik banget asem yuzu dan pait gurih matcha, perfect balance.

Tempatnya juga nyaman buat WFC, wangi, adem, banyak colokan dan wifi stabil, selain itu gak terlalu rame jadi gak berisil dan kondusif banget.

title: Gincha Matcha House
name: Erlin Lin
text:
Cocok untuk orang nongkrong.

Tempatnya bersih dan nyaman..

title: Gincha Matcha House
name: Aprilia Eka
text: Suasananya nyaman, minumannya masih manis buat saya,padahal sudah minta yg low sugar

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Amanda
text: Great natural ambiance, eclectic ethnic decor (coupled with artisan ceramic art gallery), above and beyond service- nicest staffs! Don’t even have to mention the matcha bcs they are so great for the price in Jakarta. Got the miso chicken rice bowl but bit too salty for my taste. Will definitely comeback.

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: flaa
text:
nice place with many choice of seats and atmosphere, good for hangouts with friends and wfc

I enjoy the matcha no75 and it was umamiii
Matcha cheesecake is dry (maybe too long in chiller)
Otakotak is nice

love every small cute details around here

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Indah Arianti
text:
The ambiance of the restaurant is great — cozy and comfortable. However, the service was really disappointing.

When we arrived, there was no staff to assist us in finding a table, so we were left confused about where to sit. The ordering system had issues, which caused delays. To make things worse, many of the menu items were sold out.

There’s an open kitchen/bar area for matcha preparation, which is a nice concept, but the bar counter was cluttered with dirty glasses and delivery packages — not something you’d expect in a space that should be clean and presentable.

When it came time to pay, we had already requested to settle the bill at the table, but it took a long time. Turns out, the server who was supposed to help us was also working as the cashier — there are no dedicated roles among the staff, which affects the efficiency and overall service quality.

That said, the matcha — their signature offering — was the highlight and actually quite good.

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Istiara
text:
Artistic and aesthetics place with beautiful landscape. The detail of interior and unique statue on every single corner was wondrous.

The vibe was really nice, full of plant and big tree.
They have various type of Matcha, should try their matcha it’s really good.
This is true hidden gem, really recommended.
And their fish pond was a unique too also, would be back here and spend more time here.

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: kaikai shedd
text: This fried rice was very salty and overly spiced. As a Chinese person, I wouldn't eat here again. It's worth browsing around the place. The drinks served to the diners were mediocre.

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Utari
text: ceramic studio with hidden cafe, i think it’s a nice move in the midst of jakarta, this just like sanctuary! i ordered the cold whisk matcha no 90 and it’s so good! the ambience is a vibe and i tries the butter miso chicken rice, it’s good! the staffs are friendly and helpful but the serving kinda long, so be patience, it’s worth the 8 minutes walk from MRT!

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Yasinta Mayestika
text: I like the ambiance, it's so cool. The area is also spacious + there's a gallery in front. The matcha I ordered was medium no. 75, it was also delicious haha. But I'm curious about the strong one. The platter really has to be for 2 people because it's so filling that you can't finish it if you're alone. Btw, this is a no-smoking area.

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Gemma Febriany
text:
Unassuming place upfront but a hidden oasis inside. We really love the ambience, the ceramic wall art, and the overall concept of this place, but the bevs were so-so. Their truffle french fries was served cold with just a speckle of truffle aroma.

I personally ordered their espresso matcha, not the best one out there. Their matcha lychee was refreshing, but the lychee syrup beat all the matcha, left us with a green colored drink but with only lychee flavor.

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Dessy Febrina
text:
Apart from the matcha, I genuinely appreciate this café for its warm and cozy atmosphere that makes you feel right at home. The beautiful artwork displayed throughout the space adds a lovely, artistic touch to the experience.

Yesterday, I tried the Matcha 90 cold whisk—it’s a great option for those who enjoy a more bitter flavor profile. I also ordered a few dessert & snack: the matcha cheesecake, matcha financier, and spring rolls.

Personally, I found the spring rolls to be quite enjoyable. The cheesecake was fairly typical of what you’d find in most cafés, while the financier had a rather plain taste—it wasn’t sweet and didn’t really capture the essence of matcha for me.

I may return for the matcha drinks, which I found to be the highlight, though the food might not be my main reason for visiting.

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Denny Fellianto
text:
Best matcha in town!
The atmosphere is wonderful, with lush greenery creating a calm and cozy vibe. What makes it even more special is the handmade ceramic collection crafted by the owner—everything from the flooring to the plates and even the tissue boxes! The service is exceptional; the staff are incredibly friendly and passionate, taking time to explain each matcha drink and dish in detail. Highly recommended for anyone looking to hang out and truly enjoy quality matcha.

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Putri Dumadi
text:
An exceptionally beautiful scene for a matcha house.
They have excellent grade of matcha powder 35,75 and 90. All have specific characteristics from the bitterness, creaminess and consistency.
All the waiters, I repeat, ALL the waiters literally very friendly, knowledgeable, informative and helpful.
From the entrance until the service was very satisfactory and with kindness.
The food was just so-so not much variant, but the dessert matcha cheesecake was delicious and not too sweet but the cheese consistency matched with the bitterness of matcha.

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Brigitta Veggy
text: A classic gallery that turned into cafe, unique cafe setting table and chair with some touch of tradisional java ornament. Overall spaces offer a unique experience, blending the appreciation of art with the casual atmosphere of a garden cafe.

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Ming Dao
text:
Dropped by in the evening when the place was almost full, but the staff were helpful and managed to find a table for our group of four — really appreciated that.

I ordered the Ceremonial Matcha Latte No.75, Matcha Peach Latte, Passion Fruit Soda, Chicken Butter Miso, and Matcha Terrine.

Unfortunately, the two matcha lattes were served in glasses that looked a bit smudged on the outside — even had visible fingerprints, which made me feel a bit uneasy hygiene-wise. The drinks were just okay, nothing too memorable. The food came out pretty quickly and was decent.

Since the shop was packed, we were seated in the upper area, which wasn’t the most comfortable spot to sit for long.

All in all — it was fine. Not great, not terrible. Just okay.

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Chantal Braunwalder
text: what a lovely place, such unique environment with beautiful art and plants serving tasty, high-quality matcha and food. great study spot too!

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Rina Angelia
text: The best-selling menu sold out quickly and the waitress didn't tell us whether the cake would be back in stock or not. So when we had already chosen another menu and went down to the cashier after a few hours, we were a bit surprised to find the menu back in stock. The rules were not clear, whether we had to find an available seat first or order in advance and the waitress would find a seat for us. Overall, the cafe's atmosphere was very comfortable and calm, and there were also many artworks adorning the walls and for sale.

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Fitria Sabrina
text: Very good place to have brunch, nice matcha place to go in the morning. Love the atmosphere, feel cozy and relaxing to hang with friends.

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Angelica Amartya
text: This cafe is perfect for matcha lovers with a great variety of drinks and desserts. The atmosphere is cozy and quiet, ideal for working from home or for introverts who want a calm space. Fast Wi-Fi and plenty of outlets make it even better. Definitely coming back!

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Alan Moris Marpaung (Moris)
text: I'm excited to share my experience at Hakon Ethnic, where I had the opportunity to enjoy a ceremonial matcha experience. They offer three varieties of matcha: 65, 75, and 90, which range from bitter to sweet. If you find yourself in the Setiabudi area, I highly recommend visiting this spot. The cafe is spacious and surrounded by plenty of greenery, creating a pleasant atmosphere. The staff are energetic and friendly, adding to the overall enjoyment. Personally, I particularly loved the Matcha 90 latte; it was my favorite of the day!

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: angga dwi prasetyo
text: Came here based on my niece recommendation, she also said the OG branch was in depok while we came here as she said this place is unique. AND YES!! I never found a retro or maybe it could be rustic concept of matcha cafe before. Like the cafe name HAKON ETHNIC, the atmosphere was so mysterious in a good way, can not explain it more, means you should come to know it. For the drink, the creamy yet tasty matcha I ever taste, however, I fall in love with the coffee KYOTO CAFFÉ LATTE 🤩🤩🤩 for the matcha I forgot wich one between 75 or 90 that I order. For the snack, I choose the matcha cheesecakes, TRY IT!! nad thanks me later 😉😉😉

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Mohammad Raflisandy
text: The food and beverage quality was satisfactory, with the matcha no. 90 (medium) exhibiting a pronounced flavor profile. However, the roll cake's texture requires improvement to achieve optimal softness. Additionally, enhancing customer service through a more attentive approach is recommended. Overall, the experience is rated 8/10.

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Nur Hutomo
text:
A beautiful place with a poor service and meh food and beverages.

So here's my take on this place.
1. I lived nearby so since this place opened, there is always high traffic here especially in the evening and during the weekend. But what make it worse, since the parking area is limited, some cars are even parked on the pedestrian area which is totally unethical.
2. Service is super slow. There's only 1 cashier and with a long que, it takes forever to order a menu. While the cashier is busy, I saw some of the staffs just busy talking to each other near the cashier counter. Maybe they didn't have order yet but still, why not do something else or have 2 cashier machines.
3. No one is standing by on each floor, so when the customers left, even after 30 minutes no staff came around to clean the table. There was 3 tables around me that was left with leftover food and beverages.
4. Then there's a lady (which I presumed the owner) came and do inspections with someone that I assume the manager, then only the manager started cleaning around and then the staffs came to help to clean the area. Kudos to the owner because she even clean up the table and pick the trash from the floor, but I think the management need to train the staff better!
5. Many tables has "reserved" signs there but during my time there, no one is actually came and sit there. Even when we came, no staff asked whether we have reservation or not, so why bother puting reserved sign on many tables which makes no sense.
6. Matcha was meh. Didn't feel the matcha taste enough and there's not much different between mild and medium taste. If that is the case than should only do medium and strong taste. And the matcha cheesecake also have no matcha taste at all.
7. Overall this is a beautiful place but the service and the food and beverage quality must be improved much much more.
8. One last thing, the place is very ethnic and artsy but they served the matcha using plastic cup which didn't allign with the whole concept.

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: ummi rosalia
text:
Well unique and one the awesome coffee  I've seen .
The 3 storey's building here is collaborative impressive Hacon Coffee belongs to Jeng Agnes and Ceramic Art Gallery Bapak ....
The art of handmade ceramic will attract your attention since you the first time you came!
The gallery has special place where you can find the best venue to buy ceramic as souvenirs from tile, wall decoration, tea pot, table coaster even small animlas ceramic so cute filled all the whic complete every part and corner of the stairs in thia house/ building.
Clearly stated that a man behind this gallery has wealth of ceramic art skills.
Even inside the lift ..I enjoy the  beautiful ornamen in the lift,  wall and elevator floor !
Soe figure of the display has its name , story behind the name and books you can enjoy the art ceramic exhibition here.

Now..then the menu of Hacon..has a great taste of some matcha series drink.
Cheese cream matcha cake is recommended !..
I like the tasty lumpia or resoles (?)as well as the fried cassava which is served with sambal...
The best drink and favorite its Hacon Latte coffee ice..
Well don't missed it!
Many place with different lay out and background. The staff is nice  and helpful.
Some carbonara spaghetti and its served with unique cuttlery made of ceramic and cute bottle drink.
I m sure the green atmosphere from the 1st floor until the third floor will make you and companion love to stay here enjoy the afternoon or night atmosphere.
The message looks like ..do you feel tired around Jakarta selatan..and the cowded of this city.
Stop by and relax here for a while 😊
I love every detail of animal creamics in its stairs, edge of the fence, toilet,  bathroom and handmade the tiles!
Enjoy the food...
Enjoy the athmosphere of Hackn ethnic
There is not any coffe I found with different and original taste like this before.
8 minutes by online driver from BNI City KRL or around Setiabudi Area., Jakarta Selatan. Plenty of parkir area.
Is in the heart of Jakarta!
Love it !

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: San San Muliawan
text:
Curious to try Hakon.

The place is inside a pottery gallery, so the place is both confusing and interesting (for those who love art).
There are indoor and outdoor areas, and the outdoor area is lush with lots of plants.

They served 3 types of ceremonial matcha.
Tried the 90 medium latte, but sorry to say, nothing stands out, it's just too thin, can't really taste the speciality of it, and even the matcha didn't whisked well, still can taste the matcha lumps.
Not sure if we ordered the wrong menu or maybe just not our lucky day.

As for the cheesecake, also standard, nothing stands out.

As for the service, im sure they can improve from other reviews here, pretty much the same experience. After ordering, no one told us where to sit, while the building has 3 floors and different areas.  So we end up going to the 3rd, 2nd, and 1st floor just to find a place to sit.

Nice and unique place. Hopefully, they will improve the "star" of their menu.

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Barlianny S
text:
We arrived there yesterday (Saturday) around just after 12pm. We were advised to find a table before we ordered at the counter on ground floor, as expected it was full. Luckily, we managed to get a table until 3pm in which the table was booked for that time. Our table was on the 3rd floor. So one of us needs to go back down to the counter to order while the other minding the table. A bit of a hassle to order as we didn’t get to read the menu before hand on our table. They mentioned, they only have servers on the 3rd floor at 1pm to take orders. But, that’s okay. So, my friend went down and called me reading the menu quickly and what to order.

Anyhow, we ordered matcha iced, ice latte, matcha cheesecake and truffles french fries, delivered to our table. The fries were good.

Nice and cozy place to hangout in the morning or late afternoon when the weather cool down a bit.

*Always love F. Widayanto’s ceramic collections. They also have pottery class there by reservation.

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Sunday Monday
text:
Had a great experience at Matcha Bar Hakon! Even when the place was full, Mba Liana went the extra mile to find me & my family a seat — super friendly and helpful service, also quick and attentive. 🙌

I tried the Ceremonial Matcha 75 (cold whisk) — loved the nutty, umami, and earthy notes. Definitely my kind of matcha 💚
Also tried the Matcha Lychee, and it was such a refreshing twist — the subtle sweetness of lychee pairs beautifully with the matcha!

The place has 3 floors and is accessible by lift, which makes it super convenient. The ambiance is cozy and inviting, with a unique touch as it’s connected to a ceramic gallery. The ethnic vibe really adds to the charm. Can’t wait to come back!

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Oshintalita Alwi
text:
What can I say…. i finally find my sanctuary! A delish matcha, they have all grade of matcha I guess, from food grade to ceremonial I believe? i chose the ceremonial one and I’m in love!

But the champ that conquers all of my love towards this place is of course… THE PLACE! even the tiles this cafe use and the cup they use for my matcha is tasteful… the owner surely has a good taste in interior designer and landscape :) I could spent hourss reading and devouring my matcha in here.. and the place is so chill even for jakarta weather thanks to the heavenly landscape (and I believe they dont allow smoking? I hope this is correct).

However, maybe a bit of improvement in service? The cashier is not really a people person?? (not in a bad way tho, maybe he is not smiley enough??) and when u visit this place on weekend… it’s too crowded :( maybe invest on receptionist desk where they can assign ur desk???

But anw for a new place, this may be the best matcha bar (or home?) in jkt and I have visit dozensss. Love to be here.

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Windi Fajarini
text: Nice place to enjoy a mix cultural of java and japan in the center of crowded city. I came twice, the first time I can’t entered because it’s full and decided to come the next day at earliest time around 8am and I’m the first customer. Ordered their breakfast menu soft omelette with miso sauce, they run of tomatoes the server asked me and I told them if it’s possible to change the veggies and they change it with mushroom (sauté mushrooms) and its delicious! Ordered matcha cheese cake and kyoto coffee latte as well, the cake was really in balance combination, good to try. The coffee was lit! But, it’s too heavy for breakfast can’t finish it so sorry. I love the place and we can roam around seeing their green. 3 stories building with rooms that can be reserve. This is TMI but the security guard help to take me to the nearest bus stop by his motorbike and he said he didn’t get any salary from the cafe, please help him and take care of your staffs better🙏🏻 overall good place to visit!

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Alena Mailin
text: Trying the viral one in Jakarta. I tried this matcha because my friend recommendation. I arrived almost 8PM at weekdays which already closing, abang" around there was sitting in front of the cafe said it's already closed. But there was 1 waiter said if you want I can make it for you but take away. We decided to take away ,from this moment I really appreciate his actions. He is also friendly when making the matcha and explained a little bit of their matcha. We choose no 90 both latte & cold whisk. Yes it's really good. I recommend the cold whisk one if you prefer more creamy one. Really much appreciated gesture for their service so maybe I recommend to come around dinner to avoid queue or packed so you can appreciate more their service

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: naomi nikita
text: Hakon is an amazing place to explore ☺️Their karaage is amazing, and the matcha is perfect for any matcha lover. The service is super friendly and welcoming, which makes the experience even better. But what I love the most is the atmosphere, it feels very homie, green, and unique. Definitely a place I’d love to come back to 🫶🏼

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Stallone Tjia
text:
A verdant matcha oasis inside a ceramic gallery in the middle of urban city of Jakarta. Love their ceremonial matcha and matcha desserts. They also serve savoury meal and breakfast menu too.

The space is spacious, 3-story, fitting for WFC and hanging out. Sometimes if the place is crowded the service can take long.

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Lam Meilina
text: Very cozy place, an oasis in the midst of busiest part of Jakarta. Tried their chicken ponzu rice bowl with matcha coffee. Food is delicious, but took more than 30 mins to be served. Since this place is also a ceramic art gallery, you could buy some cute and pretty ceramic thingy here.

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Risya Amelia
text:
Artistic and aesthetic place, but limited seat for indoor area, they have comfy and cozy outdoor area actually but cant be used while raining.

The matcha is good but for the hot coffee taste just common and not so hot.

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Mahmood Narejo
text: This unique place in the city blends nature and history seamlessly.  The thoughtful design creates a truly special atmosphere.  Antique displays add to the rich character of the location.  It's a must-see destination for anyone seeking a memorable experience.  Enjoy a relaxing cup of tea while taking it all in.

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Ahmed Reza Al Aziz
text:
Hakon Ethnic is a great café to hang out with friends, whether you’re working on assignments or just catching up over coffee.
The ambiance is a perfect mix of cozy and creative, with both indoor and outdoor seating options to suit your mood.
The space feels youthful and vibrant, making it an ideal spot for students, freelancers, or anyone with a young spirit.
Definitely a nice place to chill, be productive, and enjoy good company.

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Gabrielle Indra
text:
I had an enjoyable time at this place with my family and friends! The matcha was undeniably really good (I had the matcha latte & the coconut cloud).

The place itself was also very aesthetic as it is featured ceramic decorations everywhere in addition to the ceramic gallery on the first floor. Would definitely come back again to chill & hangout!

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Polevy Ezekiel
text: A highly recommended café around Kuningan area called @hakonethnic. This place has quite spacious seatings at the indoor and outdoor area, filled with ethnic aesthetic ornaments around the corner. They serve freshly brewed high quality matcha and various coffee from classics to manual brew.

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: A Poetry
text: Highly recommend for those who love matcha! One of the best matcha di jakarta, type matcha yg ga terlalu manis, creamy tapi ga too much! Love it, definitely will comeback here💚💚💚

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Debby
text:
I tried matcha 75 (medium, latte) and sharing the food platters and matcha cheesecake. Overall, the foods are great. Matcha is fine, but not so strong. I might try 65 and make it non latte next time.

The place is very greenery and spacious with a lot of tables (some of them are quite hidden, so you’ll need to stroll around and check other levels). I was there on weekend and it was quite packed even they stopped having people coming at one time, yet inside, it didn’t feel overly crowded.

2 things they should consider in the future though:
- having barcode menu and digital order
- put some washroom signs

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: sammi chee
text:
love the  hojicha.
Come here if you’ve got all day to waste :)

Service:
0/100000
We placed our order at 12:00 PM (see receipt). We ordered 3 drinks and 1 cheesecake.

Drinks didn’t come until 12:36 PM (see pic)
Cheesecake didn’t arrive until 1:09 PM (see pic)
Yep, we waited 1 hour and 9 minutes for a cheesecake :)

Atmosphere/Shop:
The layout of this cafe is honestly super confusing. I couldn’t tell where we were allowed to sit and where we weren’t. The waiter told us to look around and choose a spot, so we checked out the 2nd and 3rd floors. The 2nd floor was packed, so we picked the 3rd floor—only to be told it was actually closed and we had to sit on the ground floor.

I get that they’re going for a ceramic-and-Foster aesthetic, but with stuff everywhere and no clear signs, it just feels messy and disorganized.

Food:
The hojicha was great—I really loved it!
The matcha was... okay. You can tell it's good quality matcha, but the flavor just wasn’t brought out. Slightly disappointing.

Overall:
The concept is cute, but they seriously need better structure and more staff training.

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Nila Maria
text:
Coconut cloud matcha and matcha cheese cake is very nice combination! 😋
The place very ethnic and nice ambience.
Recommended!

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Priscilla Satriana
text:
Got their matcha no. 65 - Medium - Usucha. The lower the match number, the bitter it is. Since I love bitter matcha, it suits my liking. Not that bitter actually.
Tried their Matcha cheesecake as well. Shared with a friend, since their cheesecake is dense, it's fulfilling and I can taste the high quality matcha that is used in it. Taste okay, not mind-blowing.
Ate at their communal space on the first floor, luckily since it's fasting month, not many people ate lunch. Stayed for 3 hours and only another group ate in the room with us.
Parking spots are available. There's also an elevator for reaching the 2nd & 3rd floor.
If you ate on the upper floor, you will need to collect your food to the 1st floor by yourself. They gave you a beeper for this purpose.
It is not recommended to bring small children here, since it's also an art gallery. There are ceramic statues & arts everywhere on display.

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Narissa Q Ayunin
text: Nice ambiance with decent price. Completely nonsmoking with mushola inside… next time will try their dessert!

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Winda
text:
I came for the matcha. Tried No. 75 since No. 90 was sold out. It was cold-whisked with fresh milk, slightly bitter but in a good way. If you’re into strong matcha, this hits the spot. Just don’t come on weekends unless you love queues. Weekdays are way more chill.

Since I was already there, I wandered into the gallery and ended up loving it. Lots of Javanese vibes throughout, which made everything feel a bit more familiar and grounded. There were also these butterfly-themed art nodes everywhere. Not sure what they meant, but they looked cool.

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Qintha
text:
My friend said "your kind of place" and I agree! I looooove the ambiance. The decorations are also so pretty, the food and coffee SO good. The staffs? The kindest.

I went here along with my community, we had so much fun!

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Levin Nicolas
text: The Matcha 90 and the matcha brownies was absolutely amazing. The ambiance at Hakon Ethnic is so cozy and welcoming. The soft lighting and comfortable seating made it perfect for a relaxed evening with friends. Every corner is Instagram-worthy! The combination of the colors and decor makes this place a visual delight.

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Cj Pichinevskiy
text:
Found this matcha / coffee shop.
The first thing I noticed was the amazing atmosphere in this place.

The coffee was very delicious and the barista were very knowledgeable

Then I tried the original matcha that Gabriel made for me,
It was extremely delicious and Gabriel mastered it

Very awesome and friendly staff
Definitely coming back again

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Anisa
text:
The matcha no. 90 was so good! I had medium strength, cold whisked with oat milk, and I’d highly recommend it. It had a deep umami with subtle floral hints and a clean aftertaste. The matcha terrine was also tasty. The density is similar to a brownie but the texture is creamier.

Service was quite slow, so only come here if you’re not in a rush.

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Rachel Amelia
text: it was my first time at HAKON and I instantly loved the place!!! calm, cozy, and super aesthetic. but what really made the experience stand out was the service, especially from Kai. super friendly, easy to talk to, and you can tell they genuinely care about the customers. definitely made me want to come back! 🍵✨

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Mhn
text:
The ambience was great, food was mid for the price point but still reasonable for a cafe in Setiabudi area. I ordered Hojicha Latte, wasn't too creamy per my liking but I'll give them a plus point for not adding sugar as their default.

It's just the service was a total meh. The way that they handled my friend's issue was totally not it, no apologizing at all for having a technical issue for the toilet. It was their employee who told my friend to go to the specific toilet yet the way the waiter responded to me when I asked for help she act like it was my friend's fault choosing that toilet. Also, I don't need to see you asking your engineer about the issue for multiple times. Employees are definitely need to take customer service training class. Annoyed when customers need your waiters' guidance is definitely not it.

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Raissa Dwi
text:
very bad service, waiter is not reliable, not responsive. I sit on 3rd floor close to the lift, the indoor ac is not working i guess. Then we, Move to another indoor table. Mendingan ac nya. I also ordered calamari, long waiting time, they said the system was error, so the order is not received by the kitchen, buttt they did not informed us, we need to make complaint to know this. My friend wanted order main menu, they said the rice is not ready yet around 2pm. Mau bayar pake qris, ditawatin dibawain ke meja, ga dateng2, akhirnya bayar di 1st floor, antre pula krn cuma 1 cashiernya.

If you did not have enough employee for each floor, pls dont open it. The ambience was good,unique. The service was BAD, need to improvee.

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Christine Alyssa
text: the matcha was good , we got hakon 75 usucha medium , hakon 75 mild cold whisked less sugar , and hakon 65 mild cold whisked less sugar. i personally liked my hakon 75 as an usucha it was nutty and gewd. place wise pretty okay.

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Yuliana Dolok Saribu
text:
I am in love with the idea of mixing arts and coffee shop❤️ They have nice Matcha in several options and I really like the Kyoto Latte so much!
It was a lovely moment to spent my time here while i was preparing my master degree🤗

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Julia Brito-Denis
text: This place is surreal!!! There are three floors, each drenched in beautiful art and plants! The butter miso chicken is an absolute must!!! Crunchy, flavourful and hearty! The service is also excellent. What a gem!!!!

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: A L
text:
The ceramic collection is super pretty, just way too pricey for me. But if you’re into collecting, you’ll probably love it. The Hakkon staff were really slow though — they could use more training. The matcha was also overpriced and honestly not that special. For that price I thought it would come in a nice ceramic mug, but it showed up in a glass that looked like it was from Mr. DIY. The food was okay, nothing memorable, and it took forever to come out.

But the place itself is really nice — lots of greenery and there’s a musholla too. I’d still recommend it if you want a different vibe in the middle of Jakarta.

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Okky Akhyar
text: A classic place, well-known for its matcha, with a calm and relaxing vibe.

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Ronella Mutia81
text: One of recommend cafe for matcha lovers. Nice ambience with beautiful garden..

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Sry March
text: affordable price, with vintage & cozy vibes. This is one of beat spot if you want to do work from cafe!

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Fara Fara
text: Came here to try their Matcha, we’ve tried Genmaicha and Usucha. The taste was good but for my reference i expected more umamii. But overall, the place was sooo comfy and we have to try other menus as well next time

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: indah indriyanni
text:
First thing that get into my attention are those detailssss on their interior🤯🤩✨
Every corner is legit aesthetic!
But still need more sockeeettss.

Drinks are good, price kinda pricy but still worth it.

They also provide pottery class (dont know the price cz i never try).

As I remember back when i was in SMA 3, this spot is just some kinda spooky house with unmaintained vegetations in front of it. So glad they turned it into an aesthetic cafe+gallery.

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Princessa Sarah
text: Okay this is an ACTUAL hidden gem for matcha lovers! 😍 I tried their No. 75 strong cold whisk and it was a BOMB🤯 but now I understand why they got a lower rating for their services

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Bina Lishia
text: This place is a perfect blend of art and culinary delight. The matcha drink is a must try, high quality and perfectly blended. They have outdoor and indoor space. Highly recommended for anyone looking for great dining, a place to chill in the busy Jakarta and a touch of culture ✨✨✨

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Ellen Brigitta
text: Unique concept of combining a pottery showroom and a cafe, but honestly it's overrating. The matcha, which so called their specialty is not good enough. Strong milk taste, with very little trace of matcha though the matcha looks strong. The atmosphere is too dark due to all the statues and plants around. They also didn't put a clear signage of which area is private or for staff only, and we got the staff told us to go because the area is not for public when we are trying to find seats. They didnt have the cheese cake when we came, which a disappointment since it's also the specialty that they highlighted. Flow to order can be improved so you don't need to queue that long.

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: NH Muslim
text: The matcha tasted delicious as both drinks and desserts. Not only that, but the environment was supportive due to how neat it looks. Owner was very welcoming and friendly

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Razzaqitaqwa Rivandha
text:
Contrary to a couple reviews I saw earlier, the service was quite quick. Less than 15 mins and all my orders were delivered both drink and foods.

Cold whisk was creamy and nice. But I'd like to highlight their Chicken Miso Butter. It was really good. I can taste the savory miso and the chicken was super tender and juicy.

Also their truffle fries! Only 35k rupiah and was so good!

I could say it is worth the price to taste ratio. Affordable yet tasty 👍

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Titien Adikoesoemo
text: Celebrated my daughter's birthday with her friends at this venue. We were ushered into an amazing room that was filled with exquisite works of F Widayanto. The room was facing a lush courtyard dotted with pottery and ceramics from the gallery. The combo platter with fried calamari was a hit with the children. They also loved the Chicken butter miso bowl. Afterwards the children enjoyed a fun afternoon at the ceramic workshop across the courtyard. Parents waited while sipping matcha and coffee. The place was packed but the staff were all friendly and accommodating. Thank you for making this a memorable day for all our guests.

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: mayra ishana
text:
First time visiting Hakon and it didn’t let down our expectations. We decided to tried their 90 Matcha Latte Medium because we asked the barista & cashier the most ordered menu and it was delicious!

Also their services is really nice, especially the barista is very friendly and informative about everything. Definitely will come back!

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Alma
text: Great matcha place with variety of style and types. Outdoor place is really pretty!

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Eliezer Andreas
text:
Crazy unique ambience!! love it here and what a rare find especially in the mid of Setiabudi..

However, this is more like a place for you to hangout than work.

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: T M
text: Nice place to spend weekend with family, friends or even alone, dont forget to order their ceremonial matcha No.90🫶 definitely will go back

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: natasha amelia
text: place is suuupperr comfy and all the people working there are so friendly, welcoming and helpful (ibu, kak aston, lianna, pak iwan and everyone else hehe😗🫰🏻)!! we had really good matcha drinks and a pottery session that we really enjoyed very much! recommended and would definitely come back heree :)

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Gerald Bastian
text:
The best matcha cheesecake in town! I'm definitely going for this specific dessert. Besides that, the food and drink quality is good.

Another good thing is that they have a dedicated work room for people who want a quieter atmosphere.

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: That guy (That guy)
text: A unique blend of Gallery and authentic matcha tea. Would come again to try the main course dish since the kitchen is under construction by the time we went there.

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Nda
text: Love the place. Delicious matcha cheesecake and good coffee. Limited parking area

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: aliyya natasha
text:
Loved all the beverage menus & nasi rendang!! Enak bgt. But the service frm people stands behind bar of hakon ethnic itself is kinda off. First time i walked in, people didnt greet me properly it seems like they’re minding their own business talking and minding with each other.

First impression matters, once i feel like its off. I wont do eye contacts. And saat aku lagi taking orders sama kaka rambut pendek, that was mind enough to greet me & be friendly. I overheard one of the barista talks about one group of guests and it shocked me. He talks about this one group of ibu-ibu that took pictures & he makes fun of them — infront of me. I’m sorry but its too inappropriate & close minded.

But overall the menu’s are all amazing, places is pretty and all. Just minim seatings. But i still enjoy it anyway

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Nadya Sabrina
text:
went to hakon ethnic with my boyfriend because we’ve been seeing matcha everywhere, so we wanted to try a place that actually takes it seriously.

i ordered the matcha no. 90 — and i LOVED it. no sugar bomb, no cream overload, just pure, real matcha. like… “oh, so this is what real matcha tastes like?” kind of moment. it was earthy, slightly bitter, clean, and calming. honestly felt like a little reset in a cup.

the space was peaceful and quiet. super calming energy, natural tones, and just a nice break from the usual busy spots.

they’re also fully smoke-free, which is great if you don’t vape or smoke. personally, since i do vape, it felt a bit odd sipping something without my usual puff, so i ended up getting it to-go.

prep time took a little while, but you can tell they take care with the process. and for something that good, it’s worth waiting for.

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Felicula Intan
text: the atmosphere and their matcha the best one 1️⃣ ☝🏻pls try matcha cheesecake🫶🏻

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: nowyou seeme
text: I came here after the soft opening day. I came in the morning when they opened, at that time they were temporarily only selling limited food because there was no cooking oil and some pastries or cakes were also not available. The place is very comfortable, for the outdoor area it turns out it is not hot, it is really cool and quite windy because of the shady trees. The cafe has three floors and many private rooms are available. The drink I ordered was houjicha, delicious, a bit bitter, and authentic. The service is quite good, but please organize the division of tasks because there are too many baristas for coffee but very few baristas for the matcha bar. All good, but I just came while they did not prepare the well ingredients. Maybe come back later after a while.

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Laura Fyandhani
text: Love the ambiance & the art collections ✨ As a chocolate drink lover, I love the choco latte, not too sweet and kinda light. Chicken butter miso-nya juga enaaak!

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: Angga Daditya
text: Homey ambience with great matcha(s) menu. Bought the no.65, no.75 and the matcha cheesecake. Perfect companion for light meeting and working.

title: HAKON ETHNIC
name: agbing AGB
text:
Visited during Lebaran Holidays and didn't expect the long queue. But the services were good. While queueing at the cashier, the other staff made sure we had seats already. And they closed for dining in because all seats were full.

I loved the hot Matcha #90 medium.
I will come again to try the #90 strong one.

title: Feel Matcha
name: Nuniek Tirta
text: Nice place to wait or WFA, with plenty choices of matcha and coffee ☕️ and good music too!

title: Feel Matcha
name: Mara Cantika
text: Great place to have matcha drinks and matcha snacks, They have various menus combine with matcha and it was delicious. The price is so reasonable. The place has a good ambiance and located on strategic place (Kemang). Would recommend this place to hang out with friends and have matcha 💕✨

title: Feel Matcha
name: Zashache
text:
Went to visit this place after my nail appointment since the place is close, I ordered their matcha kinako pudding, I choose them because I wasn’t looking for fulfilling sweets to eat, and hoping it wasn’t too sweet

But to my surprise, it is not too sweet. Most of the sweetness came from the brown sugar, and theres a hint of nuttiness from the kinako powder. The matcha pudding itself is nice with strong matcha flavor, and the pudding texture are soft and jiggly to make it easier to eat. Overall I like them, definitely a repeat order if I come back around this neighbourhood again.

Their other sweets and drinks looks great too.

title: Feel Matcha
name: Febrina Erwanto
text:
They claim to use the grade A matcha powder directly from Kyoto, which is good.
However, it seems they forgot to balance the matcha with the other components in their so-called Matcha Tiramisu. Well, I get the idea of replacing coffee with matcha. But, with only a little portion of matcha therein (as you can see in the picture), the sourness from the cream comes stronger. Hence, the creaminess is the only taste that strikes my tounge instead of the bitterness of the matcha.
The Mille Crepes comes out nice, I can taste the matcha and like the crepes texture.
The Matcha Choux is probably my favorite. The saltiness of the pastry mixed well with the green tea cream.
The Matcha Latte for me is not that special. The Biscoff Matcha Latte is the gem because surprisingly it blends well.
I love the emerald green as the cafe signature color. The presentation is neat with gold utensils. I just don't get why they have to put the paper at the bottom of the plate.

title: Feel Matcha
name: Bayan Barlian
text: Matcha taste is good and comfort place to chill out with you beloved ones.. Dont forget to matcha o'clock..

title: Feel Matcha
name: Elizabeth Sitorus
text: good but i don’t really tasted the matcha

title: Feel Matcha
name: Silvia Nur Hanifah
text: what a nice place! in love with the decoration and the food are insanely delicious! i really like the ambience here.. the waiters was nice to me. surely i will come again since i love matcha and the menus are quiet affordable for colleague student like me <3

title: Feel Matcha
name: Nadhna Barb
text:
Love all the drinks, and the staff were helpful and friendly!
Maybe the upstairs space needs a lil bit of clean ,other than that, i really enjoy my matcha from Feel Matcha 💜🍵

title: Feel Matcha
name: Aditya N
text:
Feel Matcha's delicious matcha latte frappe is like a match(a) made in heaven! 🍵💚

It's a delightful treat for matcha enthusiasts and coffee lovers alike. The creamy sweetness and earthy matcha flavor blend together perfectly, creating a refreshing and energizing beverage that will put a smile on your face. 🌟

The smooth, velvety texture combined with subtle hints of vanilla and a touch of sweetness makes it a truly indulgent experience that you won't be able to resist! Whether you enjoy it as a midday pick-me-up or a relaxing afternoon delight, Feel Matcha's matcha latte frappe is sure to become your new favorite go-to drink! 🌈💕

title: Feel Matcha
name: Bagus Satrio
text: such a nice place,good matcha's and nice service from pleasant's barista's

title: Feel Matcha
name: Alifah Sibarani
text: Yummy food and a comfy place.. perfect for matcha lovers and cozy chit-chats with your loved one

title: Feel Matcha
name: Miranti Vidyasari
text:
No parking space if you come by car. Can only park on the side of busy road.
Place is compact, simple and nice decorated.
Order take out can be done by apps, paid by QR/gopay/shopeepay. Waiting time a bit long, it’s quite busy by the time i come.
Try their Signature Matcha Latte, less sugar. It’s good, milky and have a good flavor of matcha on it. Only it’s getting a bit bitter toward the end on my palate. Still ok though.
I think, This is a the best place to go for matcha lovers.

title: Feel Matcha
name: Amalia Mufti
text:
Got chance to only taste the drinks cos the matcha food was sold out when I came ☹️ ordered matchachiato (white one) and minty sparkling matcha. IMO, considering this is a place to get matcha, the flavor of the matcha itself is not that strong (milk and soda is still dominant somehow). Anyway, maybe the one I'm looking for is on the food itself, not the drink hehe.

Talking about space, not that big, esp the smoking area.

title: Feel Matcha
name: Ni Ketut Alit Juli Surasmi
text: Feel Matcha is my one and only choice for matcha. The taste is just right, it offers plenty of variants, the price is affordable, the place is comfortable and clean, and the service is excellent. Keep up the good work!

title: Feel Matcha
name: Putri Maudyla
text: The Matcha drinks is ok , but matcha cheesecake were a bit too sweet for my liking, my favorite was the soft serve cuz its soft and decadent!

title: Feel Matcha
name: Salma Nisrina
text: Ordered matcha latte & matcha frappe latte for the drink. It was so good for the not so expensive price. I also ordered mille crepe matcha but it was horrible, I just can’t stand the sourness. Idk whether it’s an old batch or just the sourness that is so strong compared to the matcha. A little bit disappointed with the staff since they are not helpful, when I came staff greeted us and asked if I were going to dine in or take away. I planned for dine in but after checking upstairs, there were no any seats left. The staff didn’t give us solution whether to just wait or anything, they were just busy behind the desk. So I decided to just take away. There were also no car parking area too, not recommended to bring your car.

title: Feel Matcha
name: Foodie Travelmate
text: The place is not for group it is suitable for couple or anyone who wants to visit the cafe. My experience is so good. All the menu and payment can be made by our smartphone. So no need queue to order or pay the bill. Their service also great. They also has a unique promo where you can get 30% off for all pastry after 8.00 pm. Enjoy drink and visit fellas :)

title: Feel Matcha
name: Kezia A
text: Favorite matcha on the go! I often use online delivery to get their matchas :) if you're looking for affordable good matcha drinks and various delicious desserts, this place is what you're looking for!!

title: Feel Matcha
name: Risma Rahayu
text: Every matcha lover like me must be at least once in their life visit this cozy place! This café offers you quite various menu with matcha. Beverages and slice cakes. Their Miles Crepes is so good that I really want to order another one. Their service is also good that let you order contactless. For pet lovers, you can also bring your dog or cat here (the last time I visited, I met one).

title: Feel Matcha
name: Nur Ani Badriyah
text: The place is kinda cute for girls and couple to hangout. And absolutelty recommended for matcha lovers. But kind of difficult for people with car cause the parking place is so small

title: Feel Matcha
name: Rachmita H
text: Good place to hangout with friends, with specialty in matcha. Food and drinks are really good.

title: Feel Matcha
name: Nuska Rianggono
text:
Some got score 7½
The others 5½

If you are coffee lover pse ask extra espresso coffee for your coffee latte,  the taste become tastier.

title: Feel Matcha
name: Raiwa Mara Puspa
text: As a Matcha lover, I just want to cry finding this place. Aaaak, all the menus are made from matcha. For the drink that I ordered, in my opinion, the composition between the matcha powder and the milk was not quite right. Too dominant taste of milk, but it's still ok. The atmosphere of the cafe is very comfortable. Prices are standard. The parking lot is narrow, if you bring a car it's difficult to park. If u are a matcha lover, u must try it!

title: Feel Matcha
name: Farrel Denabil Hendraputra
text: The matcha choux is so damn good. Matcha latte is nice and refreshing. Overall good experience here. Keep it up

title: Feel Matcha
name: Juju Jumaroh
text: Matcha lover should come here. I order macaroon matcha, ice matcha latte and mille crepe matcha. Vibe ok, food ok, but the place is quiet not big.

title: Feel Matcha
name: Monica Natasha
text: Tastiest, fresh, and a go-to matcha dish for you or your loved one! 💚 comfortable place to sink into the matcha vibes, even though the beverages aren't strong enough but you can add extra matcha shot for more indulgence, especially if you also have the cakes with you!

title: Feel Matcha
name: Alyssa Indira
text: I ordered the matcha latte, matcha crêpe cake and matcha crêpe. The drink was good you could taste the matcha and it wasn’t too sweet imo and the matcha crêpe was also really good. However, the matcha crêpe cake lacked matcha flavor. It just tasted like a vanilla crêpe cake with a tiny bit of matcha. PS: this place uses cashless payment

title: Feel Matcha
name: Iin Rahayu
text: Good place, recomended👍🏻

title: Feel Matcha
name: Yuli Foodie
text:
Nice place for matcha. I had signature hot matcha what was quite good but better if they have more plant based milk options. Bcs dairy milk/oat milk not compliment taste of matcha that good for my opinion
Crepe mille was good and portion is big, but cheesecake taste wasn’t really cheesy and kind of weird
Anyway I can recommend to explore their menu if u like matcha and enjoy
Ambience is nice and friendly

title: Feel Matcha
name: Ara Ara
text: good service and delicious food. thank youu

title: Feel Matcha
name: miasperanza
text:
The taste of the matcha is real good. If you like real, thick tasting matcha, I think this is the place. Though it's a bit pricey, it's worth the price. The only place that serves decent matcha is Uji Matcha at Grand Indo, IMO.

But yes, there's no parking lot, it's kinda hard if you bring car here. And I also think you should skip the food, and just go witht the drinks.

title: Feel Matcha
name: Fajrinissa Iren
text: Good food and nice ambience. The cafe is very cozy. The cashier and waitresses are friendly. Need to add more chairs and table tho and more slow playlist to feel more cozy :D

title: Feel Matcha
name: Raynna Baharuddin
text: Go-to matcha place. I know I will always be satisfied when I come here. The selection is so so wide and every time I try a new menu, it's always really good. The value for money is good. The atmosphere is also really nice and comfortable. Will always recommend this to friends.

title: Feel Matcha
name: Fathia Ramadina
text:
Came here mainly for the matcha with a low expectations for the place. And yes, the place was not so cozy to hang out for a long time -- limited seats and looking a bit dirty, especially the toilet :/

I don't have that many references, but I've never found a better matcha place other than this.

title: Feel Matcha
name: Vania Syifa Revlizia
text: Great service! And lots of matcha dessert varieties  <3

title: Feel Matcha
name: sea turtle
text: Friendly staffs. Ordered a recommended drink (forgot the name), but I feel like the taste is not that special compared to other place with the same range price

title: Feel Matcha
name: Fadila Firdaus
text: Feel Matcha Kemang.. Always delicious

title: Feel Matcha
name: Riii
text: Matcha heaven, I love the matcha coffee, the bitter and sweet flavors are balanced. And the cake also yummy

title: Feel Matcha
name: Michella Angel
text: All good here you can feel matcha for real

title: Feel Matcha
name: oddy creamy
text: Good food and service but space too small  than another store but matcha never wrong 🤟🏻

title: Anomali Coffee Menteng
name: Avijeet Sen
text:
Visited in Feb 2026

Visiting an Anomali cafe is an always a good decision for coffee lovers. Dropped by the Menteng outlet a couple of times during my recent visit to JKT. Ended up trying four types of their single origin beans (Sumatra Solok, Flores, Aceh & Toraja). The coffee, as expected in any Anomali outlet, was very good

Would definitely recommend a visit

title: Anomali Coffee Menteng
name: Natalie
text:
First time going here. The atmosphere is nice. It's also located near Jakarta Library (around 2.2 km, if I'm not wrong). This place has enough electrical socket. No matter if you want to hang out or WFC, this place fits it perfectly

The matcha has a beautiful latte art and is creamy with a biscuit-like taste (I don't know how, but that's how I taste it). Chicken teriyaki is okay, and the Lychee tea is good.

title: Anomali Coffee Menteng
name: Samuel James
text:
The perfect place to choose authentic Indonesian coffee beans, they have such a wide variety of options available here!! The baristas are also incredibly helpful and knowledgeable.

I always enjoy my visits to Anomali Coffee 👍🏻

title: Anomali Coffee Menteng
name: riemaca
text:
My husband and I stopped here early Monday morning while waiting for an appointment at JEC (it’s very close by). Since we usually go to the Anomali in Senopati, we expected a similar menu and level of service.

I typically order their fruit bowl, but this time I tried the noodles. For breakfast, the noodles felt a bit too heavy, and the aftertaste was not something I would want to repeat. The dish itself was okay, and the coffee—well, it's reliable Anomali coffee.

title: Anomali Coffee Menteng
name: Ananda Ekawardhani
text:
So far, I've been here several times and nothing has failed. The food, drinks, and cakes are all delicious. It's always crowded at night. It's no surprise, the atmosphere is also nice for hanging out or having a casual chat. But if you want a quiet atmosphere, it's not recommended at night because it's crowded.
The rib menu is the best, so tender. The coffee is also recommended.

title: Anomali Coffee Menteng
name: Alex Liao
text: Always on my list. Excellent coffee, always brings joy. The worst thing 6 working people. On my last visit there were two people who had meeting online without earphones. What a shame for such a nice place - noone from the staff asked them to stop or put earphones on. Seems like only coffee is good.

title: Anomali Coffee Menteng
name: Salman Alfarisi
text:
If you search for a laid-back coffee shop in the city, Anomali Coffee Menteng is a quite decent location. The coffee is good with many of brew choices to investigate. Curiosity drove me to try their salted coffee, and shockingly, it was still delicious and absolutely drinkable—not odd at all like I had anticipated.

If you're somewhat hungry, they also provide a good selection of platters and appetizers. The arrangement is neat; depending on your mood, indoor and outdoor seating is found here. Though not very elegant, it works. Plus, they’ve got a mushola and toilet on-site – not amazing, but they get the job done.

One of the great plus features is how easy it is to get here. It’s only around 100 meters from the nearest bus stop, so public transit is definitely an option. Overall, it’s a nice location for a fast coffee run, remote work, or catching up with pals.

title: Anomali Coffee Menteng
name: Rakesh Inbaraj
text: What a gem in the heart of Menteng! This cafe has it all — spacious indoor and outdoor seating, a warm vibe, and top-notch service. The coffee is fantastic, the food is delicious, and everything just hits the spot. You have to try their Hainan rice — it’s bursting with flavor — and the signature KSU Iced Coffee was just perfect.

title: Anomali Coffee Menteng
name: AbbottHsu
text: Pretty roomy and quiet environment  inside the restaurant. You can either enjoy your brunch, lunch or tea break meals with friends or families here. The staffs are friendly and professional with hospitality to serve you all the time. Foods, juices and coffees are super yummy and tasty. Lots of coffee information you can get here. Just come and enjoy.

title: Anomali Coffee Menteng
name: Rahmi Khalida
text:
If you are looking for a place to meet your friend or co worker, this place might a good choice.
They have tasty foods.  They also make  excellent coffee.

title: Anomali Coffee Menteng
name: Aldi Syah
text:
Nice place to spend the time to hang out. Some times the place is full. They serve good coffee (of course), espresso based or manual brew,  and snacks.

(Update after 5 years)
Ambiance:
Good. Many tables and seating with electric plug. But I think the ambiance is more suitable to chat with your buddies.

Food:
I miss their siomay. But recently their fried tofu are great. Love it. Their Oglio lio and pizza are also great.

Coffee:
Love their hot cappucino. It is large size. Their manual brew is also served with large volume. I prefer to order hot capp and test their manual brew that they usually provide for free... ouch...

Items:
Dont forget to grab their beans and/or their drip coffee.

title: Anomali Coffee Menteng
name: Agnes Limz
text:
As for the coffee, you don't need to ask, it's definitely delicious, no complaints.  for food, in my opinion, it's really worth it, from the taste from the appearance, especially the price, it's just right.

The service is friendly, fast, the place is just normal, it's more like an old building in the past, it's quite spacious if you want to hang out together for doing assignments or just meeting.

title: Anomali Coffee Menteng
name: Irwan Hidayatullah
text:
Nice ambience for work or chit chat with some friends, especially in the morning. Not recommended coming at noon or night. But, it’s ok if you just want to hang out with friends. Good service. There are indoor and outdoor area for smoker.
Restroom should be better.

After three yeaars now, its getting better.. especially the menu and the taste of the food! Improved a lot. So i changed the rating from 4 stars to 5 stars.

title: Anomali Coffee Menteng
name: Luna
text: I really love their chocolate drink, the food also tastes good and premium. They have various options on the menu for coffee, non coffee, food and dessert. The place is big and spacious, the atmosphere is good to stay long at the cafe, but for me the seat is hard and not too comfortable.

title: Anomali Coffee Menteng
name: Theodore Nataniel
text:
Went here 9AM Tuesday for work, not so crowded at the moment. Located near RS Bunda Cikini, accessible by bus and car & bike parking is ample. Outdoor seating is a lot and well-cooled by fans, indoor seating as well. Wifi is strong, but electric plug is on some spots only. Server is helpful and informative, upsells mostly but polite.

I had their iced milk tea (42k IDR for small size), taste okay and creamy. Props for using a carton-based glass instead of plastic 👍

Will come back here for work sometime when I’m around.

title: Anomali Coffee Menteng
name: Fachri Ikhsan
text:
Anomali coffee offers a lot of Indonesian coffee. Located in Menteng, the place is
convenient for those who want to work from coffee or enjoy rich flavour coffee. The place
is clean and neat. The iced chocolate tastes wonderful and Toraja Mialo coffee has a
decent taste and acidity. The staff are friendly and welcoming. The price is reasonable.

title: Anomali Coffee Menteng
name: Nabila Pindya
text: This place is a nice coffee shop to spend your time to enjoy coffe. It has good coffee, cake and snack. I love their klepon cake that taste yummy! For the price, actually, it is kinda expensive but yeah, worth to try lah

title: Anomali Coffee Menteng
name: Annisa Nugrahany
text:
There are no fail menu. The drinks and the food are all delicious!! but the AC wasn’t working properly jadinya panas:( hope they fix it soon.
I highly recommend the coffee and cheesecake.
coffeeshop dengan kopi dan makanan terenak se-jakpus, tidak overpriced dan worth every penny

title: Anomali Coffee Menteng
name: Reza Setiawan
text: A good coffee place with both indoor and outdoor area. Good selection of food that will satisfy your hunger. A good place to hangout after office and to meet up with friends. The staff are quite attentive. I’ve been the patron at the other outlets and happy to visit this one too!

title: Anomali Coffee Menteng
name: Jeanne Palilu
text:
02.12.2023 saturday.
Old building, parking on the street.
Came here for late lunch, the place is packed. Luckily there was one empty table inside (outdoor was too hot and bunch of smokers).
We order :
Nasi ayam hainan 5/5
Mie ayam anomali 5/5
Single origin jawa Frinsa (iced) 4/5
Cookies n cream 5/5
Everything tastes good. For the Frinsa, it has berry n wine taste. Not my fav but it's indeed refreshing.
I like how they utilize large bowl and dishes for plating, it gives some sense of seriousness n effort.

title: Feel Matcha
name: Resty Amira
text: I Would love to come back again 👍

title: Feel Matcha
name: BELVA WIJAYA
text:
I love matcha the most, and Feel Matcha can make me literally drink matcha every single day because they have high quality taste of matcha but very affordable😭
The staff are really nice & humble, especially Oci and Engki. I'd love to recommend this Cafe to my friends!

title: Feel Matcha
name: Evv2
text: I would say this signature matcha latte is not the best however still good. The cake tastes yummy

title: Feel Matcha
name: vega amila
text: Must try, chrean cheesee Overdose Matcha Latte

title: Feel Matcha
name: Satriyadi
text: Not bad

title: Feel Matcha
name: Nonden Aprilianti
text: Must visit!!! Matcha muchy salty cheese enak bgt!!

text: good places, good beverages

title: Feel Matcha

text: Nice place to meet someone special
