text: the best matcha in the town!😍

title: Feel Matcha
name: Selvy Puspa
text: So good! The matcha tastes fresh and not too bitter. The salty cheese on top is creamy and delicious..combo! Will buy again for sure

title: Feel Matcha
name: maria grace
text: the matcha so good and i love the cheescakw not really sweet. will come back soon

title: Feel Matcha
name: Veny Agustine
text: Matcha muchy salty cheese always my fav

title: Feel Matcha
name: Ummu Rizkiah
text: comfortable place, baristanya ramah, food and beverage overall so good

title: Feel Matcha
name: Audrey Shafira
text: yummy good service good foods happy

title: Feel Matcha
name: Syifa Perbowo
text: Ordered via gojek and the matcha latte, ice, and espresso shot came separately 🥲 I didn’t ask for a DIY situation so it’s kinda annoying. Also there were clumps in the latte as well 🥲 Otherwise taste is amazing

title: Feel Matcha
name: Baiq Niken Rembulan
text: whattt a comfy place🫶🏻🫶🏻🫶🏻🫶🏻

title: Feel Matcha
name: Elen Septian
text:
Feel good..
Feel matcha..
Many time comes only for get matcha here..
If it's possible., get more space for smook 😁

title: Feel Matcha
name: Tika Chandrawisika
text: go get ur best martca!

title: Feel Matcha
name: Widya widya
text: Good ambience nice foods!

title: Anomali Coffee Menteng
name: Amelia D
text: Maybe this is my third or fourth time visiting for remote working, and I enjoy spending my 9 to 5 here. I never tried the cafe's internet connection because I always use my hotspot. The food is super good; opt for the Indonesian menu, and you're in for a tasty treat and fulfilling meal. I ordered Mie Ayam last time; the portion filled me up, the chicken cut was massive, and the condiments were plenty. I can't say the same about their coffee. I can't seem to enjoy the Americano, but I did enjoy the brown sugar coffee. If you're a sweet tooth, go for the Matcha Ice Blend. I was beating the heat with that.

title: Anomali Coffee Menteng
name: Rakyan Rachman Bimoseno
text: The parking has the capacity of 4 cars and around 30 motorbike. It has indoor area with quite a nice lighting and electric plugs in some tables. The outdoor area could accommodate 20-30 smokers. The americano served here has a strong taste of caffein and it also has a lot of other variant. Overall this place is good

title: Anomali Coffee Menteng
name: Ricky
text:
The food is great, the coffees are amazing.

The service is normal, you make order, pay then they will call you name.

The atmosphere is quite good when it’s not too crowded.

title: Anomali Coffee Menteng
name: vansul #isharemine
text: Good food, good coffee, good dessert 🤩 the place is nice for hanging out 👏 well done 👏

title: Anomali Coffee Menteng
name: boby gustanam
text: Nice place for hangout with your friend, family or community. Good ambience & concept, spacious place & parking lot, there are clean toilet and prayroom, selling coffeebeans and coffee tools, wifi. Single origin coffee is good and for non coffee i recommend dark choco rum, friendly barista and staff.

title: Anomali Coffee Menteng
name: Josh H
text:
Go to this place for first time while waiting on hospital final diagnose report.

Park space? Very small and need to have valet for car but seems bigger for motorcycle.
Price vs taste? Nothing special.
Interior? Big and have great potential.
Services? Reason why I give 2 star. The waiter not following health regulation to put face mask and gloves. A big NO for me to see that.

They dare to say Ngopi Tanpa Antri but I wait for almost 15 minutes to get order. No fast response, talk between them too much & seems uncoordinated between division.

Recommended? Of course not. Red flag for me to this Anomali menteng branch. Hopefully not impacted over their other branches.

title: Anomali Coffee Menteng
name: eka supariyanti
text: A pretty cozy place, not so crowded. There's in and out door room and it's nice to spend time here to work or to catch up with some friends. Lots of choices available, but yeah the price is pretty high and the food is 'okay' not that great.

title: Anomali Coffee Menteng
name: Andhina Ratri
text:
Been here quite frequent. Best option if you want to get a great coffee in the middle of Menteng area. It may not easy to be accessed by using public transport. If you want to go there by Trans Jakarta, MRT or KRL, you need to order ride hailing again to get to the place.

Anomali is already a well known local brand that serve good coffee, good ambience and also affordable price. Beside coffee, they also serve non-coffee such as tea (hot/cold) and chocolate based beverages. Usually coffee shop has limited food option, but anomali has light snack and also heavy meal. One stop go. Its a perfect place if you want to stay a bit longer to work or meet up. Anomali Menteng also has indoor and outdoor area. As far as I know, the outdoor area is always full 😅 dominated by visitor who like to smoke.

Last thing, they also sell coffee bean from a lot of plantations in Indonesia. You can grab the bean and brew your own coffee or make it as a gift for your friend or colleagues. Anomali coffee already on top of my mind when some friends need suggestion 👍

title: Anomali Coffee Menteng
name: Cluelinary
text:
One of the top-of-mind local coffee shop in Menteng area. They serve wide range of food from snacks such as donuts & pastry to heavy meals like pasta & fried rice.
My favorite here is the Delightful Duo package where you get coffee + pastry with budget around 50K, this surely is a good deal! Their regular-sized Hot Cappuccino has been my long-time companion here 🫰🏻

They have spacious indoor as well as outdoor areas and good wifi connection, so it's good place to simply hangout or work, although the parking space is limited especially for cars.

title: Anomali Coffee Menteng
name: Benedict Yan Yan P
text:
Named as cafe that serves coffee but they provide not only coffee. Available food for breakfast to dinner. Selected coffee, tea and chocolate are on set.

title: Anomali Coffee Menteng
name: ferdi firdaus
text:
Anomali Coffee Menteng offers a compelling blend of exceptional coffee and warm hospitality. The service is consistently top-notch, with staff members greeting patrons with genuine smiles and engaging in friendly conversations. Baristas, in particular, demonstrate a commendable level of customer interaction, actively inquiring about individual coffee preferences and providing insightful recommendations.

This personalized approach not only enhances the customer experience but also serves as an educational platform for coffee enthusiasts.

The quality of the coffee itself is undoubtedly a highlight. The roasting and brewing techniques are expertly executed, resulting in consistently well-prepared beverages. The presentation, while understated, maintains a sophisticated aesthetic.

The cafe's interior design, leaning towards a brutalist aesthetic, creates an intriguing and somewhat cozy ambiance. The use of wooden stools adds a touch of warmth, though the foam on some chairs could benefit from an upgrade for increased comfort.

While the overall experience at Anomali Coffee Menteng is highly positive, minor improvements could further enhance the customer experience. Specifically, an upgrade to the furniture, particularly the chair foam, would enhance comfort. Additionally, an improvement in Wi-Fi speed would be beneficial for those who wish to work or browse the internet while enjoying their coffee.
In conclusion, Anomali Coffee Menteng is a commendable establishment that successfully combines exceptional coffee, excellent service, and a unique ambiance. With minor refinements to furniture and Wi-Fi, this cafe has the potential to become an even more exceptional destination for coffee lovers in Menteng.

title: Anomali Coffee Menteng
name: TTHP
text:
I have been a regular customer of Anomali since 2016 and I cannot be more satisfied with my experience here. The coffee shop is located in Menteng and has a warm, homey ambiance. The smoking area at the front is hotter and dirtier, but feels more relaxed, while the indoor area is clean and comfortable. The decor showcases the coffee beans and various coffee brewing equipment, which is a nice touch.

The coffee served here is top-notch, with the local beans being brewed to perfection using the V60 method. The staff is friendly and welcoming, and even remember your name if you visit often enough. Despite some staff changes over the years, the quality of service remains consistent and I have even made new friends here.

The prices for coffee are very reasonable, especially for manual brews compared to other coffee shops. The food menu offers a range of options from side dishes to main courses, but can be a bit pricey.

Anomali is my go-to spot when I need to escape work and recharge. The atmosphere is comforting and the friendly staff only adds to the positive experience. Parking is easy, with free spots available in the morning and early afternoon, but the valet service is a convenient option if the lot is full. The Wi-Fi is strong and charging outlets are readily available, both inside and outside. Overall, I highly recommend Anomali to anyone looking for a comfortable and relaxing coffee shop experience.

title: MOKU Matcha
name: Dessy Febrina
text:
I tried the Kagura with regular milk during my visit, and I must say it was rather enjoyable.

While I may not be the most technical judge of matcha nuances, this one felt smooth and well balanced. The flavor was gentle, not overly grassy nor sharply bitter, which often makes matcha intimidating for some. Instead, it leaned toward a soft earthiness with a subtle sweetness from the milk that rounded everything out quite nicely.

The texture was creamy without being heavy, and the overall impression was clean and comforting. It is the sort of drink that feels approachable, even for someone who does not usually dissect the layers of matcha too closely.

A pleasant choice for a enjoyed afternoon at Oma Huis.

For comparison, I also took a pic of another customer ordering a lower-grade matcha ( Sora ) with cold whisking technique too, and it actually looked more vibrant in color and layering.

title: MOKU Matcha
name: Mandala Pack
text:
I’ve tried almost every matcha spot in Jakarta, and Moku somehow still caught me off guard. The first sip of their Kagura powder felt like the moment you realize, “Oh—this is what matcha is supposed to taste like.” It’s smooth, comforting, and has that quiet depth you only get from really good tea.

Their Earl Grey syrup deserves its own shoutout. I didn’t expect matcha and bergamot to work this well together, but it adds this soft, aromatic lift that makes the drink feel almost… elegant? And the strawberry jam is honestly wild. It tastes like someone actually cared enough to make it properly bright, real, and not overly sweet.

What I love most is that everything here feels intentional. Nothing tastes generic or rushed. It’s the kind of place you end up recommending to friends because you want them to experience it too. For me, Moku might just be the best matcha in Jakarta right now.

name: xatrios
text:
The place has a great ambience, complemented by very nice service from the team. They offer both indoor and outdoor seating, and I personally preferred sitting outdoors since the weather was nice.

I have no complaints about the coffee, as it was great and well balanced. Unfortunately, the donut was hard as a rock, making it difficult to eat and impossible to finish. I hope they can improve it next time.

title: Filosofi Kopi Pos Bloc
name: John Dean
text:
Pos Bloc is an interesting place to visit and Filosofi Kopi fits right in.
The menu is diverse and has some food options too. Some seats available near the counter, more space is there to the side of the building and of course outside.
Really like the creative atmosphere. The tea I had was refreshing. Cannot pay with cash.

title: Filosofi Kopi Pos Bloc
name: GR F
text:
Come here November 2024
1. Order Filkop Aren
2. Taste was good, still have the bitterness, so its not too light
3. Plenty of seatings

title: Filosofi Kopi Pos Bloc
name: Dareen Y
text: I loved the vibes!! The pancake was so soft and fluffy too. For your information, it's cashless. There isn't many comfortable seats. The staff were all really friendly. The outdoor seating looks really good when it's raining.

title: Filosofi Kopi Pos Bloc
name: TheRiceah
text:
Nice vibes and decent coffee. Atmosphere is very chill and laid back. We were in the area and theirs seemed like the most proper space to chill.

It’s entrance is located on the right of the main entrance of the PosBloc. Enter from the outside and not the main PosBloc entrance 😊

title: Filosofi Kopi Pos Bloc
name: Ria Tumimomor
text:
One of famous coffee shops here in Jakarta. Thankfully they open new outlet, located not far from Pasar Baru. The building area once for Philately office.
I like their hot chocolate, but such a small portion while the price ain’t cheap.
Their service is good, though. And the area is clean, maintaining health protocols as well. But not many seats available. Especially during weekend.

title: Filosofi Kopi Pos Bloc
name: Jannah Jalil
text:
Am from Malaysia. The pastries were super good, I ordered the croissant series (cinnamon & butter) 🥰

Butterscotch latte and lychee tea were also so good. However, the price is a bit pricey 🥲

title: Filosofi Kopi Pos Bloc
name: Daniel Wijaya
text: A bit expensive for the taste. Atmosphere is superb, if the weather sunny. Overall good place to meet with friends.

title: Filosofi Kopi Pos Bloc
name: Robert Silaen
text:
An old building, Nice spot for hangout or meeting with Clients or friends. Outdoor area and you can find many food merchant and coffee or drinks.
Around 50-75K per person to spend here to get food and drinks

title: Filosofi Kopi Pos Bloc
name: cleo cleo
text: We're visiting while it's started raining. It's quite a cozy place to spend time. Nice

title: Filosofi Kopi Pos Bloc
name: Ambroży Golachowski
text: Really great coffee, extremely nice and helpful stuff. Highly recommend!

title: Filosofi Kopi Pos Bloc
name: The Duchess of Culinary
text:
This is the second outlet of Filosofi Kopi in Jakarta and also one of the most crowded shop in Pos Bloc. The location is strategic as they are located in the front area. They only have small outdoor space for dining in and the small indoor space only for ordering.

Filosofi Kopi provides variant of espresso, milk based, coffee dessert, manual brew, non coffee, and tea beverages. Not only beverages, they also provide some snacks and pastries.

I tried Iced Long Black (IDR 26,000). It can be served hot as well. This black coffee has a strong robusta flavor. But for me, the caffeine level isn't that strong because I had it in the early evening, and still can sleep well in the night 😄

title: Filosofi Kopi Pos Bloc
name: Ami Savitri
text:
Located at Gedung Filateli Jakarta or known as Pos Bloc now, this is a branch from Filosofi Kopi at Blok M area.

I ordered latte and a shot of espresso, both tasted good. Their latte is creamy delicious! A bit pricey but hey, their taste is still better than the mermaid brand!

Too bad that they have more outdoor area than indoor. Sometimes what I need is the A.C.

title: Filosofi Kopi Pos Bloc
name: Mr Susatyo
text: This coffee shop is located in Pos Bloc. You can feel Dutch colonial vibes, a really cozy place to hang out with good coffee and pastries.

title: Filosofi Kopi Pos Bloc
name: Niko “Nhyx Ko” Batir
text: The coffee is fantastic. I seated inside so it’s a bit hot and there’s no AC nor fan.

title: Filosofi Kopi Pos Bloc
name: Ezra Natalyn
text: Nice coffee esp their latte but the double shot taste a lil bit spicy sensation maybe coz of the coffee bean I think. Space here is dominantly outdoor.

title: Filosofi Kopi Pos Bloc
name: Randy
text:
filosofi kopi pos blok
espresso machine : la marzocco linea pb
coffee grinder : mahlkonig e65s, ek43
coffee beans : filosofi kopi
brew method : espresso, hario switch, aero press

park at post office and this place got few sit, so its kind of competition to get sit, but you can sit inside the pos bloc also, prepare your peduli lindungi apps to access this place, bike park also available

title: Filosofi Kopi Pos Bloc
name: Nosimej
text: Cozy, good ice coffee. Cheese croissant was great.

title: Filosofi Kopi Pos Bloc
name: Janice Judono
text: What a comfortable place to hang out or as a working space! Not providing any Wifi, but there are many electric pockets near the wall. Great beverages with a quick and friendly services 😊✨

title: Anomali Coffee Menteng
name: Pravin Chandra
text: Visited today to have a quick breakfast, took almost an hour to get this breakfast

title: Anomali Coffee Menteng
name: Adella Suwandhi
text: A very great ambience. And this is probably the perfect place where you could try Indonesia's authentic coffee from a few provinces.

title: Anomali Coffee Menteng
name: Fikry Catur Farenza
text:
For me, one of the most wonderful things about this place is the moment I step inside and feel like I've entered a cozy haven. The warm and welcoming atmosphere instantly puts me at ease and makes me feel right at home. However, I must admit that this popular coffee spot tends to get quite busy. So, if you're a coffee lover like me and enjoy savoring each second in a calm and cafe like atmosphere. It would be best visiting it in the morning for a quick breakfast and start the day with a morning coffee.

I find it particularly enjoyable to have morning meetings or daily sprints at this cafe. The ambiance sets the perfect tone for productive discussions and collaborations. And, of course, it's even better when shared with friends who appreciate good coffee and a lovely cafe experience

title: Anomali Coffee Menteng
name: Natasya Flo
text:
One of my go-to coffee spots in Jakarta. Went here at 2 PM on a Tuesday, and it wasn’t too crowded. I ordered a cappuccino and croissant which was a great pairing. As usual, the staff was nice and friendly, but this visit stood out because a staff member, Mas Akbar, approached me and kindly offered a cupping test. Even though I didn’t feel qualified, Mas Akbar kindly guided me through the process and explained everything in detail. He served me two types of coffee: Toraja Mialo and Flores Colol.

It was a delightful experience, and to top it off, they gave me a voucher. The visit was truly memorable, and the hospitality is worth recommending!

title: Anomali Coffee Menteng
name: Shaleh Al Ghifari
text: My stars tell a lot already. Come here, try it yourself! Best manual brew ever!!!!!

title: Anomali Coffee Menteng
name: cherin virginia
text: Nice and cozy place to hangout with friend, family, and to work from everywhere, the are so humble, and its provide a delicious food and beverage, I love this place

title: Anomali Coffee Menteng
name: Serotonin Digger
text:
I have visited anomali coffee menteng more than 5 times! It’s always one place to go for slow meeting or just take a sip of coffee. Not too loud  and the barista, server, and waitresses are friendly!

Once join the coffee education with Indonesia Coffee Academy, i have enlightened about indonesian coffee and roastery process. The food was good, never failed! Love anomali🫶🏻🫶🏻🫶🏻

title: Anomali Coffee Menteng
name: Novi AH
text: Place is cozy and convenient... Easy to reach and should try ice creme brulle. They also have main course menu (fried rice and pasta)

title: Anomali Coffee Menteng
name: iqbaludin akbar
text: I ordered Dark Choco Rum, as it's name represent the taste character. They used true dark chocolate that has bitter and low sweet taste, also the clear rum taste.

title: Anomali Coffee Menteng
name: PD. SINAR REZEKI
text: Hot cappucino in the morning it's verry nice 😝

title: Anomali Coffee Menteng
name: iRas
text:
A very nice place to hang out with your friends, loved ones, or your colleagues. Makes you wanna stay more.
Cozy and quite spacious.

title: Anomali Coffee Menteng
name: Agung Ananda
text:
Excellent food and pastries. But the service is one of the the worst I’ve ever had.

Came around 12.50 on Friday, November 23rd. Tried to order at cashier, but told to wait at table. Had to wait 5 minutes until we got the server gave us the menu.

Ordered Kerinci and Java Frisa. After waiting for 5 minutes only then the waitress came back to tell me the Java Frisa ran out and that the coffee will take 10-15 minutes. What took her so long?

Biasanya Anomali bagus bgt service nya. Ini tumbenan berantakan banget 😔Waitress mba mba kerudung tolong kurangin sarkasnya. Saya rasa saya sudah cukup sopan, tp kenapa ya disarkasin dan diketawain mulu 🙏🏻

title: Anomali Coffee Menteng
name: qingracia
text: This morning they have a good coffee and all the workers are really cooperative with my little request and kinda funny tho. the atmosphere is really calming good places to chill and maybe do a little task from ur workplaces, but the outside area is just really damn hot ngl. in overall its a good vintage places and the places is worth the fame

title: Anomali Coffee Menteng
name: Aditya Kurnia
text: Good coffee, comfortable place, but they have small parking space

title: Anomali Coffee Menteng
name: Juan Carlos
text: I want to order Papua Single origin but the barista said they did not have it for almost a year. So I change my order to Sumatera's origin. It's amazing that they can put a Papua menu but didn't have it at their stock. I'm thinking to offer them some partnership to provide that kind of beans

title: Anomali Coffee Menteng
name: Danny Wongso
text: Suprisingly the food is so yummy, i picked gordon bleau, the coffee also goood

title: Anomali Coffee Menteng
name: Odin Olaya
text: Anomali Coffee is one of those places where you can be at home once you enter the place. The homey ambiance coupled with a friendly staff made me smile. The food is almost home cooked and the coffee, man the coffee is superb. One of the best coffees I have had outside of Ethiopia and Kenya, where I lived for almost a decade. And the price is just right, too, value for money at its best.

title: Anomali Coffee Menteng
name: Dudi Purwanto
text: Nice and fun local coffee shop around Menteng, Jakarta.  With such friendly service and a variety of food offerings that are so tempting to eat.  The various coffees are no less interesting and taste good to be enjoyed.  And lastly, the price is pocket friendly.

title: Anomali Coffee Menteng
name: Leslie Roberto
text:
For Anomali Coffee Menteng..
After I saw this cafe, I was very interested in going to and tasting the food because it seemed to suit my taste.  The place also looks quite spacious and will definitely feel very comfortable and make me feel at home sitting and enjoying the food there. I will come to enjoy according to my appetite. This place gonna be a better place to relax

text: I ordered hazelnut latte and it was okay, a bit too sweet for my taste. The location is very good in a vintage building of ex Jakarta's central post office. More indoor space and AC capacity are needed when it rains and guests could not use outdoor seating.

text: Like the ice coffee and the atmosphere..we are the type of people who like to hang out for chit chat..the feel is here..i hope more of unused government building can be transform to more good deed...

text: Well known coffee shop. I ordered long black. It was balanced and bold robust coffee. With some sweet notes.

I went there on Tuesday at 4.30 pm and unfortunately all the tables are full.

text: A nice coffee shop in Posbloc. I usually get their Ice Long Black for hot sunny afternoons. Tastes good and affordable 👍🏻

title: Filosofi Kopi Pos Bloc
name: Johan Dondokambey
text: The place is nicely strategic, located in the city's literal center, near a few of its historical landmarks. The pandemic makes entering rather cumbersome with the health protocols but inside it's quite cozy, provided that you get a place to sit. The menu I tried was nice, the snacks tasted good and the coffee was well brewed. The staff were helpful and accommodative, and paying for the items were easy through the system.

Self service (pick-up by the counter), limited indoor seats, accepts only QR and debit card as payment.

title: Tanamera Coffee Pacific Place
name: HW
text:
Daily manual brew, ice japanese coffee: sindoro beans, was good and tasty; fruity and light, easy to drink in the afternoon. Tanamera are well known for their great local beans and skillful barista and PP branch are exactly the manifestation of that image.

Place are located in OPP just next to PP mall, comfortable for both indoor and outdoor seating. Friendly staff too

Keep up the good work

title: Tanamera Coffee Pacific Place
name: Vega W
text: Sorry, but their “signature” bottled cold white is definitely not worth the price. I remember their coffee used to be good a long time ago, but I could barely taste any coffee in this (and yes, I shook it before serving), despite it being labeled a signature drink and recommended by the staff. It just tastes like oat milk, and it cost Rp78,122 (including tax, etc.) for one bottle. Wow. You might want to reconsider having your staff call this a “signature” drink or recommend it. Just suggest your fresh brew instead, that would be worth the price.

title: Tanamera Coffee Pacific Place
name: Evita Hadiz
text: This esblishment is very serious about their coffees. This is the place to meet and hangout for coffee lovers. They offer teas too btw. Nice ambiance but a little too dark inside the store as a result we had mosquitos accompanying us, and of course they had a meal too.  Lso the staff should be more careful moving heavy equipment inside the store as they make so much noice as it can be annoying. Enjoy a good brew and you can also purchase their specility coffee grounds; I usually buy some as gifts when I visit my friends overseas.

title: Tanamera Coffee Pacific Place
name: PUTRI ANDRINA GIANTI
text: The baristas are friendly, both beautiful and handsome, and the coffee is great, especially the caramel latte. The food is also delicious, and the place is comfortable for working from a café (WFC). There are plenty of electrical outlets, a wide variety of menu options, and attractive promotions as well.

title: Tanamera Coffee Pacific Place
name: Polevy Ezekiel
text: A hidden branch of @tanameracoffee tucked inside One Pacific Place building, consistent with their characteristic minimalist black-red design. Really love the calming and comfy ambience, suitable place to work or sit back while enjoying delicious coffee.

title: Tanamera Coffee Pacific Place
name: Yumarta Tansil
text:
Five days. Over 100 cups of coffee. And here I am—one very happy customer.
Huge shoutout to the amazing team at Tanamerah Coffee, Pacific Place for consistently delivering top-notch service. From my early morning caffeine fixes to those much-needed afternoon pick-me-ups, you guys absolutely nailed it every single time. Not a single complaint from me!
Special thanks to the dynamic six—Agung, Frans, Kartika, Aldan, Dinda, and Raihan—you all are the real MVPs. Your energy, friendliness, and dedication made every cup feel like it was brewed with extra care. The coffee wouldn’t have hit the same without you!

title: Tanamera Coffee Pacific Place
name: Peter Sutedja
text: favorite coffee spot for meetings around the SCBD area. access is a bit hidden for the casual mall-goers, but can be accessed with some short walk to the office area. coffee is nice, some may notice the pronounced acidity in their coffee but still within my taste preference, which for me adds to the complexity of the coffee.

title: Tanamera Coffee Pacific Place
name: Martiana Sipahutar
text: The coffee is always good at Tanamera but the food is so so, perhaps I try not so recommended one. I had calamari noodle today, it tasted like a heavily preserved noodle though the calamari and prawn were fresh.

title: Tanamera Coffee Pacific Place
name: Devita Kezia
text: Their coffee was good as always even though I'm not really a fan of their blend. The foods are somehow overpriced for me compared to the not so extraordinary taste. This branch was always full each time I visit so it was a little bit difficult to find table, not to mention the noise that was pretty disturbing if you need some quiet place to work or just to enjoy your coffee

title: Tanamera Coffee Pacific Place
name: Febri Fristian
text:
For all coffee hunters, Tanamera coffee is the one of the coffee shop that you can find in SCBD area, specifically inside the Pacific Place mall. Tanamera coffee can be found at the Lobby One Level B1, so you do not need to go inside the Pacific Place Mall.

I went there on weekday at noon and at night, at noon this place a bit crowded both for inside and outside area, especially from the lunch time to 3pm. A lot of people go there to enjoy their coffee. And at night also crowded as well. As a coffee roaster, Tanamera coffee also sell some kind of coffee beans if you want to brew it by yourself. They sell sweet bites for food and if you can not drink coffee, you can buy other menu without coffee.

If you are looking for a coffee, i suggest you to try their manual brew and their cold brew. For the manual brew last time i tried their Rasuna Natural beans with fruity hint taste. This place is really cozy if you want to work there, have a meeting, hangout with friends, or just want to enjoy the coffee alone. For the outside area also can do smoking there. Actually for the price is not expensive but not cheap as well. They accept debit card, credit card, and cash as payment.

title: Tanamera Coffee Pacific Place
name: Panca Soejitno
text: Order by go food, nasi goreng sapi is spice style, taste good complete with cracker. What i like is sourdoug banana not too sweet make a perfect companion for hot cappuccino. Packaging is good enough and hygine. Service need a time..for us is okay..

title: Tanamera Coffee Pacific Place
name: Desi Daily
text: If you looking for a hidden place to grab a coffee in the most modern mall in Jakarta, you can go here cause their location is in the corner outside of the building. Their coffee was good but their meals I think was so-so. I ordered spaghetti and it's too salty. The price is also affordable cause they were located at the Pasific Place which is mostly pricey. It's good to have an evening coffee with some snacks like banana cake or ubi goreng

title: Tanamera Coffee Pacific Place
name: Aryo Indarto
text:
A got to place to get a proper coffee In Pacific Place Mall. No wonder the place are very popular with people working from cafe their outdoor smoking area are large enough.

Came in for a take away here but their indoor area is quite comfortable except for the e cigarette branding in the middle of the room kinda kill the ambience.

title: Tanamera Coffee Pacific Place
name: Glutton San
text:
good coffee. even americano is good. place a bit warm because its crowded. don't sit outside unless you are ok with smoke smell.

food is good. lots of finger food.

internet is fast. if you want to study, have a nice noise cancelling phone

title: Tanamera Coffee Pacific Place
name: Rio Rinaldo
text: My favorite coffee chain in town is open at this posh high end mall. Tucked in the corner of One Pacific Building without any access from inside the mall. Still serves the best coffee and some yummy cakes, it's open early in the morning.

title: Tanamera Coffee Pacific Place
name: DEGA
text: Nice coffee, cozy and good food.

title: Tanamera Coffee Pacific Place
name: Ida Hariani
text: the right place to have a cup of coffee and snacks or cake or having lunch, this place is quite crowded during the lunch time, we can also have a reservation

title: Tanamera Coffee Pacific Place
name: Deo
text:
Tanamera in this location could've been a lot better if they could serve soy and oatmilk. Although they serve flat white with soy, the soy milk they use is Home Soy, which is probably one of the worse choices they could have with their good beans. It is quite a waste!

Other than that, the options for food/brunch here is quite good and the waiters are quite nice!

title: Tanamera Coffee Pacific Place
name: Frankie Mo. HD
text:
The guys who work here were very friendly and the taste of the food and coffee were excellent. i'll be happy to come back here again and again

I will say it was kind of tricky to find because you have to go through a different coffee shop (Coffee Bean)... And the entrance to that place is hidden behind a giant escalator... Go to the back, exit the building... and then turn right and follow signs.

I’ve been there three times at 19:00 on Saturdays and they refuse service because they say they’re closed when it’s clearly posted they close at 21:00.  The workers are lazy and play on their phones while chit chatting on the tables.  Will never go back here!!!

title: Tanamera Coffee Pacific Place
name: Andre E. Susanto
text:
Tried again, June 28th 2022. Still left the door open. When I asked the employees to please make an effort to close the door when they see it open, guess what their answer is. "sorry sir we cannot because if it is closed it makes our job difficult when we have to bring the food outside". Great, so rather them doing their job of providing service to the customers they would rather allow the customers who choose to stay inside with the AC and away from the cigarette smoke to suffer from the cigarette smoke from the outside. All for the sake of the employees not having to open and close the door when delivering food outside. The service here hasn't changed one bit. I left and didn't even eat or drink what I ordered and paid for.

If you want to sit and relax inside with the AC on, without being bothered by the smoke outside or without getting bitten by mosquitos coming in through the open door, be ready to get up and close the door EVERY TIME the employees goes in and out. Today while I was having a business meeting, (December 9th,between 7pm and 9 pm) one of the employee who is a short girl with glasses, deliberately don't close the doors behind her. As a matter of fact, on my way out, she deliberately opened the door widely. Not worth it for pretty good coffee. I'd rather have average or even bad coffee with air conditioning (without the hot air coming in from the door being left open) and no smoke, this means.... Starbucks.

This particular cafe has outdoor seats for smoking area so inside it's relatively clean air.

Tanamera has big outdoor seating for smoking and start serving from 7am.

This time we have coffee and kue lapis legit.

title: Dua Coffee @Cipete
name: Muhammad Agil Alattas
text: Nice place for WFC. Electrical socket and prayer room is available. Wifi is ok. I love the cheese cake and manual brew. Toilet is clean 👍

title: Dua Coffee @Cipete
name: Riri Astarina
text: I came for Zoom Meeting and the place is clean & comfort. Ice Japanese Coffee was great, forget the beans but I asked the Barista to choose it for me. I think it was strong because in the night I took this coffee I couldn’t sleep which means its good 🤩 For main course, I ordered Nasi Hainan which also great but a little bit salty for me. I asked to add pouch egg since I need more proteins. Overall it’s such a nice place! Love it.

title: Dua Coffee @Cipete
name: Bob Gunawan
text: Now, let’s address the elephant in the room: yes, the prices here are a *tad steeper* compared to your average neighborhood coffee shop. A flat white might set you back around IDR 45k–50k (or more), which feels a bit premium. But here’s the thing—Dua Coffee makes up for it with an experience that feels worth the splurge.

title: Dua Coffee @Cipete
name: Gea Wisesa
text:
One of the most coziest place to hangout and they serve a good meal and beverages‼️

My favorite from Dua is Petik Mangga & Kopi Kedua. Petik Mangga is mango juice served with mango cuts and nata de coco. Refreshing, right? Meanwhile Kopi Kedua is the creamiest coffee milk I've ever tried. Creamy consistency but you can still taste the strong coffee is one of a kind for me.

They have several menu for the meal that suits for hangout with your friends and spending long time here.

title: Dua Coffee @Cipete
name: Rian Ilmariandy
text: I like their nasi goreng buntut but they could've improved the meat, and actually add the meat instead of just fat sticking into the bone (it was hard to chew). Their mango drink is refreshing and I love it. The place is spacious, wifi is available, offers both indoor and outdoor experience. It gets crowded during the afternoon and evening. The staff can be more attentive and friendlier. Price was alright, still reasonable. Online and card payments are available. Parking is available for motorbikes but might be limited for cars.

title: Dua Coffee @Cipete
name: Ian
text:
This place is nice for hangout or working. You can definitely work from here, because my experience was nice, quiet, and spacy. Wifi is available too.

Foods were okay, portion was quite big for me. Nasi Goreng Buntut was bigger than my expectation, the buntut meat could be improved. Seasoning was okay to my preference. Drinks are okay, they have various from coffee and non-coffee.

Service was okay but it could be improved, more greetings or smiley voice. Serving time was good.

Indoor and outdoor space are available. Room space is big for up to 30 pax. Parking lot is spacious, car parking is available.

Price is reasonable, spent IDR 150k/2 pax. QRIS payment is available.

title: Dua Coffee @Cipete
name: Miranti Vidyasari
text:
I had a short stop for a quick online meeting here and ordered their ice latte (just ok, only creamy feels, less coffee hint) and their nasi ayam salted egg (nothing special as well, just okay, big rice portion, not so big chicken portion).
Not so cheap for those portions and sizes on both dishes and coffee.
Crowded parking lot, and noisy inside.
Better ask for non-smoking seats behind the counter area for less noise.

title: Dua Coffee @Cipete
name: Rinaldi
text:
Great place to get a cup of coffee, and food too.

Good selection of coffee, and western and local food. So not just snacks, we can get full here. The inside is surprisingly spacious, with large size tables to make it easy to eat. They also have a nice outside smoking area with lush plants.

The overall service and place are great, although it'd be great if it has more parking space.

title: Dua Coffee @Cipete
name: Sha
text:
It was a pleasant experience, ordered long black and was pleasantly surprised.  Spent the day WFC-ing here and there’s little to no complain about the ambiance as its not really a “family” cafe? At least when I went it was conducive for a wfc. Very limited parking space.

Ordered the salted egg, not bad but the salted egg flavor was nowhere to be found. Also ordered sirsakee and when i read the description, it has orange jelly and nata de coco but theres no jelly! Not even a sliver. Too tired to complain and the barista who served me wasnt as friendly as the one who welcomed me and served on the afternoon.

Will try the Bintaro branch!

title: Dua Coffee @Cipete
name: Rafi Ramadhan Seba
text: Spacious Musholla which is essential for Muslims that is looking for work from cafe places all day. During lunch time could get crowded, maybe due to weekends. Foods are great with friendly staffs. I ordered the nutella cheese cake, black squid, and the famous petik mangga. Really pleasant experience for reading book or work.

title: Dua Coffee @Cipete
name: Ridho A
text:
Nice menu. Good coffe, but i like most creamy regal coffee. Its very good to drink within hot weather. I also try spro chicken wings (baked chicken with spicy taste and espresso essence). Taste is good but i didnt feel the taste of espresso.

Dont forget to try klavee, combination between coconut and coffee. Good ambience for kids too.

title: Dua Coffee @Cipete
name: Antatia Febriana
text: this place menu favorite is “petik mangga” tasted so refreshing, but i also tried the affogato coffee which served cutely, double vanilla ice cream and good strong coffee, the new york cheese cake also taste good, its not the kind of heavy cheese cake, its light so really get long well with the coffee

title: Dua Coffee @Cipete

text: Nice coffee shop to hangout with your friends. Quite spacious smoking area outdoor. Great service from the staffs. Not only various types of coffee and tea selections are available, they have mouth watering dessert to be picked too. Price is considerably fair enough. Recommended for sure when you need decent coffee in Cipete area.

title: Dua Coffee @Cipete
name: HNEPP
text:
Good choice when you are around Cipete raya. Their coffee is so good, not just exposing bitter but it came with fruity and brightness, either latte or black.

The coffee is little bit pricey in small portion but you need to try.

title: Dua Coffee @Cipete
name: Cathy
text:
Ordered: Picollo 28k
Taste nice, good service, good ambience, and they have indoor and outdoor for smoking area. They also have main course menu.
Their parking lot quite big.

title: Dua Coffee @Cipete
name: Nadya
text:
Love it. Strategic place, easy to find (in front of  maxx coffee). Such a perfect place to hang out, meeting, do some work, or just enjoy some coffee. The place is quite big, the parking space is big, too. The ambience is great, they have smoking and non smoking area. The service is great and they have free wifi, too.

The price is not too expensive. Ordered their hot cappuccino and New York Cheesecake. The cheesecake is so perfect. Its soft, delicious, not too sweet, and you can still taste the cheese, but the portion is a lil bit small for me. The cappuccino is delicious.

They have charging port under some seat, bjg sofa, and big table so this is perfect for meeting or do your work.

title: Dua Coffee @Cipete
name: Reihan Mp
text:
Love this place. Great food, great coffee, and great hospitality from the moment I entered the room.

I ordered their ayam telor asin for lunch. Generous portion and they seem to fry the chicken by order, so no soggy fried chickens around here. I don't know if that is how they intend to plate the food though (see pic).

Don't know if it's intentional or not, but my orders were always being brought to my table by the person who took my order at the cashier. I think it's a pretty nice gesture.

One thing that kinda annoyed me though, the staffs at the cashier and the roasting place at the back were playing different songs that overlaps with each other.. not sure to which one I should jam to

title: Dua Coffee @Cipete
name: Lia Sirait
text:
Many coffee shops are established/opened along Cipete Raya, especially near to the location of Dua. Even so, I recommend you this shop to enjoy coffee dine in. There are various chairs, benches and sofas in Dua. Dua serves manual brew coffee and another types of coffee serving.

Besides coffee, Dua also has choices of non coffee beverage. Don't worry and don't need to go anywhere if you are hungry, Dua offers meals: appetizer, toast, even maincourse.

Bring meal or drink from outside is forbidden here.

title: MOKU Matcha
name: Nida Nabillah Santoso
text: Nice place

title: MOKU Matcha
name: Trevor Joe
text: best one in jkt! defo a must try.

title: MOKU Matcha
name: Littlebeasty9901 “Littlebeasty9901”
text:
但如果你受够了Blok M的拥挤排队，一定要转弯来到 Cikajang。这里藏着一家懂“抹茶灵魂”的宝藏店 —— MOKU 🐎。

🍃 不同于随处可见的甜腻抹茶饮品，这里的选择专业得让人心动：从Seika、Kagura到Takumi，每一款都有自己的“风味雷达图”。有的偏Umami（鲜味），有的带着坚果香，你可以根据当下的心情定制。

店面不大，极简的门脸，相比Block M的嘈杂，这里的空气似乎都慢了下来。

💰 价格参考：根据选的茶粉不同，定价非常考究

🌟 私心推荐：如果你喜欢浓郁口感，尝试 Takumi，如果你喜欢清爽平衡，Ebisu 是不会出错的选择。

title: MOKU Matcha
name: Medisa Putri A. L.
text:
New Matcha Bar di Jakarta, pecinta Matcha wajib kesini deh. Karna harga nya super affordable dari 40 ribu - 110rb aja per cup nya, mereka pakai powder premium dan susu yang lactose free juga loh.

Tempat nya sangat cozy, aesthetic dan clean, kakak barista nya juga baik, ramah, dan informatif sekali.

Disini, mereka juga menawarkan :
• 9 Pilihan Matcha Powder
• 6 Opsi Susu / Non Diary
• 7 Macam Topping
• 8 Jenis Pemanis

Hari ini aku beli yang : Ebisu Matcha di harga 73ribu, dengan Normal Sugar & Normal Iced, dan Lactose Free Milk. Rasanya mewah bangeet, light, smooth, nutty dan creamy.

title: MOKU Matcha
name: olyn carolyn
text: Aku coba yang matcha latte Niwa. Katanya paling best seller, aku request yg hot dan pakai oatmilk. Aku suka. Rasa pahit matchanya nendang banget dan blend di mulut. Aku memang suka matcha yang terasa legit di mulut 😌

title: MOKU Matcha
name: Miw
text: Tempatnya salah satu tenant di oma huis. Mba2nya sangat helpful buat rekomenin matcha. Matchanya enak bgt niwa+classic whisked+sea salt cream no sugar best, less bitter, creamy, gak bau rumput. Love bgt😭💚.

title: MOKU Matcha
name: Nathania Nadia Budiman
text: Gile sih ini satu2nya cafe yg jual matcha smp jam 12 malem deh... Bukanya pagi pula jam 7... Sy sempet nongki weekend bnrn smp jam 12 loh itu, free valet juga yah kasih tip seikhlasnya... Matcha powder ny juga ga maen2, kata mbak ny yg favorit org2 niwa terus sy cobain kagura juga karena deep umami sm roasted jadi flavornya lebih keluar gitu, terus bisa pk topping, yg ichigo puree nambah 20k..ogura juga 20k, ada topping laen juga ky banana pudding, sea salt smp es krim syg waktu sy dtg abis sea salt ny bikin penasaran juga... Seru sih ini buat nongki ada lagu2 jadul yang diputer khas oma huis cuma kekencengan volumenya klo bet ngobrol, agak ribut... Terus syg mejanya ga banyak klo mau nongki cuma 3-4 meja.. Untungnya bs pk meja resto laen karena udah pada tutup misalnya di lantai atas hehehe...

title: MOKU Matcha
name: Deeva Alexia
text:
Sooooo good, such a good find jujur🥹 cuma berkelana ke Oma Huis, bahkan aku gatau kalo ada tempat ini

Writing this during my… fourth? fifth? visit!!! Def the best, rasanya kayak kalau bikin matcha sendiri di rumah (which i haven’t been doing in a while)🥹

A must try sih kalau kalian lagi ke Oma Huis, ke Cikajang, ke Selatan! Worth the price juga (cause i keep coming back)❤️‍🔥

So happy to find a go-to matcha after beberapa kali zonk kalau nyoba2 matcha di luar

title: MOKU Matcha
name: Hasnasgf
text:
Lokasinya ada di Oma Huis.
Disini pilihan menunya banyak banget, jadi mesennya aja udah experience sendiri.
Minta yang tehnya berasa dan gak gitu manis, direkomendasiin Oku, dengan topping Strawberry puree.
Hint pait dari matchanya, ketemu manis dari strawberry puree, cocok banget!
Next mau coba menu yang ada note sweetnya ah~

text: Smoothnya mendekati uk* matcha, matchanya juga kerasa, servernya juga ramah menjelaskan masing2 tipe matcha dan penyajian

title: MOKU Matcha
name: Tiara Nabila
text:
Tbh, hidden gem ditengah senopati ada matcha house yg decent.

Susu pake Japan Fresh Milk, Ice nya pke unmineral jd bener2 focus ke taste dan quality. Must Try Kagura! Buat harga dia under 88K worth to try banget karena umami & cukup balance

Tapi kalau suka yg nutty bisa coba Ebisu~ Grainy, Vegetal, dan Umami. Saranku tetep pakein susu kalau kamu ga suka yang sepet tp kalau dibuat usucha hint umaminya kenceng.

Worth to try😚 semoga next ada tempat buat duduk2 yang lebih nyaman.

It's a nice store for coffee lovers. Customers can choose between many options that match almost all budgets. Good and convenient offers with an elite selection of coffee beans.

Store is designed based on item categories with a coffee bar for tasting.

Thanks to Mr. Ungar (Omar) who dedicated a lot of time to showing me the products to help me choose the best items for my needs.

text: Very nice and exclusive coffee shop where you can buy everything that makes drinking coffee an experience. The service is very nice, friendly and always has a smile on their faces...great good and fresh coffee.  Great high quality coffee and espresso machines for sale and all the accessories you need to make a good coffee.

title: Otten Coffee Jakarta - Senopati

text: They sell coffee beans or ground,coffee machine, grinder, roaster, and many kind of barista tools. Quite complete.  Nice display. They provide coffee tester too. All are sold at the same price with their online shops, but sometimes the online shop gives attractive deals, like weekend deals.

text:
Show room, gallery and all coffee supply store!

Service : 4/5  knowledgeable and very helpful attendants.
Prices : 3/5 prices vary depending on items brand etc.
Atmosphere : 5/5 well designed and designed. The coffee shop above is uniquely designed. Great ambiance and atmosphere. And the delicious coffee smell! Nyaaam

Recommended for all the quality coffee supplies.

A specialty store , provide everything you need as a coffee drinker , barista , coffee shop , or we can say its a 101 coffee store.
They provide all the good quality equipment , all the good quality roasted bean , and evrything you need to make a coffee.
We can enjoy the store ambience and enjoy every area of the store to get anything we want.

Very recomended to visit , all the price is worth it with the quality you need.

Nice decoration and atmosphere with good  coffee aroma. Before i decide what coffee wanna pick, the employee let me taste a small cup.

text: The perfect coffee tools store. You can find anything about coffee machine & brewing. At 2nd floor there's small cafe with delicious coffee. I think I will come again and again and again. Move my working hours there 💖

Also, they sell the machine and tools too from manual to the sophisticated one.

Wow.

title: Otten Coffee Jakarta - Senopati
name: Kuro House of Craft
text: Thank you Otten & Google for the free voucher as local guide. It is my first time tried Lintong coffee. It awesome arabica, fragrant and nice. I like the packaging and how easy to make coffee.. good job. I will shop more next.

text: Smaller compared to their branch in Bandung. Staff is helpfull and the place also sell coffee machines.

title: Otten Coffee Jakarta - Senopati
name: Atta Abdulaziz “‫عطا‬‎”
text:
I’ve been a coffee enthusiast for years, and finding a place like Otten Coffee is a rare treat. From the moment you step through the doors, it’s clear that this isn't just a shop—it’s a destination for anyone who takes their caffeine seriously. The aroma of freshly roasted beans sets the stage for what is consistently an exceptional experience.
The staff here are incredibly knowledgeable and clearly passionate about their craft. They don’t just take your order; they are happy to discuss flavor profiles, origin stories, and the nuances of different brewing methods. I recently tried a V60 manual brew with one of their Indonesian single-origin beans, and the clarity and balance were absolutely spot on.
Beyond the beverage itself, the ambiance is professional, modern, and inviting. It’s an ideal environment for a focused work session or a casual business meeting. Furthermore, their retail section is a paradise for home baristas, offering everything from high-end espresso machines to specialty accessories. If you are looking for a genuine specialty coffee experience rather than just a quick fix, Otten Coffee is the gold standard. I’ll definitely be a regular visitor!

title: Otten Coffee Jakarta - Senopati
name: Paula Sylvia
text: Visiting otten store in jakarta was so exciting. Very friendly customer service. They will assist you around the store.  There's  a small bar in the level 1 to taste the coffee as well. So I could decide which beans should i get. On the second level you can grab coffee from fore and chill as well.  I had a good time here 🖤

title: Otten Coffee Jakarta - Senopati
name: ida luther
text: Coffee lover heavens! You can get a vast array of barista tools there while enjoying a great cup of Joe. Everything that you need to make a great cup of coffee are there. If you have questions, look for one of the guide and they’ll help you till you are satisfy with your choices. You can also shop at their online store.

title: Otten Coffee Jakarta - Senopati
name: Andreas Deimos Smith
text:
It's actually a coffee machine shop, all in one place (:

Starting from the machine, the glass, the pipet, the grinder, the little parts, you can find it all here. Oh, and you could buy their specially roasted coffee beans too!

You can also service your machine here  if it somehow not working well or broken, this place offers you to the path of coffee god (:

title: Otten Coffee Jakarta - Senopati

Place for buy coffee tools, espresso machine, grinders, coffee bean... All in one coffee stop.

Dont spend too much time here, your money will turn into coffee tools.

text: Not bad at all. Very nice environment. Relaxed, friendly, welcoming. Food is quite good and arrives quickly. Selection and quality of coffee is very good. Eggs Benedict was delicious. I would like to return to try other items from the menu. Like a few of the other desserts...

Coffee shop gaul di daerah Cipete

They provide smoking and non-smoking area. Staffs are friendly, but they encourage all customers not to bring any food and drink from outside. If you happen to do so, they will kindly keep your food in their refridge.

I ordered cold drip (which tastes good with fruity after taste but not so strong), creme brulee (which tastes so-so with quite soft texture) and nutella cheese cake (which just tastes sweet but yummy)

text: Ice latte with vanilla syrup is good. One of the best piccolo I’ve ever had. Nice concept coffee shop. Indoor and outdoor area. It’s usually full on weekend.

Had a nice experience with the lady barista (the one with a tattoo on her arm). She's very helpful and always smiling.

They also served ice cream. Tried their vanilla marie regal, it was OK.

title: Dua Coffee @Cipete

text: Ordered petik mangga (sweet beverage). Nice place to hangout with colleagues or friends

title: Dua Coffee @Cipete
name: Irene Santoso
text:
Nice place to have coffee! Would recommend it to anyone in Cipete area to drop by.
They have 2 separate bars for serving coffee. First is espresso bar, which you probably won’t miss because that’s where you will be ordering from and make payments. The other bar is manual brew bar at the end of the room.
I personally like their espresso and Iced Americano. They also have interesting selections of manual brew beans from their own roastery.
Their manual brew beans are for sale, so you could bring some home if you’d like. I would recommend to try ordering your manual brew beans that you’re interested in and have it brewed there to see if you like it or not before deciding to buy any of them.
Apart from coffee drinks they also have non-coffee items such as fruit juices. I honestly didn’t try any but during the time I was there I saw some couriers going in and out picking up orders of the bottled fruit juices,especially the mango.
If you’re feeling like snacking you might want to try their butter croissant. I was recommended to try it so I did, and it was quite a good choice to accompany the coffee.

title: Dua Coffee @Cipete
name: Dan McNair
text: Really cute place with really nice coffee. The espresso menu seemed a bit limited... that's my only complaint. Would have loved to see cappuccino make the list. I will say that my piccolo was quite good and the foam and foam art was done very well. I'll likely be back.

title: Dua Coffee @Cipete

text: If you're looking for a great coffee with affordable yet reasonable price, then this is a perfect place to have one. They also serve tea, snack and meal.

text: Established in 2012, Otten Coffee is a startup specialty coffee shop which sells various coffee beans and coffee equipments. title: Otten Coffee Jakarta - Senopati
name: A. Natasha
text:
I was on the hunt for a specific Delonghi coffee machine, which is getting pretty hard to find in Jakarta. I’d exchanged some WhatsApp messages with their team, though the details about availability were a bit unclear. Since the price was competitive, I decided to visit the store.

Ruki greeted me right away and asked what I was looking for. He was super helpful, though I had to ask a few extra questions to get all the details I needed—like you do when making a purchase. He worked quickly, attentively, and efficiently. But then, to my surprise, another associate came over and asked if I had made an appointment. I mentioned that Ruki was already helping me, but he repeated the question. I simply answered “no,” but it left me wondering if this interaction was productive for anyone involved.

Maybe he didn’t know I was already being assisted, but it came across as a bit rude and not very helpful. Appointment or not, I was there and clearly needed assistance, right? That small hiccup left a slightly bitter note on an otherwise great shopping experience. Ruki continued being attentive, guiding me through each step and helping me understand more about the unit I was about to buy.

On a lighter note, this shop is a fantastic place to not only buy supplies but also learn about the coffee business in Indonesia. I noticed a few foreign customers there as well, and the owner or manager was sharing valuable insights—not just about the products they sell, but also about growing a coffee business here. The lively vibe adds a unique touch to the shopping experience!

Very delicious!!!!

The matcha & choco mint is fantastic! The taste is rich!

The fries is also well cooked! Very crispy and is very tasty with the seaweed and sauce. It has the Japanese flavour.

There are a lot more pastries that looked very delicious. I totally recommend this place to everyone.

title: Natsuka Cafe
name: Misus Yaya
text:
was sitting at the center table thinking they’d whisk my ceremonial matcha latte (220k—the priciest one on the menu) in front of me, but nope. There were lots of staff around, but no one noticed me even after I waved a few times. I had to stand up and walk over just to get a staff attention. Then my drink just showed up, no whisking in front of me, it was made behind the counter.

I also asked for a bit of water to go with the leftover ice, and they said they don’t serve water. Most cafes like this in Jakarta at least have a self-serve water dispenser for customers. I spent over 350k+ on two matcha drinks, not only I didn’t get to see the whisking, I also couldn’t have some water 🥲

The matcha tasted great, but for the price and the vibe they’re going for, I expected better service.

title: Natsuka Cafe
name: Irene Debora
text:
One of my top 3 matcha spots in Jakarta 🍵

The matcha here is creamy with a full-bodied taste. My go-to orders are the double matcha and chiizu matcha.
Last time I visited, I also tried their gingerbread matcha (Christmas edition) and it was surprisingly good.

They don’t allow pets inside, but the staff was kind enough to let us sit outside and even brought chairs for us.

A solid spot for matcha lovers — definitely worth trying!
