name: Shirley Suharli
text: A place with a nice and aesthetic atmosphere to eat with family or friends

title: ONNI House Jakarta
name: Lou Ve
text: The food was mediocre; not delicious enough.  The portion was large enough for one person, though I couldn't finish it because I didn't like it. The decoration was beautiful, but the building was poorly maintained.  Many flies were flying around, so annoying.

title: ONNI House Jakarta
name: M. CS
text: Nice ambience, with affordable food. The food taste okay, and I actually quite like their lemon cheesecake. But the service is terrible, I have a lot of trouble to attract the waiters attention. Also, the streets are portaled so you'll have to go around and look for a way there, tho they give some arrow signs along the way, I miss the sign for quite sometime, and the taxi I booked to pick me up got lost a few times too. So far still okay, might come back again after covid is over.

title: ONNI House Jakarta
name: Nindy Ratih Febrianti
text: I had an amazing dining experience at ONNI House Jakarta! The Dori asam pedas set was bursting with flavor, the beef yakiniku donburi was a perfect balance of textures, and the tiramisu was a delightful way to end the meal. The attention to detail in their Christmas decorations added a festive and cozy ambiance. The staff was friendly, and the overall atmosphere made it a memorable visit. Highly recommend for a great culinary and festive experience! 🎄🍽️

title: ONNI House Jakarta
name: Fitkamgummy
text:
Went here for a quick hangout with a friend. This place ambience is AMAZING. They have different theme all year round. I visited during halloween/autumn theme. Cant wait to see what theyll come up with for Christmas 🥰✨✨

Food wise, it’s tasty. I ordered creamy carbonara and it came with croutons and breadcrumbs? 😂 i dont get why it has breadcrumbs but its aight. The service is superb too, i asked for extra pepper on the side, thinking theyd just add a tiny teaspoon but it looked like they gave me a whole bottle of black pepper 😭🤣❤️ that was so extra but i felt appreciated, thank you!

title: ONNI House Jakarta
name: Rayhanah Shaliha
text:
Oh, what a beautiful place! I'm reading poem about love and writing speech for my engagement party in this atmosphere, and what a beautiful place to read and write heartfelt things. I love the decorations.

The coffee is light, I asked for a no-sugar one, and oh how everything is just right! The pizza and the fish and chips, delicioso! ❤️❤️❤️

title: ONNI House Jakarta
name: Simon T.
text: Cool, cozy, chic little restaurant with a flower shop built in.  Jazz music was playing in the background.  Whole place was very beautifully decorated; lots of people were taking pictures all over different parts of the restaurant.  Food was excellent and very reasonably priced.  Tables were available inside as well as outside.  Very clean environment, sink was available for washing hands, washrooms were also very clean.  Staff was friendly and polite.  I would definitely return to this place.

title: ONNI House Jakarta
name: MICH LOVE EAT
text:
It is SUMMER Time and the season where flowers are bloom so pretty. Onni House are the best choices to pick, where you can dine in and enjoy the ambience which is
very romantic, homey, pretty and full of beautiful fresh flowers. Thanks to Onni House for invitation to the Private Dinning Session with a theme of "Onni Tropical Luncheon" This time, Onni House served so much better taste of food, rich in flavor and nice plating, which is brought from a new beloved chef Robert Hansen, following with a pampering
session from Beaute Premiere & Feliz.

There are some menu that Onni House served which is from Appetizer, Main Course and Desserts, include their Cute Bluish Welcome Drink.

1. Furikake Fries

Basically it's a potato chips which is deep fried until golden brown and super crunchy. I love this appetizer so much, Oh My God. The "Umami" Flavor come from fish sauce and Furikake, which is much healthier in a way, than MSG (of course), and doesn't make me thirsty afterwards. They give generous amount of it, in one plate, and no wonder everyone loves it too. Apart from the potato in matches shapes, they got also Nori (seaweed) and White Sesame Seed. Maybe in Indonesian more likely to be
"Kentang Ebi", but this one are made with Furikake instead of Ebi. Thumbs up to the Chef, Good Job.

2. Chicken Karage with Sambal Bawang

Nice Karage to triggers my appetite before the main course. Not like your regular fried chicken, it's super juicy and the skin are crunchy, the sambal bawang is the highlight. So Spicy and savory, nicely matched with the Karage. I just feel like, having this every day for snacking.
The Sambal are the champion, especially if you guys love
spicy food, this one is perfect!

3. Caesar Salad with Grilled Chicken

I love salad, and i'm grateful that Onni served this menu. The Romaine Lettuce are so fresh and crisp, i can even hear the sound when i chew the lettuce itself. This salad are served with hard boiled egg, cherry tomatoes, grilled chicken and grated parmesan cheese. The cheese are so yummy, when it all come together in one bite, such as in heaven. There is a savory, sweet and crunchy,
Umami. Bring all my conscious senses come together, to feel, see, and listen. This is the perfect choices for you guys who love healthy food. The Chicken also very tender and well marinated, that's why, no need ketchup or chili sauce anymore, it's already taste good by itself.

4. Gulai Salmon

i'm so suprised with this menu, which is so taste so rich
and bring Indonesian culture in one dish. I think it suitable for the Lebaran season, which is more to coconut milk (santan), but this one is exceptional, because it's Salmon instead of Chicken. The gravy sauce, are so rich, creamy, strong and tasty. The cinnamon are a little bit too strong in my humble opinion, but in a good way. i think it's better to served with plain rice because the soup are to good to be true. It come with lime, so by the time i squeeze it to the Gulai Salmon, it give sour taste and more fresh. It come with long beans and cherry tomatoes. The size of the salmon are big as well, so you guys should be satisfied.

5. Opor Baked Rice

What a twist of OPOR dishes. It's a fusion and for you
guys who love rice, this is the right choices. The rice are so fluffy inside, and on top are baked nicely with some halved cherry tomatoes. The first time i scoop out, i can feel it was so creamy, and its true. The fish are so tender, and the taste are pretty balance.

6. Matcha Brulee

I like dessert always, and this Matcha Brulee wrapped up
the whole dining experiences. The matcha are so creamy, and the caramel on top, taste like candy, so it was crunchy and perfect taste for you guys who love sweets. The combination of creamy matcha, with coconut and banana, are so pretty, especially the mint and whipped cream. You should order this one when you visit Onni House.

7. Dragon of Summer

This drink are So fresh, sweet and the lychee are so fresh! Nice drinks after having a big meal and bloated tummy. I'm so happy and grateful.

instagram @Mich.Love.Eat

title: ONNI House Jakarta
name: Dinar Utami
text: We came here for brunch on a saturday and it wasn't that packed. Side note, I'd made a reservation before coming. It has a cozy and nice atmosphere, a cute place to take photos. The staff and their service were great when we were there but the foods were just okay for the price, some of them were way too salty to my liking. Oh, they also sell knick knacks.

title: ONNI House Jakarta
name: winnie lin
text:
This the second I go to onni house.
The waiter & waitress are super friendly and attentive.
Recommend comfort food: Home made spaghetti bolognaise.
Price are affordable
Great decoration, great music, clean environment

title: ONNI House Jakarta
name: Nitya Putri Djiwandari
text: Great ambience, atmosphere, and food drink too! How beautiful all interior in this cafe. Cozy cafe to work at cafe. Waiters very very very helpful! So kind, full of smile, and fast respon. Decoration halloween very cute too. And I see the waiters give paper and pencil color to the kids so they can drawing and coloring.  So cute!

title: ONNI House Jakarta
name: martina saraswati
text:
All good 🫶🏻🫶🏻
Order meatball pasta, roasted chicken, furikake fried & tiramissu.
Nothing fails me 😍
Ambience very comfy & staff really nice

title: ONNI House Jakarta
name: Rudi Wang
text: All the staff are quite friendly. Almost all the foods are taste really good. You should try it nasi goreng buntut and rice bowl. This cafe is quite cozy with some of lamps and decorative plants. unfortunately this cafe is often booked for certain events so it seems crowded and noisy.

title: ONNI House Jakarta
name: Ratu Fidela
text:
The atmosphere is good. The food is unique. The price is okay.

Definitely will come again.

title: ONNI House Jakarta
name: Marlie38
text: Nice hangout place, pretty interior, good food, excellence service. Onni house change the theme interior every few months. So comfortable for chill out, instagramable almost every spot. Limited parking lot should be considered.

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Lee Wen Hao
text: The food is great and fresh. The waiters and waitresses also tended to my special request for salad. I would say their service is beyond words. Burger is also great, it's filling and extremely satisfying for a hungry stomach. The pandan latte is quite special, but I can taste it's not real pandan but pandan essence. I appreciate it when they gave me a free kitsune cookie. Thanks for the great service and great food overall!

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Yenny Bachtiar
text:
Their truffle mac and cheese is superb! It become my favourite light bites here!

Beef bacon  burger also good, their smokey bacon overshadows the taste of the burger. The Bun also a premium one.

Unfortunately i don't sip their signature coffee neither chai latte.

Another occasion maybe?

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Imam
text:
I really enjoyed my time at Café Kitsuné Jakarta. The ambience is stylish but still feels warm and welcoming. Every corner of the café is well designed, making it a great place to sit, relax, or even work for a while.

The coffee tastes great and is well balanced, and the pastries complement the drinks perfectly. The staff is polite and attentive without being intrusive. Overall, it’s a lovely café experience and I would definitely come back again

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: M *
text:
Have tried the Kitsune Cafe in Bali, which is a very good cafe. The Jakarta branch also makes good coffee, including double shots and strong coffee. However, it somehow feels a bit watery for the coffee.

The croque Monsieur is a bit peculiar. It’s a sandwich topped with tuna, which isn’t exactly the most appealing dish. The sandwich itself is just average at best, nothing special. The pancake is also a bit strange. It’s not well-made and a bit too thick.

Although the menu is the same, the Bali branch is better overall. might just skip brunch here based on this experience and try other menu items during another time. Hopefully better.

The smoking and non-smoking areas are separated, but not confined, so I’m not sure if more smoke will eventually be detectable in the non-smoking area when there aren’t any smokers around. It’s highly likely, so it’s not the best place to relax for non-smokers.

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Arief N
text: I visited cafe kitsune in Ashta district 8 before my meeting. Had their ham sandwich and ice americano, both menu tasted great and will come back again in the future!

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Yeni Nuraeni
text:
I recently visited Café Kitsuné at Astha Jakarta and had a great overall experience. The atmosphere is stylish, cozy, and very well-designed—perfect for relaxing or spending time with friends.

I tried their Ice Ube Latte, which was pleasantly creamy with a rich ube flavor that wasn’t overly sweet. It’s a unique drink and definitely worth trying if you enjoy something different from the usual coffee options.

For food, I ordered the Grilled Chicken Nanban, and it was delicious. The chicken was tender, well-seasoned, and nicely balanced with the tangy sauce. The portion was satisfying and paired well with the drink.

The service was friendly and attentive, contributing to a comfortable dining experience. Overall, Café Kitsuné Astha Jakarta offers great drinks, good food, and a beautiful ambience. Highly recommended!

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: wicket warrick
text: The food and service are remarkable but the non-smoking area cannot be smokier.  Basically there is not segregation between smoking and non-smoking areas.  The whole restaurant is very smoky.

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Arti Soejitno
text: Heard it’s originally popular in French as a unique blend of Japanese and French cuisines! Voila.. Meet my expectations! Tried their Pink rigatoni with rich creamy sauce and a thick slice of fresh pan-seared salmon topping, perfect size and taste! Their steak also delicious. Am quite happy to find Yuzu tea here 🥹 original taste too… and their tiramisu is amazing! Waiter are sweet, friendly and informative, she gave us good recommendations! Well done Kitsune Jakarta, will come back to try other menu 🖤

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: R. Agusta
text:
I had breakfast Egg benedict , Pancake , And Matcha Latte.
Overall, good taste. But the pancake need a little bit more fluffy and soft. I think the dough need to add more butter? dunno.
I like the ambience, green color and wood, like Japan's ambience.
I'll be back to taste more food.

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Stevannie Gunawan
text: I like the vibe of the place, it’s roomy and not crowded which perfect for either a hangout place with friends or simply to work. We ordered all 3 iced drinks: matcha, chai, & caramel - all are very watery and we barely taste anything, very sad :(

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Dila Paramita
text:
For those who are looking for a fancy place to dine, just come here👍
They will serve you with a well-mannered service, and provide you a classy ambience for dinning. Fyi, the meals and beverages are quite pricey but I think all of their food/beverages served in a good taste. Last time, I and my friend ordered a plate of Beef Steak Frites, a plate of roasted chicken, and a 750ml mineral water. It costs almost IDR 700k. It’s ok, i think it’s still a standard price for this kind of restaurant. You will find many great photo spots inside and outside the restaurant✨

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Imas Yuliani
text:
Really like the vibe of this place a lot!!! Sea salt latte is my go to it’s the best sea salt latte ever!!!

The shortbread also very cuteee 🦊🦊

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Reza Soeyono
text: Great place and great food. Great combination in a heart of Senopati Business District Area. This place have one of the best Burger in town. Aside, the Steak is also Frites is very good, and the dessets are very nice as well: Yuzu Pannacotta & Tiramisu!!

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Agatha Claudia
text:
I have seen kitsune cafe abroad such as in south Korea, so when they open their first branch in Ashta, it gives me curiosity to try it even more.

Entrance is accessible through their clothing store maison kitsune, and staff from the clothing store is already welcoming.
Place is spacious, many seatings , option for smoking and non smoking, dim lights, simple decor, and quiet a nice ambience. Sadly, the seatings might not well maintained since has dirt on the sofa couch and kinda unpleasant seeing it especially in an international on the higher end standard restaurant.

Service is great, they politely ask for your name for the table and the waiter and waitresses greet and serve us by using our name, a nice touch of hospitality.
They are fast and quick as well, but because too spacious sometimes the waiter is kinda hard to call.

We ordered
Kitsune burger (IDR 145k) , presentation is very simple , burger serve on a plate, no extra decoration such as veggies or etc, and serve with delicious fries. Surprisingly although the presentation very simple not appetizing, taste wise okay and comparable with restaurant specialty serving burger. The bun is soft, cook nice but nothing special, fillings include , juicy Patty  easily crumble seasoned very well , you can choose bacon or beef strip to go along with it, sunny side up egg, onion. Portion big, generous enough for one person. Fries as well tasty crispy savory.

Yuzu shrimp (IDR 110k) probably best udang asam manis ever. Kinda mix of chinese food and japanese twist , crispy tangy dough not that soggy texture, taste balance well sweet savory sour fresh from the orange, shrimp meat kinda small. portion are kinda small enough just as snack, and expensive for this portion. But worth to try as it is different from any other udang asam manis.

Gyudon (IDR 120k) , presentation nice, the beef slice is soft, thick taste different from typical rice bowl one, rice cook nicely, serve with spring onion and boiled egg. Taste a little bit bland than ordinary rice bowl, since rice bowl brand actually suits the taste with most people, while this gyudon held it's authenticity taste of japanese beef gyudon.

Canele (IDR 27K) it's okay, not too sweet, texture is typical of canele and worth to try.

Overall my experience here in Cafe Kitsune is pleasant, service is amazing , place and ambience nice, but probably need a little more maintenance especially for the couch sofa since it looks dirty and old, food is okay but nothing special except the yuzu shrimp which I might came back for it despite it's expensive price.
Spend around 600K IDR for two person here with americano and water

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: KDP
text:
Food wise, all good.
Easy access to the restaurant. Located next to the lobby. Also have its own door tht accessible from outside...

Our highlights was the Salmon and the Steak.

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Kamal Thalib
text:
I had a pleasant experience having breakfast here. Got a good cup of Cappuccino. Had Azuki toast. Good atmosphere. It's a good place for breakfast and brunch. Interesting menu...

It's a bit pricey, but it's for the atmosphere. If you have them to go, then it just feels like an expensive take away, it doesn't feel the same than just sitting there and having a cup of coffee... I could actually just sit there alone for an hour

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Dean Chen
text:
Service.... 5stars
Food.... 4stars
Atmosphere.... 4stars
Price.... 3.5stars

The macha latter is quite good. As for the rest for the menu, it's mainly snacking food. So basically is a place to chill.... But it can get really busy, so not exactly relaxing or cozy. But I am absolutely pleased with the speedy service and professionalism of the staffs.

Will come back with my colleagues and business partners.....not so much with my life partner tho🤭.

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Dooz
text:
This is a smoking place. If you don’t smoke you better learn. I love the “non smoking area” - it’s right next to the smoking area but with fans so all the smoke just disperses around you. Put the smokers outside!
There are much better cafes in ashta without reeking of smoke or losing a few days on your life. Pass

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Dellawati Wijaya
text:
I’ve been a loyal customer here, and honestly — Kitsune deserves a higher rating than 4.3 🌟. The food is consistently excellent, portions are generous, and the flavors hit that perfect balance of authentic and modern Japanese 🥢🍣.

🌟 Ambience: Stylish yet cozy, with a chic Japanese vibe that works just as well for casual lunches as it does for dinner dates.
👩‍💼 Service: Warm, attentive, and always consistent — the kind of place where you feel like a valued regular.

💭 Overall: For me, Kitsune is one of the strongest Japanese dining options in Ashta. A place that keeps me coming back again and again — definitely deserves more love than the rating shows ✨.

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Jessica Sienny
text:
Perfect ambience with excellent services. The place was quite crowded since it was during lunch time.

What i ordered
- truffle mac n cheese balls, surprisingly yummy and kinda give me a new way to eat mac n cheese tbh.

-matcha latte, not too sweet but its good.

Overall experience here is quite good but kinda pricey, if you are really hungry then it’s not enough because their food portion will not really satisfy you.

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Edria Nur Salsabila Waskita
text: i had a really great time here with my best friend! the food came quickly, and everything we ordered was delicious. i ordered the duck confit and yuzu pannacotta with mineral water, and my friend got the matcha tiramisu, truffle eggs two ways, and a shot of bailey's. the cafe looks gorgeous and great for a fancy dinner with friends or your partner. the staff was friendly, although it took a while to get a response when i first reached out via whatsapp. but overall, everything was great, and the service was really thoughtful they even sent a thank you message on whatsapp, which was a lovely touch. can’t wait to come back and try more desserts next time!

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: RR
text: One of my favorite place! Coffee, matcha, and good dessert meet cozy ambience. Love it.

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Annisa Diana
text: I tried their steak frites, and it was absolutely the best choice. The steak was so juicy, the sauce was well flavored, the greens was fresh, I liked it! My partner tried kitsuné burger, one of their signature, and he liked it too. Their sandos (sandwiches) are also best choices, good tastes and ideal portion.

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Eugene Kristiono
text:
Went here with my friend on Ramadhan month maybe around 3 PM and the place was still half-empty which is nice.

The music they are playing are quite nice. It's not that noisy like other cafes. I heard the music came from their own album.

Food wise, i happened to tried their Early Grey Cake and i had some Chamomile tea.

The cake is rather mediocre (expect the price tag). You can definitely sense some Earl Grey smell and taste, but it's quite weak. The tea is by TWG so for sure it tastes great. There's no refill of hot water for the tea though.

Overall, a great place if you're looking for ambience and high-end crowd (it gets really crowded during the break fasting period). For value for money, maybe not so much.

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Cindy
text:
We came during office hours and still packed🥵 They give us 1 hour to dine in.
To make it on time, we are in a rush asking the waitress to order but they seems super busy so yeaa...
No social distancing since people seems so excited to try this (including me✌🏻) We order cafe late, flat white, iced chocolate, and japanese cheesecake. All good... except cafe late feels super strong.
Not good for small chit chat, laptop users, and a bit dizzy due to loud music and crowded place.

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Yudhistira Tardan
text:
Went to this place on Tuesday around 1.30 pm. Got seat for 2 people without reservation. The service was good, polite and friendly staffs. Order 2 main dish Kitsune Burger and Duck Convit.

Taste just okay and portion was quite small if you compare with the price (fyi the main dish is around 120k-300k ish IDR, for the burger is 140k and the duck confit 165k IDR)

For me the maindish is overpriced.

The one to regret is there are no separation between smoking and non smoking area even though the smoking area near windows

Here’s to sum up:

Service 4/5
Portion 2/5
Taste 3/5
Ambience 4/5
Price 1/5

Will I back here? Maybe, but only for coffee or dessert for sure, no more main dish.

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Adit Nagata
text:
One of the hype cafe in jakarta.
Staff are friendly but not really helpfull when my friend are in wheelchair and we went through by ourselves excuse to other people with a bit tight betweeen chair and the waiter just stand in front of our table. Not good.

The coffee is quite nice. Bitter taste
But the foam not thick
And the temp is quite warm

Well nice to try
Make sure a reservation before come in weekend

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Windy Putri Junus
text:
I really like the ambience 🫶🏻 ordered the sea salt latte only because i merely have about 40mins to spare before movie.

The drink was good with a cute little foxy choco decor 🤎

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Edwina Edwina
text:
No returning visit I guess. I reserved the spot for 6PM. I was surprised because there was no obvious separation between nonsmoking and smoking area. I asked to move to nonsmoking since they put my reservation to smoking area. It was quite packed that night, no significant social distancing. Even a table could be occupied by more than 4 persons. I read somewhere that their service was kinda slow but fortunately I didn't experience it.

We ordered hot ube latte, iced charcoal latte, green green (salad), crushed salmon, Kitsune burger, daifuku mochi, matcha cake, and fox shortbread. We spent almost IDR 800K. To be frank, I was disappointed with the order. The beverages came less than 10 minutes after ordering. The iced charcoal latte came in takeaway plastic cup while we were dining in. They should replace it with the actual glass.

Talking about the food, you'll be surprised by how tiny the portion is, almost identical with kids menu portion, definitely not worth the price. While you can get the more fulfilling portion with the same price tag somewhere else. The plating, so not appetizing. They need to improve their plating, consider the portion, and ditch the plastic cup for dine in customers.

Kitsune Burger was sadder looking than a local burger joint's. For IDR 135K (not including tax + service), it had no side dish, the patty was a tad dry with bland taste.

But if you're thirsty for SNS content or having no issue spending hours for chit-chatting with latte and pastries, this is quite fit in.

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: MHong
text: First Cafe kitsune in Jakarta, personally like to go there for brunch and breakfast. Good selection of Sando(sandwich) and nice coffee. The dishes for me are of the right portion not too big.

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Samuel Kariono
text:
Went there on Saturday morning with my cycling buddy, the place itself was not busy. We were courious with cáfe kitsune as many people keep posting about it. This is what we have experienced;

First impression; We asked the waiter that we want to order but he refused and told us to order with his other busy coworker without telling her. At least he should tell the coworker that we want to order.

Second impression; Not all menu in all day breakfast menu are available in Saturday morning? While the menu itsef is very limited. The waiter told us to open other breakfast menu. I felt confused in this case.

Third impression; When my flat white arrived the server spilt some of the coffee without saying sorry or anything. To be fair the coffee was decent according to my taste.

Fourth impression; I just ordered a simple sourdough toast with butter but it took longer waiting time than my mate’s egg benedict. The egg benedict itself didn’t look appetizing at all and taste as bad as it looks.

Fifth impression;
They provide the qr code for customer to leave some feedback, however they limit the access so we can’t leave feedback in the given google form. Very weird.

Overall this place is overhype and need much improvement with the food and services.

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Pandu Muhammad
text:
I've underestimated this place for being a 'fashion cafe'.

Turns out the food's impressive, and the coffee decent. I've had the steak 3x now; it's nothing complex but very good.

But what impressed me the most was their toasted sourdough + butter. It may sound very simple, but that's where Maison Kitsune really shine.

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Winsy
text: We enter the cafe and got surprised because of its cigarette smell and smoke air around. The waiter asked for smoking or non-smoking, and for me it had no different between both. At the end, we sat next to the shop and got our order. But it comes with one of the waiter who is not so friendly when serving us. I asked question about some food and he just made some mimic with his face without much explanation. And for me, he is not so polite in serving customer.

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Fadjar Kandar
text: Good quality of food and experience. But, given a small food portion vis-a-vis high pricing standard, I may not come back here often. The location is strategic, and the restaurant atmosphere is good and cosy. Covid-19 protocols are imposed despite good services.

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Clarissa Suharli
text:
They don’t obey PSBB rules and ran the place in full capacity which is the ultimate deal breaker - you better go next year once the hype dies down a bit.

I reserved through WhatsApp the morning of and requested to be seated below the Café Kitsuné sign and the WhatsApp admin said seat allocation is random, okay fine. I then arrived and saw the seat I requested for was empty, kindly asked to be moved there and the waiter said that someone reserved the seat (?!).

Food was nice and was served pretty quick, I had the crab pasta which I enjoyed (portion was a bit small though) and chai latte was also good.

I expected better service and safety protocol though.

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: A G (Pourover Traveller)
text:
A Disappointing Experience at Cafe Kitsune

While Cafe Kitsune is often praised for its stylish ambiance and trendy appeal, my recent visit left me feeling underwhelmed. Despite the seemingly relaxed atmosphere, the service was incredibly slow. It took a frustratingly long time for the waiter to even take our order, and the establishment wasn't particularly busy at the time.

To make matters worse, the staff seemed more interested in socializing at the main table than attending to customers. With only one server actively working, it's no surprise that the service was so slow.

The wait for our drinks was equally disappointing. After receiving the first two, there was no communication about the status of the remaining order until the server finally reappeared to inform us of a further 10-minute delay.

Overall, my experience at Cafe Kitsune was underwhelming. The hype surrounding the establishment simply doesn't match the reality of the service and the value it offers. I would hesitate to recommend this cafe based on my disappointing visit.

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Ken Anidhya Ika Pratiwi
text: ran here because i had an online meeting i needed to attend, but unluckily 5 mins after i sat the restaurant started to get very noisy. but i didn't blame anyone though, it was friday night anyway. for the coffee, i'll always be a fan of kitune's though! but for the services here 😕😕😕 i'm not sure, the staffs are giving the arrogant vibe instead of a friendly one...

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Jasmine Mulani
text: The ambience was great and the place was very pretty. We had the eggs benedict which was really good! I would order it again. We also had the avocado toast, which was not so great since it just tasted like plain avo on toast while the menu stated it had other elements like olives, tomatoes etc. The service was also good and the cafe is in a great location in Jakarta.

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Vicky Delani
text: Taste ok, service ok, ambience nice. The pasta portion is small, sando and burger is quite nice but with this price not really satisfying.

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: klejkl
text: Actually nice ambiance and matcha, but so unfortunately their smoking area is combined with the non-smoking area indoor, which makes me quite dizzy. I wish they separated this as not everyone can tolerate the smoke.

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Stephanie Felicia
text: We enjoyed their buttercotch latte & dirty chai latte. Coffee tasted mild, warm and not too sweet. We also ordered their kitsune short bread, it came out in fox shaped and it was so cute! We were served by Kak Ade and he was very polite and friendly 🙏✨

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Fifit Fitria
text: Good place to eat and drink, great taste. Love how the staff treated us. They have smoking and nob smoking. Friendly staff , helpful, especially Mas Ade. Will be back soon ☺✌

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Mike H
text: Excellent coffee. The wifi was fast, the staff friendly and the store included a small shop that sold Cafe Kitsune / Maison Kitsune glassware and apparel. Worth a stop if you’re at the PIK mall

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: M. Nidhal (Nidol)
text:
Taste: 4.1/5
Service: 4.7/5
Ambience: 4.6/5
Price: 3.8/5
Location: 4.6/5
WFH-able: YES.
Overall: 🌟🌟🌟🌟

My overall experience here is quite good. Amazed by how friendly and helpful the staffs were, let alone their speedy service. However, the food to me was just plain ok, nothing special (though they have myriad of menu choices). Especially if we have to pay that price for snacking food, spent around IDR 880K / USD ~55 for 4 people. The ambience I would say was super cozy, very nice to chill with your peers after work. You can also do online work here as their Wi-Fi is quite fast.

Unless it's an invitation from someone, I'd think twice to revisit this place.

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Shin Tan
text:
Actually if I can I would give 3.5 stars for my experience here. We ordered slow cooked duck, crab claw pasta, Azuki toast and ube latte.

The duck taste quite good here but cannot say the same for the pasta it’s so salty though the amount of crab meat is quite generous.

Azuki toast is simple and nice but can be better if they serve more butter.

The Ube latte is what I’m most unsatisfied with because I don’t taste any ube or coffee. I feel like I’m drinking hot milk. The waitress also mentioned other latte taste equally milky so I didn’t bother another one to try.

All the food and drink portion are generally small and overpriced. Don’t think I will come back again.

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: yulia amanda
text: Cozy place but overpriced. Went here for brunch, i ordered french toast (65/75k) and a cup of latte with oat milk (75k). For the coffee, latte is originally 55k / cup but additional 20k if you use oat milk. Both tastes great, but the portion is medium to small.

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Yuliana Ali
text: Great service! I managed to come in two days in a row and the staff still remembered my name. The pork belly sando was the highlight, but the drinks were not memorable

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: EA store
text: The atmosphere felt relaxed and intimate, especially with the soft lighting and calm background music. For smokers, it’s definitely a comfortable place.

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Andil Ong
text:
- Foods around Rp. 100.000 per portion so standard
- Coffees around Rp. 50.000 per drink so rather steep
- Foods portion is alright. But if you are really hungry then it’s not enough.
- Coffee tastes decent enough

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Sveta Kareva
text: Posh cafe, but staff is not very friendly. They have both smoking and non smoking area. I’ve tried salmon and it was really good. They also have good matcha latte with oat milk.

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Nimitayuki Ariza
text: had a pleasant experience here. will definitely return to Café Kitsuné

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Fre Tob
text: Got the second visit here better than the previous one. This one i had Millefeuille with coffee for dessert time. I like the taste of Ice Americano here. Cappuccino lil bit too hot i think.

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Danissa Cheria
text: Went there to try the popular Cafe Kitsune's matcha latte, and the taste was beyond my expectations. It was the best of all that I ordered. The dorayaki was nice too. Our seats was comfortable considering Covid safety protocols is strictly applied there. Definitely going to visit Kitsune again next time to try their coffee and other bites. Thank you!

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: FWPN
text:
This restaurant is such a joy to visit.

The foods are unexpectedly amazing. Would love to come back here again and again.

Love it. You should try it.

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Bryan Wicaksono
text: Booked a table for 12. Food is 5 star, service was great. Theyll help you with no pork selections.

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Albert Pitoyo
text:
Cramped. Ordered for the matcha latte and ube latte.
The matcha latte is just too thick for my taste. Although it’s good.
The ube latte is a lil bit too sweet although the overall taste is subtle.
The service is fast and responsive. The place is big enough although it’s way overcrowded on a Saturday afternoon.

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: K. H.
text:
Smoking is allowed in the cafe without any seperate section. Packed with customers without any physical distancing or psbb rules. Music was VERY LOUD.
残念ながらもう行かないかな。

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Sifa Fauzia
text: Unique menu. Nice ambience. Staff was helpful. Still at reasonable price

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Trevor Ferns
text: Over rated. Ordered the mac n cheese and the grilled chicken rice. Was more like eating  a  chicken rice bowl on a plate. The Mac and cheese was just average. Both the dishes were recommended by the service team. One star for the service !

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: sam
text:
i just want to say that the staff were very nice and that the place was quite well decorated as well. however, the prices are unreasonable. i understand fine dining, especially in a place like ashta of course the prices are going to be steep and that's fine, the problem is, the quality is not there. i paid 57k for an ube latte - bland, no taste, literally tasted like ultra milk. and 135k for sea bass with rice, which is good i do day, but is it so good that it justifies its price tag? no, it's not. it's literally just normal sea bass, there'e nothing special about it that makes it worth its price.

also our orders took 45ish minutes to make which is ridiculous. in conclusion, there's no justifiable explanation for its price. very disappointing.

title: LCC - Lucy Curated Compound Adityawarman

Great Place

title: ONNI House Jakarta
name: Bagas S

We ordered foods, like Chicken Wings, Nasi Goreng Tek-Tek, Mie Goreng Jawa, Chicken Teriyaki Burger but the taste was so-so. The price was standard of café at Jakarta. Ambience : good decoration, noisy

There's wifi. Few charging port
Have outdoor, smoking area

Food : Good. I like the tea. Not too sweet.
Chicken wings are also good. Not tender or hard. Sweet

I came 11 am. Not long after, waiting list.

title: ONNI House Jakarta
name: Philip Budiman
text: This is the newest place in Tanjung Duren. They just open at beginning of June. I just came here for dinner in weekday and full enough, so I didn't take photo of the dining room. The place was good and clean, very cozy and quiet (I really reccomended this place for chit chat). I tasted nasi goreng tek-tek and lemongrass lychee, it's just ordinary. This place also sell Terrarium (ready and custome-built), florist, decoration goods, body care, etc.

title: ONNI House Jakarta
name: Diman B
text:
Vintage decoration, plenty seatings indoor and small backyard. Food tasted great. Love their pizzas.

Beside cafe, this place also florist shop, selling flowers and decoration.

title: ONNI House Jakarta
name: Ifany
text: a really nice place for work, hangout with friends, they sell flowers too. you can take pictures here and buy some flowers 🌸🌷 the place is really cozy, the staffs are the best! the foods are great. i actually have visitting ONNI house for sometimes already. overall rate i’ll give 5/5⭐️

title: ONNI House Jakarta
name: Lillie
text:
First time here, the decorations are immaculate. Maybe because it's also a florist, but the atmosphere is very soft and has a rustic, vintage feeling.

The food is great, especially for the price. Got the chicken bbq, spaghetti meatballs, salmon rice bowl and carbonara pizza for the table. Honestly, I'd come back just for the meatballs, it's very good.

title: ONNI House Jakarta
name: Alfech
text: 5 star for the hot americano and kuah asam pedas kakap. The fish is too fishy tho and almost all the food is too salty for me. The service is good and nice, the place is cozy and instagrammable. The price is affordable.

title: ONNI House Jakarta
name: Gladys
text:
The price is affordable, the food came out really fast (even though is sunday), the food is delicious.
The parking lot is a bit cramped but it's ok.
The atmosphere of this place is like an old house but instagramable.
Will come back for sure

title: ONNI House Jakarta

text:
Such a lovely and cozy place to hangout with your family and friends.
Very instagramable restaurant with flowers shop built in.
They have variants menu, delicious food with reasonable price..
Definitely will comeback again

title: ONNI House Jakarta
name: Michael Tjiong
text: A new place in Tanjung Duren. the interior is awesome, like nowadays kid you can say that it’s really instagramable. The food is good but what I like is the mojitos, it’s not too sweet, have a fresh sour taste. For the food I ordered iga bakar maranggi, and mie goreng jawa. The mie goreng is a bit salty but has a good texture, and the iga is not melt in ur mouth kinda meat but firm not hard, the seasoning was ok. Overall it’s a good place to eat and hangout

title: ONNI House Jakarta
name: steven suhartono
text: greenville residential area restaurant. the food is delicious, the price is ok, the parking space is ok, the design is very good. In here they sell beer too unfortunately only open until 9 o'clock

title: ONNI House Jakarta
name: aprilia yustina
text:
Ordered their steak  asked for med rare turned out medium . Ordered 2 truffle fries they gave us 3. Ordered Mac n cheese n will took forever. Asked for tissue they gave us for 5 . While we were 9 lol

But for the decorations 👍👍👍👍👍👍👍 they always all out whenever it comes to decorations,  on each season.

Dessert! Their umm forgot something pink with cheese and sour taste. That one is best.

title: ONNI House Jakarta
name: Maria Alexander
text: The food so delicious, the place also cozy to hang out with friend and family. The price for food and beverages are reasonable, but the problem since Covid-19 the main road has closed, so you need to make sure the maps before go there ☺

title: ONNI House Jakarta
name: Gemma Febriany
text:
Well known cafe for their vintage garden decorated theme. Awkward waiting-list area for a crowded place. Served hot tea on a tall glass not even a cup, couldn't even hold the glass due to the hot surface. Ordered salmon fried rice, beef teriyaki donburi, truffle mac and cheese, meatball marinara spaghetti, and BBQ wings. All mediocre food, mac and cheese was the only decent one. Wings for appetizer came last with soggy batter and barely BBQ-tasted BBQ sauce. Beef teriyaki was just drenched in instant teriyaki sauce and nothing else, with a side of plain deep boiled egg and soggy cucumber. Salmon fried rice came with side "tempura", all fried in breadcrumb lol. One of the tempura was potato, never in my life I'd ate a deep fried breadcrumb-ed potato. All the main dishes came with a side of stale and uncooked breadcrumbs, serving no purposes to the dishes beside to fill the empty serving tray. They stay true to their name as a cafe and not restaurant, so better to lower your expectations and not order their mains.

But props to their entrance decoration, it was stunning and surely an eye-catcher. Alas, if you're looking for a place with good food, this one ain't it. And if you're looking for a quick catch-up session place, this one ain't it too cuz you'll wait for a table longer than the catch-up session.

Also, very limited parking space. They have their own parking lot but was located round the block so you have to walk around to reach the place.

title: ONNI House Jakarta
name: Nana Rdn
text: Affordable place and food suitable for food lovers or flower lovers. This restaurant is updated following season, very instragamable and quite crowded for the one who want to eat or just drop for bought the beautiful flowers or just taking photos.

title: ONNI House Jakarta
name: M. Irhab Nicky Febio
text: A must-visit restaurant! Delicious food, comfortable space, and stunning decor. Will be back again in the future.

title: ONNI House Jakarta
name: PRISCILLA VANNY AMELIA
text: A lovely and cozy cafe, the food is delicious, the opera cake is light and flavorful. Super nice and helpful staffs, everything is five stars 🤩

title: ONNI House Jakarta
name: Jannice Juliet
text: The aesthetic and vibes is very good! The foods are okay. But the spagetthi and cakes are so good!!

title: ONNI House Jakarta
name: Devi Mayarina
text: The place is very instagramable! The food is good and really worth the price! Parking area is small, better coming by grab..

title: ONNI House Jakarta
name: Devina Oktaviani
text: Always like the decoration especially the seasonal's. It's clearly shown that they do put an effort to the decoration. For the food, it's tasty enough. I love the ambience they make, it feels like home, the waitress are friendly too. Keep it up!

title: Common Grounds Coffee and Roastery CS
name: Peggy Y
text:
I tried ice coffee latte and the espresso inside is quite strong
The chocolate cake is good

Overall the place is cozy for meeting and hang out

title: Common Grounds Coffee and Roastery CS
name: Ellen Brigitta
text: When you provide good beans, make sure you train your barista well. Because no point  if they are not making the coffee well, just like in my case. I bought 66k rupiah of coffee just to get a lychee tasted coffee (they might not wash the glass well or I don't know how the lychee taste can be there). The same barista I saw just got complaint from the previous customer too!

title: Common Grounds Coffee and Roastery CS
name: K. Yeo
text: This is our usual go to during weekends due to convenience, and every single time we visited and ordered avocado toast they will return to us and claim its out of stock. In this very recent visit, we asked for the availability of avocado toast before sitting down and they claim to have it, once decided our orders the waiter came back to us and claim they ran out of bread! Disappointed yet again, i went for the breakfast platter, within just 20secs after the waiter left, i went up to him again to change my order to waffles, he was standing in front of the ordering screen and told me its too late as it was already entered into the system, i requested the order to be amended as the kitchen has yet started to prepare nor seen the order, he insisted that its impossible. With all due respect, the amendment request is only within 20secs after the words came out of my mouth, in any normal situation you can definitely change it. I can go by with the disappointment of having the same dish running out of stock repetitively each and every single visit, but what i cant forgive is the exponential degradation of the service here since my first visit, hence i wont be visiting here again with any of my friends from here forth due to this recent experience.

title: Common Grounds Coffee and Roastery CS
name: Rosa Andarina
text: Clean and neat coffee shop, perfect taste, wise price..

title: Common Grounds Coffee and Roastery CS
name: Desmond Ho
text: Awesome service 👍

title: Common Grounds Coffee and Roastery CS
name: Jaka Darwis
text: You should definitely try their flat white. The best coffee shops in Jakarta 🤍

title: Common Grounds Coffee and Roastery CS
name: Cindy Amelia
text:
I tried the Iced Americano (Cloak n Dagger beans). I like it because it is very smooth. Body not too strong, a balance of fruity and bitter
Price wise a bit pricy IDR 50k for Americano
But i guess the beans quality justify the price

title: Common Grounds Coffee and Roastery CS
name: Raka Alvaro
text: the service are good! i really enjoyed the coffee, the food, the place, and everything. the one girl that i think she was in her training days is do a great job, and the team is actually great!!

title: Common Grounds Coffee and Roastery CS

text: Place a nice and V60 a coffee is the the best, service exselent , arthur amploye is the best

name: Imam Fauzi
text: Good food good place! A comfortable place to work and meet with friends. Overall good!

title: Common Grounds Coffee and Roastery CS
name: Shane Volpe
text: We have been to other Common Grounds and love them. This one is horrible. The service is bad and the food is not nearly the quality of other ones. I ordered a ham and cheese croissant and there was less than 1 spoon full of ham and cheese in the entire croissant. At that point there was no purpose in even putting in ham and cheese.

title: Common Grounds Coffee and Roastery CS
name: angela w
text: I was really impressed with the menu! Lots of really yummy western food options to choose from, and the quality and portions did not disappoint me! Food came out hot which I liked too! I would definitely eat here again. But I’m giving it 4 stars because the staff did not give the best customer experience. They were not that fast in understanding I wanted to cancel my order of pancakes. They kept on telling me it was already ordered but they hadn’t started making them so I didn’t get why they were being difficult in cancelling this request. I was already full from all the other food I had eaten.

title: Common Grounds Coffee and Roastery CS
name: Jonet Wicaksana
text: The coffee taste better than any coffee shop in this building. Best meeting point or place to relax after office hour.

title: Common Grounds Coffee and Roastery CS
name: Alfons Tanujaya
text: This place usually offer good food.  But the services is sucks. They can change availability of menu based on crowd. One day they will say that steak and egg available even if you come 9AM. But on crowded day, they will say that it is unavailable even if you arrive at 10.30AM. It will took 15 minute of waiting on an uncleaned table and you will have to call the waitress just to make an order.

title: Common Grounds Coffee and Roastery CS
name: Magnus Fain
text: This place is really really good. Quality coffee and marvelous food at a very reasonable price considering the quality. Could just as well be a popular café in Stockholm, Copenhagen, or New York at 1/4 the price. My favorite spot to come for brunch, and despite the occasional noisy groups or families, a perfect spot to do some work (with headphones). Kind, welcoming and hardworking staff makes it truly a top spot.

title: Common Grounds Coffee and Roastery CS
name: Kesya Okvianti
text:
+ The space is pretty spacious.
+ They provide a lot of electrical socket, so you can definitely have a meeting or working session here.
+ The music played is not loud.
+ The americano that I tried is good. Have a bit sour note at the end.
+ The staff are friendly!

title: Common Grounds Coffee and Roastery CS
name: Hafidah Marwa Syafiyah
text: love the atmosphere, good coffee, and nice ambience. This is a good place to work from cafe or just chill with friends. The drinks and foods were all tasty and worthwhile. The barista was so friendly and pleasant to talk with. keep up the good work, common grounds citywalk 😊👍🏻

title: Common Grounds Coffee and Roastery CS
name: Jessica Kraakman
text:
I cannot understand the rating of this place.. We had the chicken toastie, the bread was burned and we asked for not spicy (no Jalapeño) and it was still spicy. Also there was more cabbage then chicken inside.. for paying 95, this was very disappointing.
After they said we cannot pay with cash only card. But I had the right amount of money so that was fine. Maybe tell people in advance the next time?

title: Common Grounds Coffee and Roastery CS
name: Brian Holiday
text: This was a signature Jakarta breakfast spot for a long time- incredible breakfast menu, coffee, best bacon in Jakarta, fluffy eggs, etc,  unfortunately it’s ALL BEEN CHANGED.  The menu is gone- replaced with beef linked sausage stuffed in burritos.  Such an unfortunate decision, now avoid at all cost.  Don’t rely on the old reviews.

title: Common Grounds Coffee and Roastery CS
name: AA R
text:
Love this place. They served great coffee and sometimes, they have special drinks for you to try. Cant guarantee its availability tho.

Its cozy and not too crowded like some other coffee shop in Citywalk. They also have an indoor smoking room, albeit a little small.

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Andhika H D
text:
Even the most common meal are well made here.. well seasoned french fries with wasabi dipping sauce, japanese cheesecake, cafe mocha with soy milk..

And the ambience are really good for hanging out with friends..

too bad theres limit of table usage for only 2 hours

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta

text: The staff were friendly and attentive, making sure everything was to our satisfaction without being intrusive. Service was quick and efficient, even though the cafe was quite busy at the time

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Eva Stephanie Kurnia
text: Love the atmosphere and Love Love the Coffee 😍 Would def come back again 👍

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Andree Indrawan
text: Breakfast for a champion! Taste very good 🏆👌

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Christy -
text:
Great service, good ambience. I tried the iced latte and ube latte. The ube latte was fabulous 💖
Everything about this place was good. If you want to visit I recommend it on weekdays, it will be easier to get a seat ;)

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Narista Monica
text: I went there with my friend in the afternoon. It’s quite busy but no waiting line. I ordered ice chai latte, as for food we shared matcha cake and truffle mac & cheese. Chai latte taste ordinary. As for the cake it taste really good, it’s moist and the matcha taste strong. Truffle mac & cheese is also really good and the portion is generous. Price a little bit pricy but it’s okay. Service is great, the staff are friendly and work fast. It’s a great experience I will go there again in the future. I have a little bit suggestion, I think they could improve the air conditioner, It’s not cool enough.

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Dimas Wicaksono
text: Place is nice with great music and ambiance. Ordered lychee tea and atzuki toast. The atzuki paste is great but the toast is a letdown, too dry and plain, I would expect something more special from this. But the fox cookie is nice though

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Kadija F A
text: Kitsune surprised me I tried it first time in London i loved the taste of coffee bens and they had amazing sandwiches and now i try it Jakarta, the menu is totally different even the bens of coffee it’s not the same i was disappointed

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Frendy Pow
text: Decent cafe with japanese touch. Somehow, the croissant is a no-no. But, the carrot cake is a-must!

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Chelsa Debora
text: Not the best place if you’re looking for a quiet one to work. The concept is suitable to hang out with friends. Charcoal latte is just plain, fries is okay (with wasabi-infused mayo), carrot cake is also good.

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Katiti Wulansari
text: Came here to taste the fox cookie but apparently its not on the menu I ordered. But it was delightful and great finger foods. Will come back later.

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: lidya evangelista
text: Went there for a quick afternoon tea, the front staff was super friendly but sadly all the servers were rude. The point of people going to a cafe is mainly for the ambience & service, if not they could just make their own tea at home. The place was not that full, but it was so loud. The servers were busy chatting with each other half screaming. I couldn’t stand more than 15 mins being there. Definitely not worth the hype.

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Atticgals
text: When i read all the not so positive review, i hv second thought of going thr. Then gv it a try. The place was quite crowded since it was weekday. True, table quite close to each other. I was lucky to get a seat under the famous neon sign. Matcha latte was thick and unsweetened, this shows they really use pure matcha powder. So u hv to add ur own sugar. I also ordered egg Benedict. Look good but tasteless. Hv to add salt by urself and portion is small. Maybe the taste and portion is the way they serve it in france. Reminds me of the book "French women dont get fat" 😁 too pricey obviously. But service is good. Waiter quite attentive.

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Najunda Jusuf
text:
The worst service!
I came for breakfast at 9.15 and chose eggs benedict.
Food hasnt come even after 20 minutes later. When asked the server, she only said it’s being prepared. 10 minutes later, food still hasnt come. Whats worse, people who work there are whispering with each other and went back and forth to the kitchen and no one was able to explain things to us properly.
After 30+ minutes, food came but not how it was supposed to based on the menu.
It clearly states that there is “mixed greens” in the menu, but what I found is 1 piece of lettuce inside the bun! When i asked the server where is the mixed greens, he said “oh did you order additional menu?”

Even after all of that, our original server was nowhere to be found and people are still scattering back and forth to the kitchen without anyone able or even coming to explain anything to us properly. When i asked where is the manager, someone only said oh the manager hasn’t come in yet.

Thanks for a “great” morning

2. -1 star: food price is a bit on the high side. +1 star: beverages price is OK.
3. Very helpful and friendly servers.
Bonus: a lot of places to sit with electrical outlets. Good to charge your laptop or phones.

text: Nice ambient restaurant coffeeshop in city walk. Coffee was of high calibre and I'm a bit of a coffee Sergent! But the food was a big let down. Whilst presentable just not very tasty. Service was fine when attentive bit getting attention could be easier. In summary great ambient coffee.

title: Common Grounds Coffee and Roastery CS

text: I had been a regular to this coffee shop since I used to work around the area. Finally visiting this place again today, and I am a bit disappointed. I always order their Thai Beef Salad, but today it’s not so amazing. Was expecting a plate full of greens, but it came with too much papaya and cucumber. Also, shame that they no longer have their steak salad on the menu. To sum it up, this place has great ambience, great coffee, but they need to up their game on food consistency.

title: Common Grounds Coffee and Roastery CS
name: Wahyu Parbowo
text:
Bought a cafe latte here today. This is how my conversation with the cashier (C) went:
Me : saya pesan cafe latte aja kak, satu. Kalau saus karamel ada ga ya kak?
C : kita adanya flavour aja kak
Me : (ready to continue my order)
C : mau nya caramel macchiato ya?
Me : Oh, caramel macchiato ada?
C : ga ada kak. Itu adanya di Starbucks aja sana (with gesture that there’s a sbux store nearby)
Me : ????????? Saya cafe latte aja, cuma nanya barangkali ada

This encunter annoyed me, I’m not asking for much, but those sbux remarks is really unnecessary.

With that said, I enjoyed the coffee, but it’s not really worth it unless you need a place to stay.

title: Common Grounds Coffee and Roastery CS

Breakfast burrito was OK but not made in house as no variations could be made. Smashed avocado was terrible. Avo was lemony indicating that it was not fresh. The bread was good but the dish didn't come with any greens on the side as previous reviews show. It was a slab of bread,some bad avocado,a really tiny bit of feta and a couple sliced tomatoes. Certainly not 90k worth. Coffee was acidic and average at best.
Will not return.

text:
This is based on my one-time experience. My juice option was ok - blended fresh juice.

The meal that I ordered - potato salad with beef sausage & fried seaweed seems recycled from left over or perhaps left out to long without refrigeration. It was certainly not fresh. The beef sausage was ok but the potato salad had a tangy & rancid taste. You can literally tell it was going bad. It seems, the process is, just serve food to customers without any quality checks. The battered seaweed or whatever was so hard, it was unbelievable. As I highlighted, this was based on my one time experience when I was in Jakarta - May, 2022.

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Grace Angelia
text:
Visited on Wed, 25 Nov 2020, 3-4.30 pm. We had high hopes for Cafe Kitsune, but alas we don't think the publicity, brand and price match with the taste of the foods (and drinks).

Matcha cake: there's hair in the cake. Ew. Had to ask for replacement.
Dorayaki pancakes: pancakes are hard to eat and not fluffy.
Crushed Salmon: the salmon is not cooked properly and it tasted like fish that had just been out of fridge.
Hot chocolate: tasted bland.
Iced yuzu & honey: seriously. Which high end cafe served beverages inside plastic cups??

The only edible food are Japanese Cheesecake and somewhat Mushroom Rigatoni (but the pasta is hard to chew). Very disappointed that we had to spend IDR700k and the only perfect menu to eat was cheesecake. Not gonna visit anymore, that for sure.

title: Café Kitsuné Ashta District 8 Jakarta
name: Marcel Reinhard
text: I visited this cafe on a public holiday around 5 pm. The conditions at that time were not too crowded, then I approached the waiter to ask for a table in the smoking area but it turned out to be full so we were advised to wait in the non-smoking area. A few moments later the waiter came back and said we were still on the waiting list for the smoking area, but said that there would be a table available. What was a bit strange was that he said that at that table there was a minimum order of 200,000 per pax. I don't understand the regulations applied in this restaurant but this is the first time I have found that there is a minimum order to sit in the non-smoking area with very standard seating conditions and not during peak hours or weekends. I refused and told the waiter to choose a regular table. The service here is also not that good. Definitely not going back. 👎🏻

title: ONNI House Jakarta
name: Jessy Jessy
text:
Ive come at 5:30pm to the resto, the innermost room looks like hold an event, space in the middle was full, and but the front space left one table near exit but the table hasnt been cleared yet,
There is one waiter when i asked if there is vacant table, he kept saying all full, and when i pointed to the empty but uncleared table, he said got booked already, but when he show the booking list, last booked on the list is 4pm

His attitude and gesture not welcome since the beginning, saying he is the only waiter serving that time

It is better to say to customer that the resto is out of hand for time being and maybe it will be super slow if customer still want to dine in, instead of showing bad attitude and un-welcomed

Ohh, staffs are the best!

title: Uji Matcha Grand Indonesia
name: Dioscurious
text:
calling all matcha lovers! 🍵🍵🍵
super recommend this place! the matcha tastes authentic and is well worth the price.
also, make sure to try the Sakura Roll Cake—it’s cute, unique flavor and perfectly fluffy.

title: Uji Matcha Grand Indonesia
name: bianca abigail
text: had the BEST matcha experience ever!!!! their harumi cold whisk matcha is top notch, very delightful at the first sip. i also ordered their cheesecake it was amazing. will definitely reorder 💚💚

title: Uji Matcha Grand Indonesia
name: Erik Suwandy
text:
I have visited this matcha place many times, primarily to enjoy their desserts, and today I sampled the hojicha.

The cold whisk hojicha, with a reduced sugar level of 25%, is recommended for those who appreciate hojicha, and it is suggested to request less ice, as an excessive amount may diminish the flavor.

Regarding the hojicha soft serve, the composition mirrors that of the matcha, offering a delightful combination with vanilla pudding, rice crispy, red bean, and glutinous rice balls.

This location tends to be quite busy on weekends.

title: Uji Matcha Grand Indonesia
name: Jane M
text: I'm not a matcha fan but their matcha menus and service are superb. If you love those bitter ceremonial grade matcha it's a perfect place for you. Their latest menu (harumi matcha) is also a cermonial grade but sweeter and kind of nutty (soooo good). I love their anmitsu. However the store is quite small so it's not really comfortable even though the ambience is nice.

title: Uji Matcha Grand Indonesia
name: kleo
text:
i think this one is one of the affordable matcha with an actually good quality matcha!
the place itself is quite small so we decided to do take out.

we had matcha latte, usucha & matcha ice cream. all taste amazing and not overly sweet, we could taste the quality of the matcha.

definitely would be grabbing matcha here again 💗

title: Uji Matcha Grand Indonesia
name: Angelina Setiawan
text: I really recommend the Harumi Cold Whisk!! So earthy nutty umami! No bitterness, very thick and creamy. The sakura affogato was nice too! The server was really friendly and nice! She recommended everything in detail 🫶🫶

title: Uji Matcha Grand Indonesia
name: Nadrah Nizom
text:
It has been on my go to list since a year ago. Finally i tried this cafe. I really like the overall matcha menu. I love matcha and i might say that their matcha was grade S.

I recommend to only buy 1 bowl if you eating together. The portion was big, i can’t even finish it my self. Must order mille crepe, sooo soft and not too sweet.

I used to like hojicha ice cream but that day, i don’t really like it. Also eating sakura flavor ice cream felt like eating a perfume! Lmao.

The staff were friendly. But the cafe itself is very small so the space between each customer was jammed.

title: Uji Matcha Grand Indonesia
name: Linda Anggreini
text: Limited seat but still comfortable..I am not a matcha specialist but the taste was good

title: Uji Matcha Grand Indonesia
name: Puteri Gendis Karina
text:
Just having my first sip at here, and it’s all good The Harumi matcha is goes well with my preference, and had the Kurimatsu dango too
The service is excellent semua crew welcome dan ramah seperti satpam bca, im sure will be back sooner💚

title: Uji Matcha Grand Indonesia
name: Delviane Wongso
text:
I’ve visited Uji Matcha twice, and both experiences were wonderful. On my first visit, I tried the Genmai Matcha Chizu — it was absolutely delicious! I loved the crunchy texture that added a unique twist to the drink. It quickly became one of my favorites.
On my second visit, I went for the Pure Harumi Matcha. It was just as impressive — rich and creamy with a nutty flavor, and surprisingly not bitter at all. A perfect choice for true matcha lovers.
The staff at Uji Matcha were also incredibly friendly and helpful. I was a bit unsure about what to order, but they patiently guided me through the menu and helped me make the right choice.

Highly recommended for anyone who enjoys quality matcha and great service!

title: Uji Matcha Grand Indonesia
name: Irene Santoso
text: Clearly overrated, it’s just okay for me, wouldn’t want to come back for more. I ordered the gelato and had one matcha and one sakura, nothing really stands out for me, but the staff is knowledgeable and good at explaining the menu though. The place is packed, you won’t be able to sit comfortably because the distance between one table to another is just enough for your thigh to slip through accompanied by an apology to the person sitting next to you as you make your way pass them to get to your seat.

title: Uji Matcha Grand Indonesia
name: Arlin
text: if you love bold matcha the kind that tastes stronger than just milky sweetness THIS IS THE ONE. try the harumi matcha. enak bangettttttttt, seriously a must order!

title: Uji Matcha Grand Indonesia
name: Ela Yudhanira
text: One of the best matcha in Jakarta. Their matcha tasted fresh and tea-like. Not just sweet and sugar. They claimed that their franchise is the first matcha cafe in the world originated from Kyoto. They served Uji matcha and Harumi matcha. The staff was very helpful in explaining the menu and the information about the tea. During the weekend or holiday, the queue is very very long. I have to register for a waiting list and we waited for about 30mins. The place is very small. I hope they have a larger space. Cold Harumi matcha is fresh and a bit sweeter. I ordered low sugar and I think it was perfect.

title: Uji Matcha Grand Indonesia
name: Aurelio Richardo Khu
text:
Food: authentic matcha, doesnt give you the overly sweet ones, there are options to reduce sugars.

"Uji Matcha Soft Serve" it is a matcha ice cream, tasted not to sweet with rich matcha flavor. It gives off refreshing and calmness. It comes with mochi balls which was okay, we had an add-on matcha jelly which was amazing. Bellow the matcha ice cream, it is filled with garnola oats, coconut jelly, and cream (nice little suprise). All of that costs (56k) + (7k) for the matcha jelly

I also had "Pure Uji Matcha" with sugar included. It tastes rich with matcha, I recommend drinking it slowly. You can't go wrong with ordering this, if you are a matcha lover. (39k)

Another drink I had was "Harumi Matcha", without sugar. It tastes rich with matcha and a little hint of walnut, which was unique. If you can't handle the bitterness that came with matcha, definitely order with sugar, or have it separately. (62k)

We also had "Arashiyama Matcha Mille Crepes". Soft texture with just the perfect amount of sweetness. Definitely recommend getting this one. (46k)

Is it worth it?
it is worth it to atleast come and try once, not to expensive(especially in GI)while giving off quality.

Service: had to wait a bit for Uji Matcha, however the staff was more than friendly and helpful in explaining the menu items.

Atmosphere: the place is like a store in Japan, small, however it is full of pretty decoration that fits in well. The seats are comfy and they offer charging ports.

title: Uji Matcha Grand Indonesia
name: Galih Fajar
text: I had an amazing matcha experience at this place! The gelato was surprisingly delicious - it had a strong flavor with a sweet aftertaste. The other condiments they served with the matcha were a perfect match, balancing the flavors without overpowering them. The service was great too - the staff were friendly and knowledgeable about their menu. If you’re looking for a delicious dessert in Grand Indonesia, definitely check this place out!

title: Uji Matcha Grand Indonesia
name: Erly Tunriallu
text:
Uji matcha is the best in matcha dessert.
Very flavorful, not too sweet and mani option.
Nice and cozy atmosphere only too small.
The price and portions are good and affordable.
I will definitely come back again.

title: Uji Matcha Grand Indonesia
name: Jessica Putri Natalia S
text: Delicious ,I ordered harumi gelato and played fortune -telling game. Favorite matcha place in town

title: Uji Matcha Grand Indonesia
name: Adam Syafiq
text: Serve variety of matcha options like ice cream, lattes and cakes/pastries. The place is small so cannot really accommodate big groups

title: Uji Matcha Grand Indonesia
name: Julia Dama
text: Calling for matcha lovers 🤩 .. Fell in love at the first try, now we’ve becoming their regular customers 😍. Tried in GI and Kokas so far, Uji Matcha Soft Serve Story is the best, many deliciosooo surprises underneath the ice cream. Hojicha Latte is also good, Dango is chewy and nice, Sakura Ice Cream is also uniquely good, the only disappointed one is Kurokawa only becoz underneath it it’s just shaved ice

title: Uji Matcha Grand Indonesia
name: Olivia
text:
So good 🍵🌟
Tried out their Harumi matcha normal sugar (~60k++). Don’t really like matcha but this one is soooo good!! The matcha tasted so complex, it got tea-like taste & is fragrant, yet creamy & nutty.

Tried out their peach mochi too (50k for 2). Soo good! The mochi skin combines well with the peach cream. Fragrant, sweet, peachy!

Their service was also so good! Both the male & female cashier for today’s evening shift (24 aug) was sooo kind 💛 they patiently explained the kind of matcha & were so friendly. The line moved fast too. Would def come back! Thankyouuu💚✨

title: Uji Matcha Grand Indonesia
name: Mili chan
text: I am a mochi lover. Second time coming here. This time we order green tea matcha and green tea strawberry

title: Uji Matcha Grand Indonesia
name: Devina Anindita
text: My favorite place to go for matcha ice cream. Just that the place is a bit tiny. Love the free omikuji so much though

title: Uji Matcha Grand Indonesia
name: Cindy
text:
If you're a matcha and hojicha enthusiast like me, then Uji Matcha is an absolute dream come true! From soft serves to drinks and cakes, this delightful establishment in the heart of the city caters to all your green tea cravings with finesse.

The first thing that struck me upon entering Uji Matcha was the serene and inviting ambiance. The décor was tastefully adorned with Japanese elements, instantly transporting me to the beautiful tea gardens of Uji, Kyoto. The staff was courteous and knowledgeable, always ready to recommend their signature items.

The star of the show, undoubtedly, was their matcha soft serve. Creamy, rich, and perfectly balanced in flavor, it embodied the essence of authentic Japanese matcha. Each spoonful was an indulgent journey into the world of green tea, leaving a distinct, pleasant aftertaste. For those who prefer a roasted flavor, the hojicha soft serve was an equally delightful alternative. The smoky, nutty notes of hojicha provided a lovely contrast to the sweetness of the soft serve.

Uji Matcha's drinks were equally exceptional. Their traditional matcha latte was a revelation—a velvety smooth concoction with just the right amount of sweetness. For a refreshing twist, I opted for their matcha lemonade, and it was an absolute winner! The zesty lemon flavor blended harmoniously with the earthy matcha, creating a refreshing yet comforting drink.

Their matcha and hojicha cakes were divine creations that tantalized both the eyes and the palate. The matcha cake had a light, airy texture, and the natural bitterness of matcha was complemented perfectly by the sweet cream layers. The hojicha cake, on the other hand, offered a unique and delightful experience. With its warm, toasty flavors, it was like having a piece of autumn in every bite.

One aspect I truly appreciated about Uji Matcha was their commitment to using high-quality, authentic ingredients. They sourced their matcha and hojicha directly from Uji, which is renowned for producing some of the best green tea in Japan. This dedication to quality was evident in every dish they served, and it set them apart from other matcha establishments.

Whether you're a seasoned matcha enthusiast or just beginning to explore the world of Japanese green tea, Uji Matcha is a must-visit destination. The soft serves, drinks, and cakes are all masterfully crafted, showcasing the beauty and depth of matcha and hojicha flavors. So, if you find yourself in the vicinity, don't miss the chance to savor the matcha and hojicha delights at Uji Matcha—it's a journey you won't regret!

title: Uji Matcha Grand Indonesia
name: Miu Miu
text:
Cute little store in Grand Indonesia lower ground. The worker is very friendly and attentive.

We tried Matcha anmitsu : soft serve matcha ice cream served with matcha pudding, strawberry, peach, and lychee. I really like it. The matcha taste it self is not as strong as I expected, I prefer to be more bitter, but it still delicious though, especially the combination with the pudding and the fruits.

Their pure matcha drink also taste good, you can requeste for no sugar

title: Uji Matcha Grand Indonesia
name: 류다은
text:
1. uji matcha soft serve story: personal fav from the 3 menus. 🥰highly recommended for ppl who love matcha.
love the harmony of the ‘matcha soft ice cream+red bean+crispy waffle cone+rice ball’
*the size per serving was smaller than expected. recommend 1 person = 1 bowl☺️

2. arashiyama matcha mille crepe: not what expected☹️
cant really taste the matcha flavor. too creamy and greasy.
* personally doesn’t recommend

3. matcha roll cake: better than the mille crepe but doesnt really recommend. it has more matcha flavor and sweeter😉

* i would revisit to try matcha soft serve
P.S. the staff was really nice😇

title: Uji Matcha Grand Indonesia
name: Gabriel Azhar
text: This place was super fun! The service was so great! Love how the waiters interact with us. The food were so good also… i highly reccomend all the sakura stuff coz its so great. The sweetness was not that sweet which makes it so nice! You won’t face that “enek” or “giung”. We ended up ordering 5 menu and i can devour all of it and it was so satisfying. The price itself is reasonable and worth it! Located in the lg floor near jenius stand. I will visit them again in the future.

title: Uji Matcha Grand Indonesia
name: Qiqi Art
text: My favorite matcha cafe since 2019. The cafe is small, but the ambiance is nice and cozy, the lighting is very good to take pics. Matcha quality is always good even after more than 5 years. I prefer strong matcha, so I love their matcha gelato and shiratama gelato. Their harumi series is also tasty! Please keep the good quality and the good service ☺️

title: Uji Matcha Grand Indonesia
name: julvi lim
text:
Love the Harumi matcha !! Nutty, bold and smooth with no bitterness!
The cashier explained the matcha profile thoroughly before I even asked 👍

title: Uji Matcha Grand Indonesia
name: Desi Septiani
text: If you love authentic, bitter matcha, you have to come here. As the name based on the best town for matcha production in Japan. The service is good, and orders arrive quickly. However, every time I come here, there’s always a waiting list because the place is small. Hopefully, they’ll provide a bigger space in the future.

title: Uji Matcha Grand Indonesia
name: Jeffrey B
