text: Nice cozy place to sit back and enjoy a cup of coffee

title: Tyfel Coffee
name: Adhit Wp
text: Good coffee, nice ambience, have a mainstream tabletop game to play

title: Tyfel Coffee
name: Elim Suhendra
text: Good place to learning, disscussion, eat and drink coffe

title: Tyfel Coffee
name: Tirta Ip
text: Good price and yummie food...

title: Tyfel Coffee
name: Baba Yaga
text: Great place nice friendly staff love it

title: Hatoya Matcha
name: Frankie Ho
text:
I had a great experience here! The original matcha latte was excellent and had a truly premium taste. An extra plus for offering a coconut milk option.
​The mochi had a great texture and wasn't too sweet, making it the perfect combination with the matcha ice cream.
​The atmosphere was also very comfortable-ideal for chatting with friends and family.

title: Hatoya Matcha
name: Tobias Tobias
text: A nice new place to enjoy authentic matcha and relax. The space is large and very comfortable for sitting. We tried the original matcha, the daily roasted matcha, and the hojicha latte, all were excellent. They also serve matcha pudding and mochi. The service was great. Definitely worth a try.

title: Hatoya Matcha
name: Sisyria Tan
text:
The best matcha ever—authentic straight from Kyoto, Japan 🍵

Rich, concentrated, perfectly balanced in every sip. You can literally taste the goodness.
And the matcha ice cream? Hands down the best I’ve ever had—and that says a lot from an ice-cream lover 💚

title: Hatoya Matcha
name: jkus eats
text: Great matcha place, not too nerdy about the flavor but definitely some real stuff w great bitter flavor. Nice helpful staff, will pour over the matcha right in front of you, and a great experience overall. Rather costly

title: Hatoya Matcha
name: Anisa
text:
Pretty good matcha, fairly consistent with the stores in Japan. The roasted matcha was quite concentrated but not overly bitter with a toasty aftertaste. The strawberry jam added a nice refreshing sweetness and tang to the drink.

The matcha pudding was so-so. The matcha layer was pretty strong and bitter while the plain base was only mildly sweet, so there’s an imbalance of flavors that didn’t particularly mix well in the mouth.

title: Hatoya Matcha
name: Karen G
text: The place was aesthetic, clean, and it had different kinds of seating. I ordered the hot original matcha latte. The taste was nutty and ok, expected more because of the price, would love it if it was stronger and had more umami in the taste

title: Hatoya Matcha
name: Jeffrey B
text: New soft opening 13-Dec at Lippo Mall Puri Ground floor (near KOI, JD.ID) offering Uji Kyoto origin premium matcha. Try its Roasted Matcha & Daily Matcha (Iced), thick matcha very good...

title: Hatoya Matcha
name: Jefri Saputra
text:
Came to Lippo Mall Puri just to try Hatoya Matcha 🍵

We ordered:
• Daily Matcha Latte (75K)
• Roasted Daily Matcha Latte (85K)
• Warabimochi (80K)

Overall, the drinks were just okay. Nothing bad, but nothing memorable either.

The warabimochi was a bit confusing. From what I know, warabimochi doesn’t usually look like this. Taste-wise, it wasn’t my preference. You only get a few pieces of mochi as well.

BUT the MATCHA ICE CREAM… ⭐️ MUST TRY!!
That one alone made the visit worth it.

title: Hatoya Matcha
name: Febby VD
text: An authentic Japanese matcha store finally opened in Jakarta! There are some desserts options as well other than the matcha drinks. Price is the same if you buy matcha latte from Japan. Definitely will buy again the matcha latte with ice cream! So creamy nutty and umami flavor💚 Portions are bigger and not watered down

title: Hatoya Matcha
name: Erick Zhuang
text: The matcha daifuku's mochi isn’t quite soft enough, which makes it messy to eat. The cup is too small, and the plastic spoon isn’t suitable. As for the recommended matcha latte, the supposed natural sweetness from the matcha powder isn’t noticeable—it’s still quite bitter. The plating is poor, and for the price, I was expecting something better.

title: Hatoya Matcha
name: Norita
text:
I was looking forward to trying this spot, but the experience was unfortunately disappointing. Despite there only being four of us, I waited at the counter for over 20 minutes before my order was handled.

I ordered the Original Matcha Latte with a scoop of ice cream, but it didn't live up to the price. The milk was incredibly thin and tasted watered down, which completely washed out the matcha flavor. For a specialty drink, I expected a much creamier and richer consistency. Hopefully, they can work on their service speed and drink quality.

Also had their Matcha pudding and matcha affogato.

title: Hatoya Matcha
name: J. Lepianda
text: The matcha latte is just okay, nothing too special. Mochi and ice cream are decent. Overall, an average matcha spot.

title: Hatoya Matcha
name: Ribka S
text: Easily the best matcha shop around. The matcha is high quality, smooth, and flavorful without any bitterness. Great drinks, great vibe, and always consistent. Highly recommend! 💚💛🤍

title: Hatoya Matcha
name: Kingsen Yan
text:
Okay, as a Matcha Addict.
This falls below my expectation

Supposedly more “original” since it’s coming from JP itself.

But it tastes the same just like other matcha in my opinion. With much expensive pricing point (2-3X)

Overall? 7/10
Not worth coming back

title: Hatoya Matcha
name: Christine Pang
text:
Newly opened Hatoya Matcha from Kyoto
Prices nearly the same as in Japan
Recommend : Roasted Matcha with shiratama / rice balls 👍🏻

title: Hatoya Matcha
name: stella kwan
text: Newly opened matcha spot directly from Japan. Taste is very authentic - creamy, nutty & umami. Must try for all matcha lovers out there! Jadi gak perlu jauh2 ke japan untuk nyobain ini 😍

title: Hatoya Matcha
name: Vera Ciputra
text: The ice cream is mind blowing also the roasted matcha latte has a classic matcha taste which is thick enough but not making it “boring-creamy” , the exquisite is there. Kudos

title: Hatoya Matcha
name: priscilla claudia
text: They claimed that their matcha is smooth type so it wont be strong and that's true. I prefer my matcha to be stronger and more umami. For the price point, I don't think it is worth as there are other options with stronger matcha and similar or even cheaper price points.

title: Hatoya Matcha
name: Octaviana Rombe
text: Love the matcha latte + coconut milk + shiratama + matcha ice cream. Note: the ice cube a bit too big.

title: Hatoya Matcha
name: Claudia Michelle Chandra
text:
This matcha spot has been all over social media that i had to try it.

We ordered the matcha and roasted matcha lattes and, honestly, enak tapi sedikit overpriced. The matcha is rich and tastes premium, but at 100k+ per drink, i expected better especially when compared to local competitors that offer higher grades of matcha at this price point.

The crowd wasnt too bad today (1st Jan) at 5pm and we could order our drinks and find a table straight away.

IMO this is the most premium matcha you can find at LMP but definitely not in the city of jakarta.

title: Hatoya Matcha
name: Nur Hudaeri
text:
With that price tag, it should taste better. It’s too watery and not especially rich or flavorful.

I’ve tried many matcha lattes in Jakarta, and this one is overpriced with no details about the matcha.

title: Hatoya Matcha
name: Cheryl Lim
text: The matcha ice cream is definitely worth to try! The matcha latte had a nutty taste and the sweetness was just right.

title: Hatoya Matcha
name: Antonius Gondo
text: IMO not worth the money. Really disappointed with their original pure matcha especially at that pricepoint. You should at least put more information about the tea used in your drinks, such as origin region of tea, tea cultivar and shading method. Have some respect for your own tea.

title: Hatoya Matcha
name: Ivy Yeung
text: Exactly the same like in Japan, ad org dr jepang ny jg, very strong & rich, mild creamy type of matcha, wajib coba mochi & roasted matcha <3 price mrip2 kyk d jpg mnurut ku, tmptny jg aesthetic bgtt

title: Hatoya Matcha
name: Javion Lim
text: I bought 6 both of the drinks and desserts. Both of them successfully satisfy my matcha-lusted tongue😛🍵. Love this place so much twin!✌️

title: Hatoya Matcha
name: weliana s
text:
Matcha Hatoya...
Authentic premium matcha from Kyoto, a one-time experience.
The place is cozy and the service is friendly. They serve matcha with onde2 (rice balls)... very delicious. Chewy, especially when not sweet.
Truly healthy food.
Feedback

Improve your speaking

title: Hatoya Matcha
name: Peter Schwartz
text: Hype, not good, over priced, I ordered matcha mochi, meh just a plain rice ball. This place cater upper class Indonesian with excess cash to spend.

title: Hatoya Matcha
name: Sri Wur Astuti
text:
​I highly recommend the Roasted matcha latte.
The matcha has that vibrant green color and a deep, umami-rich flavor profile that stays smooth rather than bitter. Flavor isn't masked by  sugar.

title: Hatoya Matcha
name: lou
text: got the iced matcha latte, hojicha latte and the warabimochi and it was really good! would definitely recommend!

title: Hatoya Matcha
name: Budi Sukardi
text: It was good, i ordered their roasted matcha and mochi with matcha ice cream.  You got what you paid for.

title: Hatoya Matcha
name: fanny deng
text: As matcha lovers, I'm so glad that this one is already here in Jakarta ♥️ no need to try the most expensive one, their regular matcha already umami 😊

title: Hatoya Matcha
name: ANASTASIA SOESANTO
text: Matcha latte with ice cream and motchi nya enak - also the motchi with green tea ice cream and sauce nya enak - senang bisa ada authentic Japanese matcha desserts place here - two thumbs up 👍👍

title: Hatoya Matcha
name: Bryan Wirawan
text:
Service: 10/10 (especially the cashier with the framed glasses, super friendly and polite)

Food :7/10 (personally not a matcha fan, but their ice cream is delicious)

Vibe: 1/10 (i don’t feel comfortable, due to the excessive amount of cctv cameras around the whole place. It just felt like we’re always being watched, therefore lack of privacy)

Price: 4/10 (personally i think the price is a-bit too expensive, especially for west jakarta)

Overall, not bad, maybe would get take away instead of dining in their place :D

title: Hatoya Matcha
name: Budiman Suryadi
text: The drink is great. Try their speciality latte. Must try their matcha mochi. Matcha ice cream and shiratama.

title: Hatoya Matcha
name: Albert Elimin
text:
Service: 9/10 (Cashier with black frame glasses was super friendly and polite, food & drinks served time was good, Tables were cleaned well and quick)

Food: 7/10 (The matcha taste pretty good but not a big fan of the proportion, really enjoy their ice cream and Shi ratama topping)

Vibe: 1/10 (Just sitting there made me really uncomfortable, it felt like I had a lack of privacy and being watched with the amount of cctv around the place, I thought the place was suppose to be more like a cafe were i could chill and relax but it was the complete opposite)

Price: 3/10 (I do think that the price are quite absurd, and can't really justify myself coming back often for their matcha due to this)

Overall, good matcha but quite pricey and wouldn't recommend it for people who wants to WFC

title: Hatoya Matcha
name: Rut Liesl
text: Had a very unpleasant experience here. The service was impolite and made me feel uncomfortable. Staff kept walking back and forth to our table & also asking for our purchase receipt, which felt like we were being subtly asked to leave. This is not how customers should be treated. I hope the management can improve their service attitude.

title: Hatoya Matcha
name: Noor Dewi
text:
The matcha is really delicious, the place is comfortable and strategic location ..
Hatoya @ Lippo Mall Puri

title: Hatoya Matcha
name: Cecilia Tiorianto
text: my fav : roasted matcha + ice cream 🍵🫶🏻

title: Hatoya Matcha
name: Anisa Shadrina
text: the daily matcha latte was just ok

title: Hatoya Matcha
name: Yuliyana Cpf
text: matcha with ice cream & shiratama yummy🤤✨

title: TAO Cafe Jakarta
name: dewica
text: masih jarang banget tempat cafe di jakarta timur yang cocok jadi tempat WFC. tapi tao ini cocok banget untuk jadi pilihan WFC, photoshoot, tempat hangout, meeting, dll .... selain mudah aksesnya, aesthetic tempatnya, ramah pelayananya, wifinya kenceng, oke banget pokoknya 👋🏼😉💭💖

title: TAO Cafe Jakarta
name: kafabih Abdullah
text: Tempatnya lumayan bagus. Ada indoor dan outdoor bagi yg mau ngrokok. Indoornya ada ac dan dingin. Makanan lumayan enak. Kopi standar enak.

title: TAO Cafe Jakarta
name: Ekanabilah
text:
Untuk daerah kalisari tempatnya cukup cozy, dan nyaman banget. Ada indoor dan outdoor, untuk indoornya AC cukup berasa adem dan sejuk. Tempatnya gak begitu ramai jadi enak buat santai,ngobrol.

Untuk penyajian makannan dan minumannya ini termasuk cepet, gak terlalu nunggu lama.

Order snack Smoked Beef Cheese toast, oke sih isiannya ada telurnya dan kejunya dgn harga 39rb. Dan Saran aja, untuk makanan seperti Smoked Beef Cheese Toastnya penyajiannya lebih baik dipiring aja, karna lebih memudahkan cust untuk makan. Dan alangkah baiknya dikasih pisau juga, jangan cuma garpu.
Untuk dessertnya order Choco Brownie Ice Cream, ternyata Browniesnya type yang lembut, lembek gitu. Bukan yang crunchy. dipadukan ice cream agak jadi tambah basah gitu, untuk rasa enak sih gak terlalu manis.
Dan untuk minumannya Order, Ombre Passion Fruit dan Lychee Yakult  enak, seger, manisnya pas.

Order untuk Take Away juga, Strawberry Cheesecakenya enak banget weeey rekomen!! Perpaduan manis gurihnya dapet, dan selai strawberrynya asli dari buahnya.
Coffee Butterscothnya (gak kefoto) enak, gak terlalu strong kopinya.

Pelayanannya juga ramah-ramah yagesyaaaa...☺️

title: TAO Cafe Jakarta
name: Bryan Alfu
text:
Dari luar kelihatan cafe wah dan mewah. Pas masuk ternyata gak sesuai ekspektasi, eitsss maksudnya saya gak sesuai ekspektasi kalau tempat bagus cozy nyaman pasti mahal. Ternyata harganya murah dan masih cocok dikantong, tempat nyaman dan pegawainya ramah dalam service pelanggan.
Tempatnya teduh pinggir jalan, bisa parkir motor atau mobil, serta bisa duduk dilantai 1 indor atau outdoor ataupun lantai 2.

Makanannya enak juga dan minumannya juga enak dengan harga murah pula. Cocok buat tempat nongkrong waktu nugas atau ngerjain kerjaan, cocok juga sambil gosip ama besti wkwk.

Dessert mereka enak banget, poin plus yaitu gak kemanisan pas banget dilidah, soalnya aku sendiri suka eneg kalau dessert manis pake banget, ini tapi pas cocok dengan kopi ☕.

Jan lupa mampir yaaa🍀

title: TAO Cafe Jakarta
name: Esti Nur Amalia
text:
Recommended!
Beberapa hal yang aku suka dan apresiasi dari tempat ini :
- menunya bervariasi, dari makanan, minuman, dan snack. Aku pesan butterscotch latte dan ubi brulee nya enak! (8/10)
- cafenya cukup luas dan bersih.
- toiletnya bersih
- tempat parkirnya sangat layak untuk mobil dan motor. Petugas parkirnya juga ramah
- harganya standar, sesuai dengan fasilitas dan kenyamanan yg kita dapat ditempat ini.

Saran saya untuk yg preferensi minumannya tipe yg tidak terlalu manis, pesanlah less sugar. Karena normal sugar disini terlalu manis.

Hal yg mungkin perlu diimprove, saat saya kesini saya pilih ditempat indoornya ACnya kurang berasa, jadi agak panas.

Overall saya puas ke tempat ini, dan sangat memungkinkan untuk ke tempat ini lagi untuk WFC, kumpul dengan teman, atau hanya sekadar baca buku.

title: TAO Cafe Jakarta
name: Mahdiyyah
text:
Salah satu cafe yang wfcable di kalisari yang wajib didatengin. Cafe ini cantik banget. Ada banyak tanaman hias, standing mirror, dan cafenya high ceiling. Temanya bunga bunga, kesukaan ibu ibu nih, pasti 😁

Selalu nyaman tiap wfc di sini karena semua fasilitas tersedia. Sinyal wifi aman dan colokan tersedia walaupun ngga semua meja ada colokan. Volume musik yang diputar ngga begitu mengganggu dan cafe ini jarang berisik. Ngga cuma itu, ada mushola di lantai 2 yang mukena dan sajadahnya bersih. Toiletnya dan wastafel juga bersih. Plus poinnya, pelayan di sini tuh ramah banget dan serving timenya juga gercep.

Menu favorit ku di sini, keju aroma, nasi ayam andaliman, dan kopi huta. Untuk pisang gorengnya, menurut ku masih perlu diimprove.

Waktu dateng ke sini, aku pernah cobain  chicken sambal matah. Sesuai klaim indonesian taste mereka, sambal matahnya itu ngga ditumis dan enak. Serehnya sedikit banget, hampir ngga keliatan, bikin sambal matahnya kurang balance. Yang aku suka tuh nasinya pulen, rasa ayamnya pas, dan dikasih lalapan. Bakal lebih oke lagi kalau goreng ayamnya ngga kematengan jadi tepungnya ngga keras waktu digigit. Fyi, harga di menu sebelum dikenakan ppn + service yg totalnya 15% yapp.

title: TAO Cafe Jakarta
name: Fathya Farranajla
text:
💻 8/10 Sangat recommended untuk WFC karena cafenya gk begitu ramai banget dan sering liat orang yang WFC disini. Ambiecenya nyaman dengan musik yang tidak terlalu mendominasi suasana cafe

🍴😋 9/10 Harga makanya disini setara dengan rasanya. High quality dan variatif. Kali ini saya review yang Ayam Andaliman dan Dumping yang rasanya kaya akan bumbu dan rempah. Akan tetapi untuk spaghetti mungkin mid ya 😅, walaupun tetap enak.

title: TAO Cafe Jakarta
name: dian ayu
text: Pertama kali dateng kesini pesan minum es coklat dan hot coklat untuk rasa standard aja nothing spesial. Sedangkan makanannya pesan yg mix platter, ada kentang, otak2 sama ebi furai dan untuk rasanya cukup oke krn ada taburan garlic cincang yg dibikin seperti keju parmesan. Tapi sayangnya utk tempat indoor semakin ramai ruangannya jadi gak dingin padahal waktu kesana malam hari sehabis ujan tp tetap ruangannya terasa panas

title: TAO Cafe Jakarta
name: Zulhardiansyah Dwitama
text:
Beberapa ada menu yg tidak available krn habis.

Masukan dari saya, hot chocolate nya jangan pake milo, beneran hot chocolate lah, krn harganya sudah 25ribu dan penyajiannya tolong pake gelas beling, jangan pake gelas starling. Haha

title: TAO Cafe Jakarta
name: Jo Immanuel
text:
Hi hi 👋
Kembali lagi

Kali ini review cafe di Jaksel deket Balai Kimia Kemasan
TAO CAFE
Tempat enak, pewe banget! Dingin, nyaman juga. Parkiran juga ada kok mayan.

Minuman Ok, sesuai harga nya... affordable pokoknya..
Good job

title: TAO Cafe Jakarta
name: Aldi Kung
text: Cafe yang cozy di sekitaran Kalisari Pasar Rebo. Pesan nasi ayam andaliman & lychee tea. Nasi ayam andalimannya enak, porsi nasinya cukup, ayamnya model ayam karage goreng tepung, enak crispy gurih, sambal andalimannya juga enak pedasnya pas. Lychee teanya standard dapat potongan buah lychee 2pcs. Saran: dine in area indoor bisa dilengkapi tirai/ gorden karena kacanya besar dan saat siang hari AC nya kurang terasa dingin, Sukses selalu tks

title: TAO Cafe Jakarta
name: Andri Rohman
text: menurut aku ini cafe paling cozy bangett sih,suasana nya pun serasa di rumah sendiri. Kalo untuk menunya menurut aku available murah murah pas di kantong, tapi kalo soal rasa ga jauh beda dengan restoran, tadi aku pesan nasi goreng Tao, rasanya otentik bangett,ga kebanyakan minyak and smooky nya juga dapet. Next time pastinya balik lagi deh mau coba menu lain kayaknya jauh lebih enak.😍

title: TAO Cafe Jakarta
name: Strawberrymilkshake
text: Tempatnya bagus, ceilingnya tinggi, banyak tanaman bagus spt monstera king. Harga makanannya affordable dan minumannya juga, makanan dan minumannya enak enak

title: TAO Cafe Jakarta
name: Mee Muni
text: Ternyata ada cafe segemeshh ini di daerah kalisari. Gaskeun !! Krn masih wfh dan lagi gak puasa sok lah . Coba in nasi goreng nya lumayan tapi pedes nya lada :(. Untuk mie gorengnya enakk. Red velvet cookiesnya enak sih tp aku lebih suka kalau lebih crunchy. Minum nya cobain yg pinky gemesin berry cereal tuh enaggg deh. Kopi aku coba kopi latte mereka dan cocoklah sebagai pecinta light coffee ☺️

title: TAO Cafe Jakarta
name: Margaret Gultom
text: Tempatnya sangat nyaman tidak bising, semua pekerjanya juga sangat ramah dan membantu. Makanan terbaik yang saya coba di sini Crispy Chicken Andaliman, harus banget dicoba. Untuk makanan yang lain cukup enak seperti Chicken Tonkatsu Curry tapi Carbonara Truffle agak kurang, lebih ke hambar. Minumannya juga enak saya pesan Lychee Yakult. Yang pasti harus coba Crispy Chicken Andaliman.

title: TAO Cafe Jakarta
name: Rabeka liviyana
text: Setiap sudut nya bagus. Ini cozy bgt ramah anak anak. Matcha latenya juara harga cuma 22 rb enak sumpah pake banget. Kopinya juga enak harga murah murah. Ini cemilannya enak bgt ada kentang otak otak dan kayak udang gtu. Harga cuma 30 rb . Enak bgt

title: TAO Cafe Jakarta
name: Farhanah Khalid
text:
Satnight abis ujan random keliling, nemu lah ini cafe. Interiornya lucu, pastel kayak rumah boneka. Atmosphere nya enak, ga terlalu rame, jarak antar meja ga terlalu rapat, kang parkir helpfull.

Disini cuma pesen minuman Matcha Latte & Matcha Blossom + snack pisgor topping coklat keju.
Review menu yg saya pesan, minumannya sebenernya enak & unik, tp terlalu maniiiissss + terlalu creamy. Apalagi yg Matcha Blossom, kayak ketumpahan sirup + ketumpahan SKM. Sampe es batunya mencair semua tetep manis. Saran, mungkin bisa di review lagi komposisinya.
Untuk pisgornya belum terlalu mateng, jadi agak keras pas udah dingin.

Untuk menu lain belum coba.

Mohon maaf kalo ada kata yg kurang berkenan.
Thanks :)

title: TAO Cafe Jakarta
name: Laliswag
text: tadi sore bukber disini sama temen. cafenya bagus, aesthetic bgt buat poto poto hihi. cuma sayang untuk makanan nya kureng:( pesen chicken sambel matah 3porsi tapi chicken nya kaya chicken angetan tadi pagi/siang semua. keras banget chicken nya huhu, kecewaaa. next jangan ngasih yg angetan gt lg dong😪

title: TAO Cafe Jakarta
name: Ryan Praditya
text: Vibe cafenya cute orange2 gemez. Seating areanya lumayan banyak indoor outdoor asik buat chill dan WFC bareng temen2. F&B menunya juga seru2, minumannya juga. Mesti cobain mocktailnya guys. Ada cireng enak juga lho buat nyemil. Terpenting WIFInya juga lumayan cepet cocok bgt buat WFC bareng temen2. Recommended cafe, please come and visit guys.

text: Trying the new matcha shop in town! Went there on their opening week. Really love how their matcha was really smooth and no bitterness. Especially their mochi and ice cream always out of stock, totally worth the hype 🍵✨️

title: Hatoya Matcha
name: Coco Panda
text:
I recently stopped by Hatoya Matcha, located in Lippo Mall Puri, and I must admit, the experience left quite an impression, though perhaps not entirely in the way one might expect.

Let us begin with the undeniable centrepiece, the matcha itself. It is, without question, of excellent quality. One can genuinely taste the depth, the refinement, and the unmistakable character of authentic Japanese matcha. It is smooth, well balanced, and crafted with evident care. In purely sensory terms, it delivers precisely what it promises.

And then, quite abruptly, reality presents itself in the form of the price.

At approximately IDR 120,000 for a serving, one cannot help but pause. Not out of confusion, but rather out of admiration for the sheer confidence behind such pricing. It is, in its own way, a bold statement. Whether one interprets that as exclusivity or audacity is, perhaps, a matter of personal philosophy.

The atmosphere, however, offers a form of quiet consolation. The space is undeniably comfortable, thoughtfully designed, and well suited for lingering. It accommodates a range of purposes, from relaxed conversations to focused work sessions. In that regard, it performs admirably.

Yet, the lingering question remains not about quality, but about proportion. The experience is pleasant, certainly, but it carries a price point that invites reflection. It feels less like an everyday indulgence and more like a deliberate, perhaps even ceremonial, visit.

All things considered, Hatoya Matcha is a place one ought to try at least once, if only to understand the experience for oneself. For those with a taste for premium offerings and a willingness to embrace the cost, it may well become a favourite. For others, it might remain a memorable, if slightly extravagant, encounter.

title: Hatoya Matcha
name: Edlyn Arjanggi
text:
Roasted Matcha Latte (hot, IDR 85K)
-Rasa nya enak, Request tanpa gula, after taste ada rasa nutty.

Original Pure Matcha (iced, IDR 85K)
-Sangat amat nay. Too watery and tastes awful😅

Matcha Pudding (IDR 75K)
-Enak banget, recommended. Atas nya Matcha, bawah nya rasa custard milk gitu.

P.s.:
-Metode Pembayaran cuma bisa pakai QRIS & Debit Card. Tolong pasang announcement di area kasir, supaya customer nyaman, ga harus ribet cari/ganti metode pembayaran.
-Harga sangat mahal (harga yang tercantum di menu belum termasuk pajak 10%)
-Service nya, 1 out of 5. Gestur staff wanita berkacamata (in frame), ketika ngomong dengan saya, malah masukkin kedua tangan di kantong celana (gaya santai) dan gaya bicara nya ga sopan.
-Bayangkan, di Hatoya hanya ada 1 whisker staff pria, dan dengan antrian pesanan customer yang banyak, untuk menanti 1 pesanan jadi tuh lama banget😱🤯😳
-Antara staff wanita dan pria ketika bikin minuman dia di area pick-up, malah berdebat. Hal yang nggak perlu didenger customer sih.
-Staff sebaiknya nggak memakai perhiasan apapun, dan minimal gunakan masker atau safety net saat bikin minuman.
-Shock banget sih, pas liat volume minuman iced yang sangat amat sedikit, (140ML), cuma 3/4 dari ukuran gelas woy (truly feel robbed sih)🤯
-Cukup sekali coba, no plans to come back

title: Hatoya Matcha
name: Miketravelsofar
text:
🍵✨ Baru banget buka di Lippo Mall Puri, Hatoya Matcha hadir membawa rasa autentik Jepang dari Kyoto langsung ke Jakarta! 💚 Berdiri sejak 2019 di Kyoto sebagai matcha specialty tea stand, Hatoya terkenal karena pakai matcha Kyoto asli yang berkualitas tinggi, dengan cita rasa yang umami, creamy, dan nggak pahit — benar-benar pengalaman matcha yang beda!  ￼

👀 Spotnya aesthetic banget: desain minimalis modern dengan sentuhan kayu & warna tenang, cocok buat content feed atau TikTok estetik vibes! Di sini kamu bisa lihat langsung proses barista meracik matcha latte fresh to order, dan pilih dari menu matcha latte, es matcha, puding, warabimochi, sampai es krim hojicha — semuanya premium!  ￼

📍 Cocok banget buat:
✔️ lovers matcha 🍃
✔️ konten estetik vibes 📸
✔️ pengalaman Jepang di Jakarta 🇯🇵✨

title: Hatoya Matcha
name: Medisa Putri A. L.
text:
Akhirnya kesampaian juga nyobain matcha viral jepang yang buka di jakarta. Tempat nya ada di Lippo Mall Puri, lantai LG. Dekat dengan lobby.

Area dine in nya cukup luas, ada beberapa sofa juga, dan tersedia bagian outdoor juga, ornamen jepang nya pun oke, hiasan hiasan gantungan lampu nya.

Walaupun antri, tapi antrian nya tidak terlalu lama, maksimal 10 menitan sampai menu kita jadi.

Semua staff nya ramah sekali, dari cashier, kakak barista nya, sampai ke manajer / owner nya yah itu? Menanyakan nomer antrian dan memberitahu order area nya sebelah mana, ramah ramah bgt.

Menurut ku, harga nya memang agak lebih mahal, tapi sebanding kok sama rasa nya. Hari ini aku pesan dengan menu :

• original roasted matcha latte (125k) ; ini sih rekomendasi aku banget, matcha nya light, umami dan bittery, padahal aku minta less sugar tapi ini enak, cocok di lidahku.

• original matcha latte (105k) : kalo ini sama seperti matcha pasa umum nya, sweetnees, karna pakai fresh milk oke juga.

(+) pajak
Total yang ku bayarkan : 253000

title: Tyfel Coffee
name: Chocosabin
text:
I actually first visited Tyfel Coffee back when they were still at their Tanjung Duren outlet, before they moved to Greenville. Pre-COVID, this place was one of my go-to spots for WFC (work from café) — I spent quite a lot of time here.

For drinks, I tried:

Violet Blast
A refreshing mix of honey, fresh lemon, and tea. It’s light, slightly tangy, and has a natural sweetness from the honey. Super easy to drink and perfect if you want something refreshing but not too heavy.

Greenday Mocktail
Made with apple syrup, fresh orange, mint, and soda. This one feels more vibrant and fizzy — fresh, citrusy, and slightly sweet with a hint of mint. A nice pick if you want something sparkling and uplifting.

For the food:

Truffle Fries
Crispy, fragrant, and generously coated with that savory truffle flavor. Always a safe and satisfying choice for sharing (or not 😆).

Mozzarella Sticks
Golden fried on the outside with that cheesy, stretchy center. Classic comfort snack that pairs well with the drinks.

Overall, Tyfel Coffee was (and still is) a solid spot for WFC — good drinks, decent comfort food, and a chill atmosphere to spend a few productive hours. Definitely brings back memories of my pre-COVID café days ☕✨

overall, dia punya yg original dan roasted, dan menurutku ga terlalu menonjolkan variasi cultivar matcha kaya matchabar lainnya

add on oat (20k) dan ice creamnya (50k) cukup pricy dibanding matchabar lain

so ya, krn ini di lippo mall puri, jadi fit the consumer typenya yg suka jajan tanpa liat pricelist.

cukup gemas dengan cara mereka mengatur posisi tools dan menggunakannya, krn open bar, jadi terpampang berantakan dan nyiprat2nya tuh bikin jiwa2 mau bantu rapiin 😅

title: Hatoya Matcha
name: Jennifer Yauwanita
text:
Aku visit hari Minggu, 21 desember kemarin, aku duduk ber3 +anak (temen, aku, suami, & anak) & kita meeting, awalnya aku sempet keluarin roti buat aku suapin ke anak, tiba2 di tegur sama yang sepertinya salah satu ownernya, katanya gk boleh bawa makanan dari luar, boleh tapi jangan taruh di atas meja, ak langsung minta maaf dan langsung masukin ke tas lagi.
Kita duduk di 2 meja kecil di dempetin dengan 2 seater sofa tempel tembok, dan 2 kursi, aku kebetulan lagi keluar bawa anak buat ganti pampers, waktu aku balik lagi ke meja, katanya owner yang sama samperin meja kita mau ambil meja dan kursinya buat tamu lain, tp suami aku blg ada orang cuma lg keluar sebentar (lg ganti pampers) dan suami akhirnya kasih 1 kursi buat dibawa si owner.
Selang berapa waktu tempatnya jadi rame mungkin karena baru buka dan sepertinya banyak tamu undangan juga, tiba-tiba owner yang sama samperin kita lagi "sorry ini kondisi lagi rame, tolong yaa, kamu bisnis saya juga bisnis", dan temenku masih berusaha kayak "ohh ya udah kita pesen lagi" dan di jawab "ohh terserah terserah, tp ini lg rame. Tolong ya", akhirnya kita memutuskan buat pindah ke coffee shop seberangnya. Mungkin karena owner jadi dia punya 'power' buat secara gk langsung menyudahi meja kita.
Sedikit input mungkin bisa jadi pertimbangan : Kalo emang ada tamu-tamu undangan untuk grand opening jangan di buka untuk public juga, mungkin bisa dibuat half day/full day untuk tamu undangan.
yang kedua per-meja di beri waktu 60-90 menit batas duduk (info dari awal), jadi fair untuk semua meja dapat waktu yang sama, karena kalo diliat kanan kiri ada yang sudah lebih dulu dari kita dan sampe kita disamperin juga mereka masih duduk. Sekian review dari pengalaman saya, semoga bisa di terima dengan bijak dan jadi koreksi untuk kedepannya.
Terima Kasih

title: KOZI Coffee 3.7 Jeruk Purut
name: Darell Mahardhika
text:
This coffee shop, which has two locations in Jakarta, started in Bandung and was found to be a hidden gem in the Jeruk Purut neighborhood of South Jakarta.

I went to this coffee shop on a Sunday night, and maybe because it had just rained, the ambiance was cozy and personal. I talked a lot with the barista that evening about coffee beans and how to create great coffee, and they are really welcoming to customers.

The menu is rather large and largely similar to what is offered at their location in Bandung; their specialty is "kosangsu", so be sure to sample that when you visit!

To sum up, Kozi Coffee is a great choice for individuals who like to spend time alone themselves or just converse with the baristas. Continue to enjoy your coffee's flavor and uniqueness! cheers Kozi!

title: Fillmore Coffee
name: Olha Burlai
text:
The coffee is okay, but drinks here are overpriced. I had matcha latte with coconut, it had interesting texture, very thick, but the matcha itself wasn’t that good.
The interior looks nice and modern, but almost all chairs don’t have a back to lean on, which doesn’t contribute to coziness.
I would not recommend the place.

title: Fillmore Coffee
name: Cardo Bangun
text: Located within the same area as Miers Hotel Kuningan, this cafe offers a comfortable and pleasant atmosphere, ideal for working remotely. The internet connection is excellent, the coffee is of great quality, and the food is both delicious and reasonably priced. The staff are polite and welcoming, a highly recommended place to enjoy good coffee while getting some work done.

title: Fillmore Coffee
name: B Morsi
text:
Great coffee place
Coffee is full of flavor, well made and served.
Good seating available inside plus it’s no smoking.
Small Outdoor smoking area is available upstairs with plants and some views.
Groovy music selection played and consistently good

title: Fillmore Coffee
name: Desy Effendy
text: Love the coffee shop because you can have everything! Good food, good coffee with our furkid(s).. just make sure we put them on diapers and leash 😊 Also the service is very very nice.. Will come back for sure!

title: Fillmore Coffee
name: Nooo
text:
If you’re a coffee lover like us, this shop is a must-visit! They use local beans, and the Flores bean really stands out with its amazing taste. I highly recommend choosing a white coffee option to truly highlight its unique flavor notes. After trying a few espresso varieties, here’s my top picks:
1.	Cappuccino with Flores beans – rich and smooth, it’s a standout.
2.	Gibraltar with Flores beans – a perfect balance of strength and smoothness.
3.	Flat White with Toraja beans – beautifully creamy with a subtle depth.
4.	Avogato  – a must-try, it’s absolutely delicious!

The minimalist, industrial decor and quiet vibes make it a perfect place to relax and enjoy a great cup of coffee.

- Tourist from Malaysia 🫰🏻-

title: Fillmore Coffee
name: Johnconnor G
text: Must be one of the best breakfast places ever! The grilled cheese and tomato sauce is a great combo here along with their delicious berry smoothies! I would recommend this place to anybody here! Don’t forget to get the animal fries!

title: Fillmore Coffee
name: Dominique Virgil Tuapetel
text:
This is one of my best, top choice of coffee shops in Jakarta.
The rustic vibe combined with its good coffee & food instantly makes it my go-to place.
They have a 2nd floor area for smokers.

I always ordered hot/ice cappuccino and it never failed! For the food, I loved their rice chicken curry & their burgers. My top dessert choice is their banana cake.

title: Fillmore Coffee
name: Aryo Indarto
text:
Our quest to find off the grid less hip coffee place took us here.

Immediately love the whole ambiance, the menu are straightforward and no fancy2coffee drink.

Two single origin to choose from so you can adjust to whatever your liking.

Great place to just shut down from busy work.

title: Fillmore Coffee
name: Lee Lan Kam
text: Small and cosy coffee place hidden in South Jakarta. This 2-storey coffee place is located within the compound of Suites at Seven. To get to it, you will need to get through the main entrance of Suites at Seven boutique serviced apartment. There’s a selection of local coffee beans and pastries and smoothies bowl too. Love the coffee here. Tea and other beverages are also available if you’re not a coffee drinker. Butter croissant was good. Almond croissant was on a sweet side for my liking. The crumbly blueberry bread was delicious, not overly sweet. The top floor is a smoking area decorated with greens, wooden tables and chairs. My only qualms is the toilet is rather near to the ‘dining’ area which is understandable in view of limited space. Wished that the toilet door is closed all the time for hygienic purposes. People here are super friendly and attentive and honest.

title: Fillmore Coffee
name: Yasmin Moedjoko
text: A two stories small cafe located inside an apartment area. The dining inside is limited, but they have outdoor seating on the second floor. Only ordered the beverages though they also sell foods&pastries. My favorite is their matcha! It tastes good, not too earthy and sweet. My input for the place is: I think it's better to provide a prayer room for the muslim friends, since the one that is available on the parking lot of the apartment is not proper.

title: Fillmore Coffee
name: Falencia Naoenz
text:
My favorite coffee shop in Jakarta, hands down! It's like entering a different world, the ambiance is super cozy to relax on the weekend, having brunch or finishing some assignments. The menu is simple yet everything's superb.

Place is limited and it can be a little pricey but definitely a perfect place to recharge.

title: Fillmore Coffee
name: Mr. Oktavianus
text: Quite far from my expectation when visited this place. Eventhough 1st floor had good ambience, it was small and only had limited seats, especially with the electric plugs. I came over to have online meeting while enjoyed good coffee. However, 1st floor already full and need to move to 2nd floor. It was horrible, shabby and very hot, especially when you came before the sunset. I tried hot cappuccino and electric feel. Hot cappuccino was OK, but I did not like the other one.

title: Fillmore Coffee
name: Meta Noveranta
text: Cool spot for your morning coffee. The ambience of this place is indescribably nice. Good spot for working remotely. Coffee price is somehow above average compared to other coffee shops nearby but still affordable. Had iced long black to dine in and iced latte for takeaway.

title: Fillmore Coffee
name: Andil Ong
text:
- Nashville Chicken Burger is pretty good
- Iced Coffee is too acidic and sour for me but it tastes pleasant enough
- Very relaxed and chill vibes and atmosphere
- Located inside Seven Suites and there is no signage

title: Fillmore Coffee
name: Aleksandr Nikulshin
text:
One of the nicest coffee shops I’ve been. Really recommend as a place to spend time with your thoughts, study or work !
This is my must have place to visit when I’m in Jakarta + Great filter coffee!
Also second floor is great when it is not hot outside

title: Fillmore Coffee
name: Vijay Raj
text: Best coffee I've tried in Jakarta so far. If you are looking for hot coffee this is the place. Flat white is immaculate. They rotate their beans - I've tried Guatemala, Papua, Java, Ethiopia, etc, and you don't pay extra for it as they use it for their standard espresso shots. Good WiFi for workaholics. Limited food choice. An ideal place to work or socialise. Staff are friendly. Aesthetics are pleasing. Quaint corner of Miers Kuningan hotel. Type Fillmore coffee on Google maps or Grab booking. Standard of coffee as good as, if not better, than those I had in Europe and North America.

title: Fillmore Coffee
name: Matthew Suwandi
text:
Fillmore Coffee
A good place to sip coffee and have a fruitful discussion with friends (2-4 person preferrable).

Service: 5 stars
Since the beginning entering the premise we receive the warm welcome. While ordering, the explanation from the cashier is clear for us to understand. Payment preferrably cashless.

Location: 4 stars
By position it is located in Setiabudi area which pretty near of the Jakarta’s CBD area, however the access is only one and the road is pretty narrow for 2 car to access, its only fit 1 car and 1 bike.

Aesthetics: 5 stars
Loved it. The cozy, greeny and woody vibes, will definitely cooling your eyes from the cloud of vehicles in jakarta.

Food: 5 stars
Honestly, havent try the main course food menu here, so I am only commenting on the coffee latte, honey latte and japanese coffee, which shows the authentic flavor of the beans. Satisfied.

Worth the Price: 5 stars
Coffee drinks below 50k. Free flow of mineral water jar. Wifi available, good music, and there are smoking area upstairs and non-smoking in the first floor indoor area.

title: Fillmore Coffee
name: Wenny Vinciani
text:
Good ambiance cafe with good coffee☕

The cafe has so much earthy vibe. I really enjoy sitting here.
Good for inserting a productive afternoon with coffee while reading/working/studying.

Would come back again.

We didn't order the food last time though. Just coffee and it was good.

title: Fillmore Coffee
name: Eyufinity
text: I love the laid back vibe, with small greeneries here and there, it's so calming and soothing. The service is great, you can refill plain water at anytime. I ordered their hot V60 manual brew coffee with Wanoja Avisani beans from west Java (taste smooth and just a bit fruity herbally) and their ice coffee mocktail named : Markisso (a perfect sweet blend of espresso, markisa/passion fruit, and a hint of lemon. For the food, I ordered their apple crumble it taste really nice and I'm looking forward to try another cakes and pastries from this coffee shop.

title: Fillmore Coffee
name: Eric
text:
This place is rather secluded but the surrounding was quiet and peaceful. Not many seats on the first floor, though I didn’t check the second floor. Free wifi available made it easy to get some work done. Another great thing about this place is that parking space was plentiful and shaded.

Ordered both of their latte and banana bread. Was it good? Well I came back the next day just to reorder the same thing.

Definitely recommended this place to get a good cup of coffee when you are in the kuningan area.

title: KOZI Coffee 3.7 Jeruk Purut

text:
Surprisingly good food and mocktail,
Very friendly staff
Recomended

name: Arkan Tanriwa
text: I kinda expected more from the photos — that would be my fault. Their offering was alright, but I'm not that sure about the cleanliness of the place. Also, the sitting areas are not that cozy. The only sofa is indoors where you can't smoke.

title: KOZI Coffee 3.7 Jeruk Purut
name: sisca angie
text:
I like the vibes, so chill & feel like home.
Their coffee and another kind of drink was also proper in good way.
But when I came by, the air conditioner was broken, so it was hot inside.
Plus there is mosquitoes inside.
But overall, its cozy & you will have feeling like you're home.

title: KOZI Coffee 3.7 Jeruk Purut
name: isca permata
text: one of the comfiest shop with outdoor seating area. they have chairs all over the lawn, under the tree and some are under a nice tent. it's a bit tricky when it's rain but otherwise coffee is good with nice atmosphere

title: KOZI Coffee 3.7 Jeruk Purut
name: Darren Adrinanto
text: I really like the place, cozy just like the name. The price of the coffee is cheap and for single origin coffee not just a basic single origin coffee, the arabica beans taste so good. I like v60 hot or in ice japanese, the average of beans have a good flavor. The baristas are all friendly. Hanging out at kozi feels hanging out on the terrace of your house.

title: KOZI Coffee 3.7 Jeruk Purut
name: Rafi Ramadhan Seba
text: Cozy environment with the house design. Kosangsu is always the way to go. Tried the indomie geprek which was delicious. During heavy rains, raindrops may enter the canopy area outside. There is a musholla in front of the Kozi, but not on the building itself.

title: KOZI Coffee 3.7 Jeruk Purut
name: Rahma Hutami
text: A charming little coffee shop. Nice coffee. Great Ambience.

title: KOZI Coffee 3.7 Jeruk Purut
name: Valencia Stephania (Valencia_SH)
text: Really cozy place to hangout with friends for coffee..

title: KOZI Coffee 3.7 Jeruk Purut
name: Rio Rinaldo
text: It's really hard to find a coffee shop that is housed in a green surrounding such as this one. And there are more seats outside in the garden than the inside. This is a perfect setting for a lazy weekend. Now, the drink. I love my flat white, but not so much with their signature drink, Kosangsu. The additional banana syrup to the latte is just too much, I should've gone with the less fruity other signature drink, the kold brown.

title: KOZI Coffee 3.7 Jeruk Purut
name: Zulham Yachya
text:
Good place, green ambiance   Feels like grandma house!
Nice coffee. I was bought ice americano
Minus super tiny parking lot (especially for car)

text:
A coffee house that offers frontyard atmosphere. Had a wide range of coffee options.

Downside is the limited parking spot, better ride your two-wheeled or catch a cab.

title: Fillmore Coffee
name: imanuel arnold
text: Secluded and peaceful, yet cozy and laidback place nestled in kuningan area. I like how it being such a nice place to have coffee away from the Jakarta's hustle and bustle without the need to get distant from the business district. My coffee utilized Java beans that was clear and citrusy, light enough for me to enjoy the afternoon. The interior and overall vibe was kinda posh and good looking with the overall minimalism industrial atmosphere going on. I liked their beef donut, and recommend you to try. And to top that all of, their friendly service impressed me.

title: Fillmore Coffee
name: Maggie B
text: Great coffee, friendly service, spacious parking space, cozy atmosphere, wifi is good and there’s a few outlets (not too many though). but overall great place for wfc, food looks good, would want to try next time

title: Fillmore Coffee
name: Reddy Panggabean
text: It's a hidden gem, hiding between skyscrapers in a downtown area. Luckily the pin map of this cafe is pretty accurate. The place merge  with a high end residential. Try their latte and cappuccino,  service quite good, we came in a non rush hour, so it's good time to have small talks, quiet ambiance,  To be honest, I still like A***ali Senopati though, price  quite similar, but the place is more spacious. I hope they offer more variety of food and drink in the future. Not recommended for a long stay, since their seat is not comfortable enough to sit in a long time

title: Fillmore Coffee
name: Titania Tan
text:
Chicken Curry: The curry sauce is little bit salty for me, nicely battered, the portion is quite big
The chocolate wedang surprisingly good, unique, gak jela minumnya. They use stainless straw 👍

title: Fillmore Coffee
name: Ika Pusparini
text: The place is secluded with good ambience. The decoration is earthy and comfortable to stay long.  The food is little bit pricey. The pastry and coffee are okay.

title: Fillmore Coffee
name: Emyr Farhan
text: The last time I went here, I was enjoying my novel while drinking Matcha Latte and eating a chicken wrap. All of the staffs are polite and kind, at the same time, their service is fast paced. As I was enjoying my macha latte and my novel, the super plus point is the gorgeous view of greenery and Jakarta's skyline. The only drawback of this coffee place is the price, which is quite pricey for the drinks, however it is worth it as the cafe provide wifi, fast service, and you could stay in there as long as you like 😉

title: Fillmore Coffee
name: Leonard Sumali
text: Small place. Food came from the hotel not the cafe. Food taste so average while price is quite high. Coffee was too bitter until i ask another milk. Burger 👎🏼 no frenchfries either

title: Fillmore Coffee
name: Sam
text:
Amazing coffee. They have oat milk, soy milk and a selection of sweets.

Staff is great, they speak English and Mohammed behind the counter is absolutely amazing

Great food too

Will definitely visit again

title: Fillmore Coffee
name: Gamma E. Akbar
text:
One of hidden gems.. ambience is superb convi. I tried the honey latte which is a mixed of bittersweet in a balanced way.

Tips:
the coffee shop has no sign that you can see from outside road, if you bring vehicle.. make sure the security opens the gates.

title: Fillmore Coffee
name: Qino Rigano
text: Saw a bunch of times this place when i go to egghotel, finally try this time after some barista told us to go here to try their gibraltar. Basically its a piccolo with magic recipe. Got to chat with the barista (mas panjul) and got some explaination about their standard of white serving. They use single origin beans and it got changes each day, so every time you go here you will got a new experience of their beans of the day. Small but cozy places. 4,5 out of 5.

title: Fillmore Coffee
name: erny lidya
text: One of the best coffee shops in town. You can pick your own beans and they have various beans everyday. Love the ambience too. Been here so many times and never bored. Located in ground floor inside seven suites in kuningan neighborhood (near itc kuningan/mall ambassador area).

title: Fillmore Coffee
name: Jennifer Citra
text: the coffee here are top notch, especially Markisso (one of their specialty) 🤌🏻🙌🏻. one of the best & special coffee place I’ve ever been. definitely a five star coffee shop in Jakarta ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

title: Fillmore Coffee
name: Silvia Jhonatan
text:
The coffee is very good and the atmosphere is also very comfortable place to share with your bestfriend.
The location is in the middle of town and there is a description at the door gate.
Highly recomended to try with friends.

title: Fillmore Coffee
name: Khalisa Herman
text: I ordered bakmi ayam with extra chicken and was shocked to be charged almost double the original menu price. The food arrived late, and to make things worse, the chicken chunks in the bakmi were undercooked. Very disappointing experience — definitely not worth the price.

title: Fillmore Coffee
name: Ivander Wijaya
text:
Strategic place, comfy ambience. To me the beverages is better compare to the main course.

All crew are friendly and parking is spacious.

title: Fillmore Coffee
name: Rio Rinaldo
text: Tucked away inside an apartment building without any signage, the coffee shop seems to be a secret. But judging the number of people during my visit, not a well kept one. My latte is great, balanced and rich, and the banana chocolate cake is not bad. The place is not too big, with dark industrial theme for decor. Wifi connection is fast and they serve free water (more independent coffee shops are doing this, kudos).

title: Fillmore Coffee
name: Blanca Natalie
text: This was my second time visiting Fillmore. I ordered their (what does this food called?). It was too sweet for me. But the coffee with orange(?) was great. Please check the sugar level 😉🙏🏻

title: Fillmore Coffee
name: Bunny With Coffee
text:
The location might not be easy to reach but I ensure you that you ought to put this place on your must visit coffee shop in Jakarta. They pick their beans carefully, serve Manual brew in the right way, and service is always friendly, snacks and food were always the best ingredients and delicious taste. Inside there was not much space to sit but it was comfy, The cool bathroom was always clean and smelled good. Try to come here morning if you want to enjoy the Sunday vibe having coffee in this place, I came here many time on the weekend and alway with my driver, easier because if you drive your car might get a little problem to park, my suggestion is bring your driver with you or simply just get a taxi or grab.
Well well, best of luck Fillmore Coffee.
🐰♥️☕️

title: Fillmore Coffee
name: Edwin Yang
text: Place is beautiful but quite narrow. They have second floor as well. The access to this place is quite difficult (it's inside a suite and no signs written). Coffee is good, service is so so. They even have rule that if you want to sit upstairs everyone in your group must order coffee minimum 1 each person.

title: Fillmore Coffee
name: Dragono Halim
text:
First of all, they serve avocado ice cream for affogato! A simple thing that matters. 😃

I love how they run this business; their coffee was decent and lovely as well as their pastry, and they serve it with such a professional gesture. You'll love the vibe.

I also love how they arrange every stuffs in this coffeeshop, the interior design, even its toilet. 😅

title: Oddity Coffee
name: Cindytia Evelin
text:
A hidden coffee shop in Kelapa Gading.
The coffee prices vary, mostly above 50k.

Personally it’s quite pricey. They have lots of coffee flavor options. I ordered the ginger coffee latte and yeah, you can totally guess the taste, there’s that spicy kick from the ginger extract.

The ambience is just okay, not super comfy for long chats

title: Oddity Coffee
name: Fitri Rachmadini
text:
We stopped by Oddity Coffee and absolutely loved it! Their coffee has that perfect creamy and milky taste — just the right balance for a comforting cup.

You have to try their ube cheesecake — it’s lovely, soft, and not overly sweet, the kind of dessert that makes you smile after the first bite. Definitely a must-visit spot for coffee and dessert lovers! ☕🍰

title: Oddity Coffee
name: Lowilius Wiyono
text: Loved the ambience, perfect for wfc. The second floor has long seatings with tons of power outlet. The coffee was great, i ordered americano with classic blend. The korean garlic croissant was also nice. Recommended for another wfc session or group hangout

title: Oddity Coffee
name: Putri Silvi
text: Such a cozy spot for WFC! Coffee is really good, ambience is nice, and the barista is friendly

title: Oddity Coffee
name: Affi Assegaf
text: Such a warm and welcoming space with equally warm staff. Our barista, Tama, was vey friendly and knowledgeable about coffee. He’s clearly very passionate about it and we enjoyed chatting with him. Coffee and tea were good. We didn’t try the food but the menu looks interesting with good selection of light bites and heavy meals. We ordered one mocha nougat cake to share and it was a HUGE slice. Three of us tried to gnaw at it for a while and we hardly made a dent 😅 It was nice though, the cake was moist and fragrant. Next time we will try the cheesecake and manual brew!

title: Oddity Coffee
name: Laurent Trident
text:
Always love the ambiance here, a great place to just chill or chat, or even work. The coffee’s amazing, and oh how I missed their Dirty Chai Latte so bad.. Good thing they put it back on the menu now. Their pastries are top notch and they also have great array of non-coffee drinks. Will definitely come again.
Great service as always, and today I was delightfully served by kak Jelly and kak Tiara!

title: Oddity Coffee

text: a nice place to work from cafe! already visited this place multiple times🤍 nice and informative barista: kak alfitra

title: Oddity Coffee
name: Veronica Rina
text: The ambience of the place is very great, comfortable and wfc friendly. The foods excellent, but for the fatcaroons can do better i guess. I ordered Chicken Popcorn, Fatcaroon strawberry, Fruit Cake (Seasonal) and Rose Latte. I really love the Rose Latte. It's a great place with great food with reasonable prices too.

title: Oddity Coffee
name: Roma Shendry
text: Love the ambiance, the music balances the atmosphere and the services is excellent. Thankyou, Mba Fathin

title: Oddity Coffee
name: Jap Family
text: Great homy coffee, and selection of cakes are so good. It has a robot to deliver cakes to your table

title: Oddity Coffee
name: Teguh Gan
text:
This place is quite unique since it's located nearby a wet market, so at first we thought that the google map was fooling around with us 😂.
The ambience was great, very suitable for chilling or working from cafe since the wifi also quite good.
You can also use the second floor if you are hanging out with your friends, since they have quite a lot seats for groups... even has this unique smoking room (max 5 persons).
The coffee was excellent (ordered iced latte and shortbread latte), but the devil's cake was so so (I prefer union's cake, considering the price).
The price is quite standard for a coffee shop. Basically it's recommended to dine in and enjoy the atmosphere, plus they have the small robot that will send your order right to the table.
Enjoy!

title: Oddity Coffee
name: Muthiah
text: An incredibly comfortable place to work or get tasks done. There are power outlets at each table, so no need to worry about finding one. The room's artistic design maintains a comfortable atmosphere for visitors. I ordered honey earl grey tea and salted egg pie. The salted egg pie is absolutely delicious, and the combination with red bean is surprisingly good. Even though I forgot to ask for less sugar in my drink, the normal sweetness level was a bit too much for me. The staff was very friendly and provided detailed explanations of the available menu items. What's truly unique is their use of a robot to deliver orders to customers, and it's incredibly cute 🙈. I will definitely be returning to get my task done there again!

title: Oddity Coffee
name: Lionita Irianti Ginting
text:
recommended WFC spot in Kelapa Gading, lots of electric plug, strong and stable internet connection, clean toilets, and music’s not too loud. food and drink’s a little bit on the pricey side but taste good. shout out to mas ibra for being very friendly and helpful especially in guiding me through my order 😊

didn’t manage to photo the foods but the christmas decoration is pretty 👍🏻

title: Oddity Coffee
name: Indah Putri
text:
Came on a saturday evening for a hangout. The atmosphere was nice and comfy. The staffs were nice and really informative.

We ordered Salted Foam Cocoa, Spicy Popcorn Chicken and Bakmi Ayam Jakarta. The salted foam cocoa was interesting. The salted foam was savoury and creamy. The cocoa was not too sweet. When not mixed, you can taste each component very well and both tastes nice. But when you mix them together, the cocoa taste overpowers the salted foam so you can barely taste the salted foam. But overall it's a nice and unique drink.
We requested the spicy popcorn chicken to be mild and it came as per requested. The chicken was coated with a good amount of batter, not too thick nor thin. The batter was savoury and complimented the chicken well. The chicken was still juicy inside.
The bakmi ayam tastes standard, but the condiment was quite complete. The veggies were crunchy as well as the crackers. The chicken and mushroom topping were okay, so was the bakso and soup.

Overall had a good time in Oddity. Recommended cafe to hangout, study, or even work. Will definitely come back again to try other menus. Keep it up!

title: Oddity Coffee
name: Dareen Y
text: I loved it!! The food was 100/100. The Belgium cake and the salted foam cocoa was excellent. The staff were so friendly. A robot served our food. Upstairs, the place is really good for studying. Downstairs, the place is good for chatting. Most people in the cafe were studying. You could write in a sticky note and stick on the wall too. Toilets are clean

title: Oddity Coffee
name: Stefani Dyandra
text:
Good coffee. They have their specialty beans. I ordered Americano with their specialty’s. Flavor is fruity (hint of mango, strawberry and chocolate). Aren latte is nice, not sweet, coffee and milk are balance.

Place itself very nice, many spots for quick sit, 2nd floor is nice for WFC. Oh they have cute robot that serve your order to your table! Access to the cafe is quiet small but they have plenty parking lot.

:-)

title: Oddity Coffee
name: Rizka
text:
I love this place's layout and ambience. 1st floor is nice for a hangout session with small group of friends or quick work. 2nd floor is for working as they have long tables with many power plugs available, perfect for remote workers! Another nice thing is they don't blast the music too loud, so very comfortable to do some work or even meetings.

Here's what I ordered:
Aloevera lemongrass tea 8/10 - refreshing and not too sweet
Salted foam cocoa 9/10 - Creamy chocolate with nice touch of salted foam
Mocha nougat & Tiramisu Cake 8.5/10 - their cakes are moist and fluffy

title: Oddity Coffee
name: yudistira maharsi
text: Thanks you oddity, i’ve been trying to search the best coffee shop at kelapa gading and meet with oddity coffee the pandan latte is the best one, and the one of the employees his name is Mulyadi explain the best seller of coffe oddity and rights the pandan latte is good enough :)

title: Oddity Coffee
name: Pey
text: This beautiful coffee shop has left the best impression. Great coffee, friendly servers, good wifi, and cozy atmosphere to do work or hangout. Considering the service and quality, the price is reasonable. Especially if your seat is on the first floor, you will be served by a robot server! Can’t wait to come back!

title: Oddity Coffee
name: Iggy
text:
Visited this place for the third time. First time the experience was just okay, although the food came out in an hour. Second time was also okay with the beverages and desserts were quite decent.

Third time would be the last time coming to this place. Ordered spicy popcorn chicken, which came out to be tasteless and bland. At first, we thought that this is how the spicy popcorn chicken was supposed to be, so we requested for salt and pepper. Waitress said there is no salt and pepper condiments available, however, someone who supposedly was the manager/owner, said yes there is salt and pepper.

We waited for another ten of minutes and followed up again with the waitress on the salt and pepper. The waitress admitted that she knew our order was switched with someone else’s but did not inform us at all until we asked her.

The manager/owner then exchanged our chicken with a new one, made with the original flavour. However, after tasting the newly exchanged chicken, it was still tasteless. Could not express how disappointed we were at the service and food. not recommended.

title: Kopi Sana Wijaya

Coffee Latte

title: Oddity Coffee
name: 龍昌秀
text:
Really love the vibe of the store, my friend and i were looking for a place for coffee, and also to take pics while we’re at it.

The location is kind of secluded, we weren’t whether or not we arrive at the right address, but we did.

Loving the white vibe of the place, but it can be hot on a very sunny day if you sit near the entrance since it’s a huge glass door.

Ordered the chai latte, macadamia, and Tiramisu cake.

The beverage is good, but the tiramisu not so much, I’ve definitely had better ones,
At least for me.

Checked the 2nd floor to be somewhat a great place to just chill out on your own or with group of friends, they also provide a small smoking room.

They have a cute robot too to deliver your order to the table.

Very nice place! Would definitely love to come back!

title: Fillmore Coffee
name: Gece
text:
I came here cause my friend recommendation, since he knows one of the owner.

The place:
It was pretty hard to get here, the place was kind of hidden (not on the main street) with small access into it. There is parking tho. It's a small cafe, with beautiful facades. The interior is pretty, with big clear windows and touch of greeneries here and there. Pretty small tho. We sat in the smoking area, which is located on the 2nd floor. It was pretty nice until it gets humid and you start sweating your armpit off. Since it is located far from the main street, the open air space is not that horrible (polluted). I kinda like the atmosphere.

The drink:
- hot latte, served in small cup. Pretty small for a latte tho lol. It was pretty good, I think because of the servings, the milk didn't overwhelmed the coffee flavor. It was okay.

TL;DR
Place 3.5/5
Drink 3/5
Price 3/5
Service 3/5

title: Oddity Coffee
name: The Duchess of Culinary
text:
Oddity is a coffee shop at one of the commercial area near a modern market called Pasar Mandiri Summarecon Kelapa Gading. The parking area is spacious.

They don't provide main dish, but here we could enjoy variant of pastries, cakes, along with coffee, non coffee, tea, blended beverages, and soda. Oddity has a very nice interior and ambiance. It would be comfortable to hangout here. Their staffs are young and friendly as well.

Here are what I tried :

Iced Americano (IDR 35,000)
They use mixed Robusta and Arabica beans for this black coffee. If you're a pure black coffee fan without sugar just like me, we don't need to request anything as they serve the Americano without sugar already 🙂

Plain Cronut (IDR 20,000)
Their cronut a.k.a croissant donut comes up in several flavors, such as plain, tiramisu, Oreo, chocolate, glazed, Nutella, Biscoff. I tried the plain one that is sprinkled with white sugar and cinnamon. Their croissant is so soft, but isn't that flaky. But overall, their croissant has a good taste!

title: Oddity Coffee
name: Jessica Utomo
text:
Oddity has become my go-to spot—I’m a regular here because it’s genuinely one of the best cafes for studying or working. The ambience is cozy and inviting, there are plenty of plugs available, and the internet connection is always stable, which makes it perfect for productivity.

The food and drinks never disappoint. I absolutely love their pastries and meals—everything’s flavorful and well-prepared. The coffee is great, and their matcha is a standout! They use high-quality Uji matcha, so the flavor is rich, smooth, and authentic.

What really makes the experience special is the staff. The waiters are always warm and welcoming. Special shoutout to Kak Irham and Kak Tama—they’re consistently friendly, attentive, and make every visit feel comfortable and familiar.

Highly recommend this place whether you're here to study, hang out, or just unwind with great food and drinks!

Tempatnya di depan sebuah resto, masuk ke dalam terlihat suasana nya adem dan nyaman buat yg suka ngopi outdoor. Waktu kesana ternyata sepi banget krn puasa hari pertama.

Rasa kopinya sekarang lebih Light tapi tetap enak kok.

title: Oddity Coffee
name: Iin juniawati
text:
I have been here before for a quick coffee and I can say that Oddity serve a good quality of coffee.

This time I spent almost my half day here to work. I enjoy their coffee and their place. It is a great alternative working place when you want to work in different environments. They have a long table in 2nd floor with a lot of space and also electric socket. It is very comfortable for working.

For the food, I think some improvements can be made. I tried their blueberry cheesecake and nasi goreng kampung. The cheesecake quite nice, only I can’t taste the blueberry at all. Nasi goreng kampung is good. The taste is spot on, however the rice’s texture is inconsistent. Some of them are bit mushy, but then there are some that are very grainy.

Finally, when it comes to the staffs’ attitude I really love how they treat the guests. They are very informative, friendly and helpful. They told me about the promotions and give me a lot of recommendations.

title: Oddity Coffee
name: Glenn Adhi Ekaputra
text:
Not bad actually, but not good also.

When you visit a specialty coffee shop, you will expect a product that's somewhat a lot better than the "green mermaid" shop with a fraction of the price. We didn't get that much here.
The beans is a tad burnt (pretty dark roast) and the crema and the smoothness of the Long Black was nonexistent (given the price).

But they are already journeying to the right direction though, just need a bit more attention to detail and perseverance 😉 👌🏻. We'll certainly be back because they're located near our favorite wet market, and a cuppa is always welcome after a grueling monthly shopping session there 😊. We hope that they can continue to improve and grow so someday we'll feel the need to revisit this review and make some changes ☕️.

title: Oddity Coffee
name: Gloria Atalya
text:
I love the interior design of this place. It's a great place for working and hang out. The chocolate cake is just okay, I love the mango coconut drink.

But the last time I visited, I'm very disappointed because they serve their drinks in a plastic cup when it used to be in a cute glass. When I asked the barista, she answered it is to make their job easier (they don't have to wash the glasses). I honestly don't think it's necessary since the place is not that packed and fast paced. The texture and taste of the mango coconut drink has changed too, it was thinner and less flavorful.

Oddity used to be one of my go to cafes, but since those changes I sadly wouldn't come back.

title: Oddity Coffee

name: Bella BCN
text:
A hidden gem in South Jakarta. It's only a small place, may be the first impression when you see this place from the outside. Then, you go through the hallway & find the comfy place inside. There's a dedicated indoor with ac when you order the food, the rest of the place are outdoor. Although outdoor, it feels quite cold because they have fan on the wall.
The service is top notch. The staff is very kind. I ordered fettucine tom yum and free ice coffee & it's yummy. The only problem is the portion is little hehe.
But if you ask me to visit this cafe again, I will surely come back again.

title: LORONG KOPI
name: Miranti Vidyasari
text:
A small hidden coffee place behind mosque. Just like the name, you should first take a walk into an alley. Then you find this coffee shop. simple casual design with a pretty light fixture on the indoor area.
Limited seat but feel private, though.
Friendly and warm server.
Tried several menus. Americano is ok i guess. Less acidity, not too strong.
Their Kopi aren is good. Snack Platter is a fun and perfect for sharing. I like the taste and texture of the onion ring.
Overall they serve a tasty food.
The brownies cheese lotus comes with quite big portion. A bit dry, but still enjoyable. Not too sweet, a safe flavor in my opinion.
Price is affordable.
Limited parking space if you come by car.

They didn't tell me earlier when I ordered even after I asked the possible seating area. What a nice customer service. I ended up take away all of my order and definitely my first and last visit.

However, if you value a coffeshop as a place to work (moreover prefer to work in the indoor one), this one might be not comfortable enough since they only have limited seats facing the bar desk and small rounded desk lining the window side. The WiFi connection wasn't good as well, I eventually used my own mobile phone connection.

Next to the eggotel, a bit hidden, is it the perfect place to escape the city, relax, meet some friends or work from there. The  prices are affordable and the staff is super friendly - I enjoy every time going there.

text:
Lokasi nya cukuo strategis sebener nya, dan hidden gem, karna parkiran nya barengan dengan masjid dan laundry, ini di area cilandak kko, sesuai dengan titik maps kok. Bener bener masuk lorong dulu pertama nya sesuai nama cafe nya.

Tempat nya nyaman, ada outdoor area yang adem dan ada indoor area ac juga, ada live music juga setiap weekend.

Parkiran nya cukup luas. Bisa untuk beberapa mobil dan motor, area cafe nya pun clean dan nyaman juga untuk wfc. Pemesanan bisa di table dengan scan barcode dan payment dengan qris.

Pelayan nya cukup ramah dan helpfull, disini juga bisa photo booth lho.

text:
Salah satu spot sebat yang reccomended kalo lo lagi di area jaksel bawah.

Gue masuk dari pintu masuk mereka yang dempetan banget sama masjid. Dan lewat pintu ini, lo akan ngelewatin literally "Lorong" yang lumayan panjang. Quite an experience lah sebelum akhirnya lo menikmati ambience nongkrong di sini.

Buat sobat sebat, di sini asik banget karena ada beberapa spot yang mejanya proper buat laptopan. Wifi oke, pencahayaan kalo malem rada remang gitu lampunya kuning, masih bearable kok buat nge-deadline.

Di sisi yang lain, kalo capek kerja, lo juga bisa ngasep sambil  nongkrong aja ngomongin mana duluan: Ayam atau telur. Meja kursi rendah gitu, ges.

Cobain dah.

Dateng pas jam lunch jadi mau skalian makan pesen beef bulgogi tapi parah si ini beef nya alot parah😅 dipotong susah, digigit susah, mana isinya kebanyakan lemak yg gabisa dimakan..daging sedikit banget. Ga kenyang sih rasanya kaya ga mkn apa” pesen ini🥲 Please prepare beef tuh yg lembut dan ga alot, ini alotnya kebangetan lho sampe ga kemakan, ujung”nya cuma makan nasinya aja ga makan daging

title: LORONG KOPI
name: Octa c.s
text:
Nggak nyangka banget ada hidden gem seru di belakang Rumah Sakit Marinir Cilandak! Dari depan emang keliatannya biasa aja, bahkan agak nyempil di antara ruko-ruko, di pojokan di bawah tangga masjid. Tapi pas lo masuk, wah, ternyata dalemannya bikin melongo! Kaya masuk lorong waktu kecil terus nemu dunia lain yang luas banget—konsepnya unik kayak kendi yang dalemnya melebar. Awalnya jalan sempit, eh taunya ujungnya ada space seluas seperempat lapangan bola. Bener-bener unexpected!

Yang bikin tempat ini makin oke, ada tiga zona pilihan: indoor buat yang pengen AC, semi-outdoor yang ada atap tapi bebas ngerokok, atau full outdoor di depan band yang bisa sambil nikmatin langit. Cocok banget buat nongkrong rombongan, apalagi kalau mau bawa temen kantor—bisa chill sambil nyanyi karaoke tipis-tipis, seru deh.

Fasilitasnya juga lengkap, colokan banyak jadi nggak perlu rebutan buat nge-charge HP, enak buat WFC. Menunya juara, ada cireng naik kelas yang crunchy abis, terus special matcha nya—nendang tapi nggak terlalu manis, strong dan pas banget di lidah.

Vibes Jaksel-nya kerasa banget, asik buat lepas penat!💃✨

title: LORONG KOPI

text:
satu kata buat Lorong Kopi: NYAMAN
cafenya bener2 nyaman banget, peaceful, adem pokoknya enakeun banget

Interior designya cakep, pas pertama masuk keliatan sempit dan beneran masuk lorong gitu tapi setelah ke dalem whaaa luas juga.

Untuk makanan dan minumannya enak.
Saya pesan peach tea dan kopi teman lorong (gula aren). Kopinya creamy dan ngga kemanisan begitu juga peach teanya buat saya tidak terlalu manis which is good for me.
Snack platternya ada kentang, jamur, onion ring, ayam, semuanya enakk 🤤🤤🤤
Saya juga pesen Kouigm Amann (pastry yang dalem nya butter manis) itu juga enak pas buat teman kopinya.

Oh iya di atas cafenya juga ada masjid jadi kalo mau sholat ngga perlu khawatir. Toiletnya juga tersedia di bagian depan dan belakang cafe, bersih dan interionya cakep, bisa jadi inspirasi saat bangun rumah nanti 😬

name: Irma Naimun
text:
Tempatnya bersih dan nyaman, cocok untuk bersantai atau bekerja sejenak. Interiornya juga cukup estetik. Makanan dan minuman di sini rasanya biasa saja, tidak ada yang terlalu istimewa, tapi masih layak untuk dicoba. Harganya pun cukup sepadan dengan suasana yang ditawarkan.

Waktu saya berkunjung, kebetulan sedang cukup ramai karena ada satu keluarga besar yang berkumpul. Suasananya jadi agak bising, sehingga kurang cocok untuk yang ingin menikmati suasana tenang atau sekadar menyendiri. Mungkin akan lebih pas jika acara kumpul-kumpul seperti itu dilakukan di tempat yang lebih luas seperti di mall.

title: LORONG KOPI
name: Putri Aisya Pahlawani
text: Salah satu cafe di jakarta yang agak nyempil gitu. Jadi bukan yang keliatan langsung dari jalan raya. Areanya cukup luas. Harga makanan minuman standar cafe. Ada fotobox juga di dalamnya. Ada beberapa kucing yang lalu lalang disini tapi cute.

title: LORONG KOPI
name: Rnoor Fz (Rnoorfz)
text: One of lot fav places buat WFC. Honestly belum nyobain makanannya tapi so far kopinya enak

title: LORONG KOPI
name: Azumi Hakurei
text:
Katanya bisa dapat coffee gratis kalau buat story, pas disamperin kata mbanya harus second purchase dan harus ada struk pertama. Pas pembelian pertama gaada dijelaskan seperti itu. Padahal selang 10menit doang. Purchase pertama gak dikasih struk sama kasirnya. Di flyer card depan kasir dapat coffee gratisnya katanya baru berlaku besok, terus ngapain ditaruh hari ini? Lalu, di followup sama mba satunya bakal di cek emang ada pembelian apa engga, terus gaada kelanjutannya lagi.

Teruntuk mba kasir rambut panjang hitam pakai behel, gatau emang baru apa gmn tapi lo ngerusak mood. Waktu ditanya gimana kelanjutannya dijawab dikirim pakai email, padahal pas beli gaada ditanyain email ataupun nomor telepon. Cuman diarahin bayar pakai qris dan gaada dikasih struk samsek. Gak minta juga karena dipikir coffee gratisnya yang penting bikin story karena gaada snk harus second purchase.

Overall cafenya bagus, ada live musik. Cuman parkir motornya mepet bgt. Atasnya masjid, cafenya masuk gang. Emang hidden gem tapi pelayanan nya bad bgt.

Tempat ini gak ramah buat orang yang mau bawa anak, soalnya tempatnya mostly terbuka dan rata-rata yang kesini pada ngerokok dan ngevape.
Sorry ya aku kasih bintang 1.

title: LORONG KOPI
name: Intan Goyana
text:
Edisi: Work from Cafe Jaksel

Went there at one of the hottest day in Jakarta 😅

Tempatnya unik, modern dan cantik. Ada 3 seating area, outdoor smoking di kanan dan kiri. Tengah indoor barengan ma Kang Kopi. Karena non smoking areanya kurang kondusif untuk kerja, jadilah ku duduk di luar cari tempat yang kira2 ga begitu 'berasap'. Pagi2 masih okelah, tapi begitu menjelang jam 10, mulai panas dan sebelum Jumatan, kucari tempat lain. Menyerah 🥲

Kopinya Lorong Kopi oke, mocktailnya juga fresh, ordered less ice dan less sweet. Ni tempat oke untuk nongkrong dan meeting in person 👍 ga terduga soalnya. Namun, mejanya terlalu rendah untuk kerja pake laptop lama2, internet kurang stabil alhamdulillah ada mobile hotspot heee ketolong banget. Waktu itu crowdnya santai, ga rame/cuwawakan, vibe-nya tenang. Qadarullah hari itu panas pollll, jadinya ngacir deh cari tempat lain.

Good for:
👍 Cloudy day
👍 yang suka tempat2 nyempil, hidden gem gitu
👍 shalat tepat waktu, masjidnya dekettt banget
👍 meetup ma temens atau meeting in person

title: LORONG KOPI

text:
Hidden gem cilandak niiii, bener bener definisi lorongg wkwk lokasinya terpencil, atasnya ada masjid, bisa parkir di masjid tapi kalau mau parkir di cafe, masuknya dari gang sebelah alfamar, tempatnya bagus, kamar mandinya bersih, tapi ada spot yang agak pengap yaa, kalo aku pilih outdoor yang agak masuk kedalem, itu oke sih.

Kopi dan kentangnya oke ajaa🥰

title: LORONG KOPI

text: Kalau ke kafe ini utk tujuan meeting sebaiknya jangan duduk di indoor karena suara orang  ngobrol terpantul dan menggema sehingga ruangan menjadi sangat berisik. Kita jadi mesti teriak2 kalau mau ngobrol sama orang. Lebih baik pilih outdoor, itupun kalau tidak ada live music. Live musiknya juga kenceng banget suaranya.

title: LORONG KOPI
name: Diah •
text:
Sempet kelewatan pas mau kesini hahahah. Harusnya dari pertigaan kampung kandang, langsung aja parkir di masjidnya.

Caramel lattenya enakk. Biji kopi yang dipake kayaknya robusta tapi tastenya lebih ke agak asam, I guess. Aku beli brownies lotusnya juga, dan menurut aku super enakkk. Dia tipe brownie yang soft tapi juga ga terlalu soft, yang jelas bukan fudgy brownies. Must have pokoknya!

Price wise menurut aku standar yaa buat di daerah itu dan pas juga buat porsi minumannya yang lumayan banyak. Ditambah suasana yang tenang dan ga terlalu rame, cocok banget buat wfc atau skripsian.

Definitely will go back again :)

Karena ini kedatangan saya ke-3 dan rata2 makanan itu paling cepat di serve setelah 30 menit setelah order. Apalagi kalau ramai, bisa lebih lama lagi. Minta tolong dipercepat ya, terimakasih

text:
The first time I came here I was quite amazed of how fancy the place is, like deadass I don't think this is some sort of cafe that has this "FOMO" vibe bro, like I think you guys made this cafe with love in every aspect (God bless everyone who worked here & the owner) 🥹 I really love this place so much I wish to visit here often to draw while sippin that coffee/tea & do stuff.
